Lines.en: Pea Commandoes deploy flying pea soldiers against zombie.
Lines.zh: 豌豆突击队可以派遣突击豌豆向僵尸发动袭击。

Lines.en: Wait, are you talking about ...
Lines.zh: 等等，难道你说的是……

Lines.en: ... aircraft carriers?
Lines.zh: 航空母舰？

Lines.en: To be precise...
Lines.zh: 准确来说……

Lines.en: ... they are flying aircraft carriers.
Lines.zh: ……他们是会飞的航空母舰。

Lines.en: Aerial-aircraft carrier！
Lines.zh: 空中航母！

Lines.en: Is there a chance that we let plants that are wing-less be planted in the sky?
Lines.zh: 是否有种植物可以让无法飞行的植物被栽种到空中呢？

Lines.en: Like how we planted them on Lily Pads.
Lines.zh: 就像莲叶可以让陆生植物被栽种到水面一样。

Lines.en: Easy. Just flying flowerpots are what we needed.
Lines.zh: 非常简单，让花盆飞起来就好了。

Lines.en: Easier than lifting the ground after all.
Lines.zh: 这比让整个大地飞起来容易多了，

Lines.en: Flowerpot? What plant is that?
Lines.zh: 花盆？那是种植物吗？

Lines.en: A button?
Lines.zh: 一个按钮？

Lines.en: What if we push it?
Lines.zh: 按下它会发生什么呢？

Lines.en: Seems like it triggers a missile silo somewhere.
Lines.zh: 这似乎连接着某处的导弹发射井。

Lines.en: Enter "35711, 131719". Then push the button.
Wait, did we just blow something up?
Lines.zh: 等等，我们是不是炸掉了什么？

Lines.en: The big w-ake sh-oke me up. What just happened, Penny?
Lines.zh: 巨——大——的颠簸把我惊醒了，发生什么了潘妮？

Lines.en: Our experiments on controllable turbulence just came to a new period!
Lines.zh: 我们的可控气旋的实验取得的阶段性成果！

Lines.en: Loquanadoes create strong turbulences, ...
Lines.zh: 旋涡枇杷会制造一个强力的气旋，

Lines.en: which gather nearby zombies.
Lines.zh: 这可以将周围的僵尸聚集起来。

Lines.en: Excellent! That just ruined my nightmare.
Lines.zh: 太好了，那刚好毁了我们的噩梦。

Lines.en: Sounds like ... good news?
Lines.zh: 听上去……是个好消息？

Lines.en: Eeeeeo
Lines.zh: Eeeeeo

Lines.en: Eeeeeo
Lines.zh: Eeeeeo

Lines.en: Eeo Eeo
Lines.zh: Eeo Eeo

Lines.en: Eeo Eeo
Lines.zh: Eeo Eeo

Lines.en: Ilarilalilalilaaalero
Lines.zh: Ilarilalilalilaaalero

Lines.en: Ilarilalilalilaaalero
Lines.zh: Ilarilalilalilaaalero

Lines.en: All right
Lines.zh: All right

Lines.en: All right
Lines.zh: All right

Lines.en: This ain't good, Neighbor
Lines.zh: 这很不好，邻居。

Lines.en: Dr. Zomboss has every machine around controlled with his voice.
Lines.zh: 僵尸博士用声音控制了这里的机器。

Lines.en: Now smash his stage!
Lines.zh: 去砸碎他的舞台吧。

Lines.en: The concert's oooooover!
Lines.zh: 演唱会结束了!

Lines.en: I still want to listen a while longer.
Lines.zh: 我还想多听一阵子。

Lines.en: You bunch of savages!
Lines.zh: 你们简直是野蛮人！

Lines.en: My time machine, Penny, is still missing. However, ...
Lines.zh: 我的时光机潘妮依旧不知去向，但是……

Lines.en: Check out how sturdy our defenses are first.
Lines.zh: 看呐！我们的防线是多么坚固。

Lines.en: It's tough enough to withstand any form of assault.
Lines.zh: 这足以抵挡任何形式的进攻。

Lines.en: How dare you build such a filthy defense line so close to my concert venue!
Lines.zh: 你们竟然敢在离我的演唱会现场如此近的地方建立这样肮脏的防线！

Lines.en: You'll be regretted for what you planted. Get prepared for on my secret weapon.
Lines.zh: 你们会为此付出代价的，见识见识我的秘密武器吧。

Lines.en:
Your defense will vanish like snowflakes!
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
你们的防线将会如消逝雪花般消逝！
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: Caulipowers hypnotize zombies on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 超能花菜可以心灵控制场上的僵尸。

Lines.en: Oh no! All the lawnmowers went to Dr. Zomboss' concert!
Lines.zh: 哦不！小推车都去听僵尸博士的演唱会了！

Lines.en: Dr. Zomboss is just too charming.
Lines.zh: 僵尸博士实在是太有魅力了。

Lines.en: Never let zombies get close. We have no lawnmowers available.
Lines.zh: 千万别让僵尸靠近，我们没有小推车可用。

Lines.en: By the way, I'm also going to the concert. See you.
Lines.zh: 另外，我也要去听演唱会了，回见。

Lines.en: The music is stronger. Let's rock!!
Lines.zh: 音乐愈发强劲了，摇滚起来吧！！

Lines.en: The time rifts enabled zombies to form an even larger band.
Lines.zh: 时空裂隙使得僵尸组建起了更庞大的乐队。

Lines.en: It might be a must to travel through other timelines and return when we obtain more plants.
Lines.zh: 我们可能有必要退回到其他时间线，等我们的队伍更加壮大时再回来。

Lines.en: To my esteemed enemy.
Lines.zh: 致我尊敬的敌人。

Lines.en: I commend your ability to build defenses.
Lines.zh: 我肯定您组建防线的能力。

Lines.en: Your moat-like defense in the front of your fortress looks...
Lines.zh: 您堡垒前护城河般的防御看起来……

Lines.en:
...as fragile as a piggy bank that shatters at the first blow.
Dr. Zomboss, the valiant
Lines.zh:
……如同存钱罐一样一砸就碎。
——英挺的，僵尸博士

Lines.en: Special air forces detected.
Lines.zh: 检测到敌方特种飞行员。

Lines.en: These pilots are really huge.
Lines.zh: 这些家伙体型真大。

Lines.en: Getting them airborne doesn't seem easy.
Lines.zh: 让这些家伙飞起来不像是容易的样子。

Lines.en: Electrical current detected.
Lines.zh: 检测到电流反应。

Lines.en: We are approaching the thunderclouds.
Lines.zh: 我们正在接近雷云。

Lines.en: Accumulated electrical charge will have negative effects on plants.
Lines.zh: 聚集的电荷会对植物产生负面影响。

Lines.en: If we collect the charge before it accumulates...
Lines.zh: 如果我们可以把尚未聚集的电荷收集起来。

Lines.en: ...they will provide considerable destructive power.
Lines.zh: 这能提供相当可观的破坏力。

Lines.en: The composition of Moonbeans:
Lines.zh: 月亮豆的构成：

Lines.en:
Cellulose: 1%
Protein: 2%
Water: 5%
Lines.zh:
1％ 纤维素
2% 蛋白质
5％ 水……

Lines.en:
Sun: 22%
Dynamite: 70%
Sun Bomb?
Lines.zh: 阳光炸弹？

Lines.en: It's already midnight.
Lines.zh: 现在已经是午夜了。

Lines.en: Taking advantage of this opportunity, we dispatched several plant teams to the vicinity of the zombie air base.
Lines.zh: 我们趁着这个机会派遣了几组植物小队，前往僵尸飞行基地附近。

Lines.en: Looks like those zombies anticipated this in advance.
Lines.zh: 看样子僵尸们提前预料到了。

Lines.en: They seem furious about being woken up by us in the midnight...
Lines.zh: 他们似乎因为半夜被我们惊醒而非常生气……

Lines.en: They've dispatched an elite force to guard the area.
Lines.zh: 他们派遣了精英部队前来把守。

Lines.en: Don't be afraid — our plant teams are all elites too!
Lines.zh: 不要害怕，我们的植物小队也全是精英！

Lines.en: Let's take this opportunity to reduce the enemy's forces!
Lines.zh: 趁着这个机会削减敌方的兵力吧！

Lines.en: Reach the task and go home!
Lines.zh: 完成目标，安全回家！

Lines.en: The battle planes heavily damaged our ship.
Lines.zh: 战斗机重创了我们的飞船。

Lines.en: Though we've finished repairing,
Lines.zh: 虽然修复工作已经完成，

Lines.en: But I don't think we have the capability to survive from further attack.
Lines.zh: 但我不认为我们有能力挺过再一轮攻击。

Lines.en: About time to bring out my treasured Pineapple, ...
Lines.zh: 这时候就要拿出我珍藏的旋转菠萝了。

Lines.en: ...which can reflect the projectiles from our enemies.
Lines.zh: 他可以反弹对面打来的子弹。

Lines.en: Treasured, huh?
Lines.zh: 珍藏，是吗？

Lines.en: Look at those clouds! They look like...
Lines.zh: 看这些云，看起来很像……

Lines.en: ...clouds.
Speaking of aerial combat, how could there be no guns or bullets?
Lines.zh: 说起空战，怎么能没有战机呢。

Lines.en: Next, let's welcome our aerial combat ace...
Lines.zh: 接下来有请我们的空战王牌……

Lines.en: The Asparagus!
Lines.zh: 芦笋战机！

Lines.en: Have fun with them.
Lines.zh: 玩得开心。

Lines.en: The special bullets from Skyshooters create air currents within a small area.
Lines.zh: 飞天射手发射的特殊子弹会产生局部气流。

Lines.en: Though it's not strong enough to blow zombies away like Blover does.
Lines.zh: 虽然不足以像三叶草那样把僵尸吹到场外。

Lines.en: However, it can hinder the zombies' movements.
Lines.zh: 不过可以牵制僵尸的行动。

Lines.en: Be confident for their participation.
Lines.zh: 相信他的加入会起到大作用的。

Lines.en: And, of course, they can fly.
Lines.zh: 哦，当然，他还可以飞。

Lines.en: Alert! Enemy Drop Ships detected!
Lines.zh: 警报，检测到敌方运兵艇正在靠近！

Lines.en: Watch your back.
Lines.zh: 小心背后。

Lines.en: 11,300 meters above sea level
Enemy aircraft at 4,923 meters
Lines.zh: 敌机高度 4923 m。

Lines.en: No electrical current detected. Looks like we're in luck.
Lines.zh: 未检测到电流反应，看来我们的运气不错。

Lines.en: These trained zombies don't seem thirsty for brains.
Lines.zh: 这些经过训练的僵尸似乎并不渴求脑子。

Lines.en: They're likely aiming at our aerial fortress.
Lines.zh: 他们似乎瞄准了我们的飞行堡垒。

Lines.en: They are not gonna make it.
Lines.zh: 那可不能放任他们。

Lines.en: May we have good luck, Neighbor.
Lines.zh: 祝我们好运，邻居。

Lines.en: I've deployed a powerful troop on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 我在你的草坪上部署了一支强大的队伍。

Lines.en: Command them with Escape Root.
Lines.zh: 你可以用逃脱树根指挥他们。

Lines.en: By the way, this root is an employee at the logistics station in town.
Lines.zh: 顺带一提，这个树根是镇子上那家物流站的员工。

Lines.en: I've also prepared a few extra troops for you.
Lines.zh: 我准备了几支额外的队伍。

Lines.en: Choose one of them to support.
Lines.zh: 你可以选择其中一支来支援草坪。

Lines.en: Always make sure not to lose your commander.
Lines.zh: 切记不要丢失指挥权。

Lines.en: Oxygen is lethal for some organisms.
Lines.zh: 对有些生物而言，氧气是致命的。

Lines.en: So as shadow power.
Lines.zh: 暗影能量也是如此。

Lines.en: The gas released by Noctarine, while powering shadow plants...
Lines.zh: 暗影油桃释放的气体在为暗影植物充能的同时……

Lines.en: ...damages contacting zombies as well.
Lines.zh: ……会对气体内的僵尸造成伤害。

Lines.en: When Murkadamia Nuts are shadow-powered...
Lines.zh: 夏威夷果处于暗影形态时……

Lines.en: ...they will grow surrounding and regrowing jelly murk.
Lines.zh: ……会在表面长出一层会自我修复的外壳。

Lines.en: This jelly seems like a tough bite.
Lines.zh: 这外壳看起来可不好下嘴。

Lines.en: Shadow power can amplify the projectiles from Shadow Peashooters...
Lines.zh: 暗影能量可以增幅暗影豌豆的子弹……

Lines.en: ...making them able to penetrate anything.
Lines.zh: ……使其可以击穿一切。

Lines.en: They'd unleash greater energy with more shadow power around.
Lines.zh: 如果有更多的能量，他可以发挥更大的威力。

Lines.en: Our carts are stuck.
Lines.zh: 我们的矿车被卡住了。

Lines.en: Gloomvines will clear nearby obstacles...
Lines.zh: 忧郁藤蔓可以清除周围的障碍。

Lines.en: ...Meanwhile shadow-powering the plants sharing the same square with them.
Lines.zh: 同时可以让本格的植物进入暗影状态。

Lines.en: Massive shadow power detected.
Lines.zh: 检测到大量暗影能量。

Lines.en: The enemies are in the light, while we are in the "shadow".
Lines.zh: 敌在明，我在“暗”。

Lines.en: Lurking in the shadows!
Lines.zh: 藏匿在影子里！

Lines.en: Now presenting, my scientific technology...
Lines.zh: 接下来将呈现的是我的科学技术……

Lines.en: ...combined with the unique Qigong Sect around China.
Lines.zh: ……与武林寺庙特有的气功绝学。

Lines.en:
Qigong Master will teach you what true MANNERS is!
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
气功教主将会让你见识什么叫真正的“气度”！
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: Data indicates that the source of time-space fluctuations along with more blackholes is already near our lawn.
Lines.zh: 数据显示，时空紊乱以及黑洞的根源已经在我们的草坪附近了。

Lines.en: It seems there won't be a taco on the other side of the blackholes.
Lines.zh: 看样子黑洞的对面不会有玉米卷了。

Lines.en: So there's no kongfu-fighters left to challenge us!
Lines.zh: 已经没有武斗家来挑战我们了！

Lines.en: Time to flee I guess.
Lines.zh: 终于可以打退堂鼓了。

Lines.en: Cause I've had enough dumplings.
Lines.zh: 因为我已经吃饺子吃腻了。

Lines.en: It's hard to change you taste, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 想改变你的口味真难，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Let's go and find tacos in other timelines.
Lines.zh: 让我们前往其他时间线寻找玉米卷吧。

Lines.en: It seems I'd have to cope with our problems on my own...
Lines.zh: 看样子我必须亲自解决我们之间的矛盾了……

Lines.en: In most cases, the coefficient of static friction is greater than that of dynamic friction.
Lines.zh: 通常情况下，静摩擦系数要比动摩擦系数更大。

Lines.en: What I meant is, ...
Lines.zh: 我的意思是……

Lines.en: ...zombies are blow-able when pushed back.
Lines.zh: ……当僵尸被击退时是可以被吹走的。

Lines.en: Gumnuts pop sticky gum onto zombies, ...
Lines.zh: 香果胶向僵尸喷溅口香糖……

Lines.en: ...pinning them in place and causing them to block other zombies behind them.
Lines.zh: ……把他们定在原地，并拦住其身后的僵尸。

Lines.en: Try pushing back those Shield Zombies.
Lines.zh: 尝试击退力场盾僵尸。

Lines.en: That'll make them turn their shields off.
Lines.zh: 这可以迫使他关闭防护盾。

Lines.en: Stay alert! Shields will absorb all the area effects from the projectiles.
Lines.zh: 注意！防护盾会吸收掉子弹的溅射。

Lines.en: Holly Knight deals damage to zombies attacking him,...
Lines.zh: 冬青骑士对身边的僵尸造成伤害……

Lines.en: ...and can launch 3 prickly barrier leaves to knock back and damage zombies.
Lines.zh: ……还能发射三株带刺的障碍来击退并伤害僵尸。

Lines.en: Try pushing back those Shield Zombies.
Lines.zh: 尝试击退力场盾僵尸。

Lines.en: That'll make them turn their shields off.
Lines.zh: 这可以迫使他关闭防护盾。

Lines.en: Stay alert! Shields will absorb all the area effects from the projectiles.
Lines.zh: 注意！防护盾会吸收掉子弹的溅射。

Lines.en: Get covered!
Lines.zh: 及时布置掩护！

Lines.en: And your probability to survive would be significantly increased.
Lines.zh: 这可以显著提高生还率。

Lines.en: Good luck, Neighbor!
Lines.zh: 祝好运，邻居

Lines.en: Pumpkins can be planted on top of other plants to provide a tough additional layer of armor.
Lines.zh: 南瓜头可以被种植在其他植物的身上，作为保护他们的铠甲。

Lines.en: Except for supporting our defence, ...
Lines.zh: 除了提供植物的生长，……

Lines.en: ...Strong light burns and blinds the zombies in the eyes.
Lines.zh: ……强大的光照还能闪瞎僵尸的眼睛。

Lines.en: That really spins and stuns their minds.
Lines.zh: 让他们晕头转向无法行动。

Lines.en: Not only do Shine Vines produce sun on their own...
Lines.zh: 闪耀藤蔓不止会自己产出阳光……

Lines.en: ...but boost our producing plants as well.
Lines.zh: ……还能够增加阳光生产植物的产能。

Lines.en: That'll make those costly plants affordable for us sooner.
Lines.zh: 这可以为我们提供大量的阳光，以支持昂贵植物的种植。

Lines.en: It's, SHHHHINING!
Lines.zh: 多么地，闪耀！

Lines.en: We're arriving where the Enlighten-Famlily plants are located.
Lines.zh: 我们正在接近启明家族植物的聚集地。

Lines.en: Enlightening? I see nothing but darkness.
Lines.zh: 启明？前面不过是一片黑暗啊。

Lines.en: Do NOT stare at light sources, User Dave!
Lines.zh: 请不要直视光源！用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Atomic Bombegranates explode on contact, dealing heavy damages in a huge area and spawning Seedlings around them.
Lines.zh: 原子石榴弹在被僵尸接触时自爆，生成小种子。

Lines.en: However they are spawned as Seedlings.
Lines.zh: 然而他们需要从种子阶段生长。

Lines.en: These zombies are getting tricky!
Lines.zh: 这些僵尸越来越狡猾了！

Lines.en: They just always suddenly appear in the middle of our lawn.
Lines.zh: 他们总是突然出现在我们的草坪中央。

Lines.en: Just defeat them and all their friends!
Lines.zh: 赶快把他们和他们的盟友全部一网打尽吧！

Lines.en: Friends of our enemies aren't always our enemies too, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们敌人的朋友不一定也是我们的敌人，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Zombies are easy to be persuaded to fight for us.
Lines.zh: 僵尸很容易被我们说服并为我们战斗。

Lines.en: If that's not easy enough...
Lines.zh: 如果没那么轻松的话……

Lines.en: ...just keep them frozen and make them 'right'!
Lines.zh: ……那就把他们冻住，让他们朝着正确的方向！

Lines.en: This is a time-limited mission.
Lines.zh: 这是一个限时任务。

Lines.en: And that literally means our time is limited.
Lines.zh: 顾名思义我们的时间有限。

Lines.en: Hurry up and win in time!
Lines.zh: 加速起来！在有限的时间内获胜吧！

Lines.en: Well wasn't that easy?
Lines.zh: 这不是很轻松嘛？

Lines.en: It seems we've managed to appease the magic deep in the forest.
Lines.zh: 看样子我们让来自丛林的魔法得到了平息。

Lines.en: Defeating me using my scientific achievements?
Lines.zh: 居然利用我引以为傲的科研成果来击败我。

Lines.en: It seems you are even more tricky than I am.
Lines.zh: 看样子你们比我还要狡猾。

Lines.en: Meet the combination of the forest magic and the 19th-century tech!
Lines.zh: 好好见识丛林魔法和 19 世纪科技的结合！

Lines.en: —— Thunder Traps ——
Lines.zh: —— 雷电陷阱 ——

Lines.en: Everyone knows that gold is perfect as conductor.
Lines.zh: 大家都知道黄金是完美的导体。

Lines.en: Oh wait... Why am I telling you how they work?
Lines.zh: 哦不等等……我为什么要告诉你它们的原理？

Lines.en: As clarification, I am not so foolish that I'd make my Zombot Aerostatic Gondola 2.0 with gold.
Lines.zh: 那么澄清一下，我可没笨到用黄金来搭建我的热气球浮舰 2.0！

Lines.en: Not Again! Our lawnmowers are non-mowers!
Lines.zh: 又是这样！我们的小推车变成无推车了！

Lines.en: Data indicates that our mowers have magic opposite to that in the forests, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 数据显示我们的小推车蕴含着与丛林里的魔法的能量，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: But as known to all, opposites attract one another.
Lines.zh: 但是众所周知，异性相吸。

Lines.en: Denser jungles! And more treasure-hunting teams.
Lines.zh: 更茂密的丛林！还有更多的探宝队。

Lines.en: It seems the magic from the shadowy jungle has granted the zombies even greater power.
Lines.zh: 看样子丛林阴暗角落的魔法给僵尸带来了更强大的力量。

Lines.en: It might be a must to travel through other timelines and return when we obtain more plants.
Lines.zh: 我们可能有必要退回到其他时间线，等我们的队伍更加壮大时再回来。

Lines.en: Those swinging 3-section staffs are really annoying!
Lines.zh: 那些舞着三节棍的家伙实在是太难缠了！

Lines.en: I'm sure there's no way they could reflect fluid.
Lines.zh: 我笃定他们拿液体没有办法。

Lines.en: Good news is Cantaloup-pults can provide fluid attacks.
Lines.zh: 正好哈密瓜投手可以提供这样的攻击。

Lines.en: Keep cautious. We can only provide two of them for now.
Lines.zh: 省着点用，我们目前只能提供两株。

Lines.en: The storm is gone.
Lines.zh: 风停了。

Lines.en: There's no reason to stay here any longer.
Lines.zh: 没有留在这里的理由了。

Lines.en: Time to move.
Lines.zh: 赶快离开吧。

Lines.en: Our loot this time is perfect!
Lines.zh: 这次的收获真是完美！

Lines.en: No need to worry about taco preservation any more!
Lines.zh: 我再也不用担心玉米卷的保存问题了！

Lines.en: Vamporcinis drain blood from nearby zombies, making themselves tougher.
Lines.zh: 吸血牛肝菌会吸收周围僵尸的血液，同时让自己变得更硬。

Lines.en: Umbrella Leaves respond to zombies with falling actions nearby.
Lines.zh: 伞叶会对周围发生的一切下坠动作做出反应。

Lines.en: It's not a good idea to let Chicken Wranglers get close to the flowers with their chickens.
Lines.zh: 让牧鸡僵尸携带着僵尸鸡靠近花坛不是个好主意。

Lines.en: Are those chickens enjoying zombie jam?
Lines.zh: 我看到一群鸡在听音乐。

Lines.en: Is that a dream?
Lines.zh: 我在做梦吗？

Lines.en: My smelt somethin' tasty!
Lines.zh: 我闻到了很香的味道！

Lines.en: I think that's from Sweet Potatos.
Lines.zh: 我想是甜薯散发出来的香味。

Lines.en: Their smell will attract nearby zombies and gather them around.
Lines.zh: 这气味会将附近的僵尸吸引到甜薯身边。

Lines.en: I found a path that leads deeper in the rift.
Lines.zh: 我发现了一条通往裂缝更深处的路。

Lines.en: There is another plant.
Lines.zh: 这里有一株完全不一样的植物。

Lines.en: It's like a...
Lines.zh: 他像是一个……

Lines.en: ...a hot potato that is hot enough to burn!
Lines.zh: ……一个烫手的甜薯。

Lines.en: Hotdates not only attracts nearby zombies...
Lines.zh: 热辣海枣不仅可以吸引附近的僵尸……

Lines.en: ...but also burn the hole lane when defeated.
Lines.zh: ……在死亡时还会产生灼烧一整行的火焰。

Lines.en: Chicken Wranglers won't release chickens when frozen or stunned.
Lines.zh: 牧鸡僵尸在被冰冻或者眩晕时不会释放僵尸鸡。

Lines.en: Hey, neighbor!
Lines.zh: 嘿，邻居。

Lines.en: Fire!
Lines.zh: 开火！

Lines.en: I said FIRE!
Lines.zh: 我说，开火！

Lines.en: Strawbursts have three growth phases.
Lines.zh: 爆浆草莓有三个生长阶段。

Lines.en: As they grow through their growth phases, its damages increases.
Lines.zh: 随着生长阶段的提高，其对僵尸的打击能力也会提高。

Lines.en: But sometimes you don't need them to be completely grown.
Lines.zh: 有些时候并不需要长到最大。

Lines.en: Conjecture verified.
Lines.zh: 与我的猜想一致。

Lines.en: A new plant has been added to our collection.
Lines.zh: 我们获得了新的植物。

Lines.en: But I don't see my tacos nowhere!
Lines.zh: 我没有看到我的玉米卷。

Lines.en: It's time to leave.
Lines.zh: 现在是时候离开了。

Lines.en: Keep time-traveling and reveal other time-space rifts.
Lines.zh: 继续探索时间线，我们或许会发现更多的裂缝。

Lines.en: MY TACOS...
Lines.zh: 我的玉米卷……

Lines.en: The zombies' attack in the rift is much harder than any other timelines.
Lines.zh: 裂缝里的攻势比任何时间都要猛烈。

Lines.en: No matter when a rift appears...
Lines.zh: 无论是在何时出现的裂缝……

Lines.en: ...It's always a better choice to return where we came from.
Lines.zh: ……我们都有必要回到裂缝的入口。

Lines.en: Until we obtain more plants.
Lines.zh: 直到获得更多植物。

Lines.en: What time is it?
Lines.zh: 现在是什么时候？

Lines.en: I can't calculate the accurate time, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 无法定位到具体时间，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We are trapped in a rift...
Lines.zh: 我们掉到了时间的裂缝里面……

Lines.en: It's a place without time, but more chaotic than any other timelines.
Lines.zh: 不属于任何时间，也要比任何时间都更加的混乱。

Lines.en: That means zombies from all timelines will converge...
Lines.zh: 这意味着会有来自不同时间的僵尸将会聚集……

Lines.en: ...and forming attacks towards us, even fiecer than any other timelines.
Lines.zh: ……并组建起比任何时间线都更猛烈的攻势来进攻我们。

Lines.en: Is there a taco?
Lines.zh: 这里有玉米卷吗？

Lines.en: Unfortunately, my taco detector found nothing.
Lines.zh: 很遗憾我的玉米卷检测器没有侦测到玉米卷的存在。

Lines.en: However, I've detected new plants that might be acquired after we completely explore the rift.
Lines.zh: 不过我检测到了新的植物，或许彻底探索这条裂缝可以获得他们。

Lines.en: Let's go find those tacos!
Lines.zh: 向玉米卷前进！

Lines.en: Are we still in Ancient Egypt?
Lines.zh: 这里还是埃及吗？

Lines.en: We do absolutely remain in Ancient Egypt.
Lines.zh: 毫无疑问这里依旧是古埃及。

Lines.en: However, time-space fluctuations detected.
Lines.zh: 不过我检测到了严重的时空波动。

Lines.en: We'll drop into unknown timelines if we stay here too long.
Lines.zh: 我们待在这里可能随时都会掉到未知的时间。

Lines.en: We have to stop the storm!
Lines.zh: 我们得让这暴风雪停下。

Lines.en: Luckily Solar Tomatoes fits in this job.
Lines.zh: 阳光番茄可以完美胜任这个工作。

Lines.en: Focus on the frozen wind before the storms.
Lines.zh: 看准暴风雪来临前的寒气。

Lines.en: Looks like it's out of Barrel Rollers here.
Lines.zh: 我想这里没有更多的滚筒僵尸了。

Lines.en: Stay cautious!
Lines.zh: 不能掉以轻心！

Lines.en: We must leave before the next storm arrives.
Lines.zh: 我们最好赶在下一轮暴风雪来临前离开这里。

Lines.en: Seems that Solar Tomatoes don't make sun on their own.
Lines.zh: 阳光番茄生产的阳光似乎并不是从自己体内产出的。

Lines.en: In face, Solar Tomatoes convert zombies' energy into sun.
Lines.zh: 实际上，阳光番茄把僵尸身上的能量转换成了阳光。

Lines.en: Additionally, affected zombies will be temporarily stunned.
Lines.zh: 同时这会让僵尸在一段时间内丧失行动能力。

Lines.en: Solar Tomatoes stun zombies, each of which produces a sun.
Lines.zh: 阳光番茄可以令范围内的每一个僵尸都产生一个阳光。

Lines.en: Different kinds of slow-down effects can be multiplied with each other simultaneously.
Lines.zh: 不同的减速效果可以叠加在一起。

Lines.en: Deploy different plants with slow-down abilities and slow zombies down furthermore.
Lines.zh: 同时使用有不同减速效果的植物能进一步降低僵尸的行动速度。

Lines.en: Sap-flings can slow down groups of zombies in the same tile.
Lines.zh: 树脂可以使一格内的一群僵尸减速。

Lines.en: If you stare at the sun, the ground will become darker!
Lines.zh: 往太阳的方向看的时候，你会发现地面比平时更暗了。

Lines.en: When a Plantern is bright enough, zombies will ignore all near by plants.
Lines.zh: 当路灯花明亮到一定程度的时候，僵尸就会无视掉他周围的其他植物。

Lines.en: Feeding them Plant Food will make them uncommonly bright!
Lines.zh: 通过给他喂食叶绿素可以实现这样的效果。

Lines.en: Zombies illuminated by Planterns will carry sun.
Lines.zh: 被路灯花照射的僵尸将会携带阳光。

Lines.en: Use these sun to build your defense!
Lines.zh: 用这些阳光发展防线吧！

Lines.en: Those wizards developed potions that allow zombies to hide themselves in darkness.
Lines.zh: 那些中世纪的巫师研究出了能让僵尸遁入黑暗的药水。

Lines.en: No worries! We've got light sources to reveal their covers!
Lines.zh: 别担心，我们有能让他们显形的光源。

Lines.en: Do you know Blovers can blow away those zombies off the ground?
Lines.zh: 你是否知道三叶草可以吹走一切没有站在地面上的僵尸？

Lines.en: Fortunatly, Parsnips can toss'em up in the air.
Lines.zh: 正好防风草可以让僵尸腾空一段时间。

Lines.en: Let's utilize this to handle those armored sea monsters!
Lines.zh: 用这招解决那些有坚硬外壳的海怪吧！

Lines.en: Remember, Spikerocks can be healed with First Aid.
Lines.zh: 记住了，钢地刺能被坚果包扎术修复。

Lines.en: I've found Parsnips.
Lines.zh: 我发现了防风草。

Lines.en: They act like crabs but charge towards zombies like Guacodiles.
Lines.zh: 这些长得像螃蟹的小东西像鳄梨一样会冲向尸群。

Lines.en: But it seems that they hate swimming.
Lines.zh: 但他们似乎并不喜欢水。

Lines.en: Land crabs!
Lines.zh: 旱螃蟹。

Lines.en: It's extemely cold here.
Lines.zh: 这里真冷。

Lines.en: Data indicates that cold-air outbreak from paleolithic time had striked on this area.
Lines.zh: 数据显示这里遭遇了史前时代的寒潮。

Lines.en: Anything for us to keep ourselves warm?
Lines.zh: 我们有什么可以供暖的东西吗？

Lines.en: I see a huuuuuuge herd of dinosaurs!
Lines.zh: 我看见一大群恐龙。

Lines.en: It's time to send them back where they came from.
Lines.zh: 是时候让他们回老家了。

Lines.en: Early worms get eaten by birds.
Lines.zh: 枪打出头鸟。

Lines.en: It's true both for defense and attack.
Lines.zh: 对防守和进攻来说都是。

Lines.en: Meteor Flowers can frighten away those annoying prehistoric creatures.
Lines.zh: 流星花可以吓跑那些令人讨厌的史前生物。

Lines.en: I didn't know that dinosaurs can see their future.
Lines.zh: 我第一次知道恐龙可以预知未来。

Lines.en: The storm is rising.
Lines.zh: 起风了。

Lines.en: We need to leave immediately.
Lines.zh: 我们需要尽快离开。

Lines.en: The sandstorm is pushing something dangerous onto our lawn!
Lines.zh: 这里的风沙要卷来一些非常危险的东西！

Lines.en: What about just freezing the sandstorm and stop'em?
Lines.zh: 或者我们可以想办法让它停下来。

Lines.en: We've got a Celery Stalker here.
Lines.zh: 这里有一株潜伏芹菜。

Lines.en: I'll put this little guy onto the minecart.
Lines.zh: 我会把他放到矿车上。

Lines.en: I'll remove it with a shovel instead.
Lines.zh: 我选择用铲子挖出来。

Lines.en: Is that all the Ice-shrooms?
Lines.zh: 没有更多的寒冰菇了吗？

Lines.en: Unfortunately, I'm not able to find another Ice-shroom in such a short time.
Lines.zh: 很遗憾，我没有能力在这么短时间内找来第二个寒冰菇。

Lines.en: Seems there's gonna be a fierce battle.
Lines.zh: 那有一场恶仗要打了。

Lines.en: Rough beginning.
Lines.zh: 万事开头难。

Lines.en: Rougher proceeding.
Lines.zh: 然后中间难。

Lines.en: Roughest ending!
Lines.zh: 最后结尾难。

Lines.en: I've detected mushrooms that can freeze all over our lawn.
Lines.zh: 我在这里找到了一种可以产生大范围冰冻的蘑菇。

Lines.en: Does that mean I've got a larger space for taco storage?
Lines.zh: 所以我有更大的地方来冷藏我的玉米卷了？

Lines.en: We still need to time-travel for another 4,516,783 times to get such quantity of tacos, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 你需要走 4,516,783 次时间旅行才能拥有那么多的玉米卷，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Gosh! Your lawn seems 100 times messier than my farming warehouse!
Lines.zh: 看呐，这里比我堆放农具的仓库还要乱上几十倍。

Lines.en: Two persistent routes for zombies detected.
Lines.zh: 我识别到两条固定路线。

Lines.en: Unobstructed enough for them!
Lines.zh: 真是畅通无阻啊。

Lines.en:
Alert:
Strong time-space warp detected.
Lines.zh: 警告！检测到正在接近的时空扭曲。

Lines.en: Is that a good news?
Lines.zh: 这是好消息吗？

Lines.en: No extra time-space warp detected.
Lines.zh: 没有检测到新的时空波动。

Lines.en: About time we exit this rift
Lines.zh: 也是时候离开这条裂缝了。

Lines.en: Is that a bad news?
Lines.zh: 这是坏消息吗？

Lines.en: Autumn is perfect for outdoor activities, isn't it?
Lines.zh: 秋天真的很适合户外活动，不是吗？

Lines.en: Agreed.
Lines.zh: 赞同。

Lines.en: It's delightful not worrying about heating problems on my computer.
Lines.zh: 不用考虑芯片散热的问题真的太美妙了。

Lines.en: Oh, you heard that skitter-scattery sound?
Lines.zh: 你没有听见一些很讨厌的声音？

Lines.en:
Alert:
It seems that zombies are also hanging out to enjoy Autumn.
Lines.zh: 哦不，听起来僵尸也要秋游了。

Lines.en: What? We're out of Moonflowers?
Lines.zh: 什么？我们没有月光花可以用了？

Lines.en: Indeed.
Lines.zh: 是的。

Lines.en: However, do not forget Gloom-shrooms transmit shadow power between each other.
Lines.zh: 不过不要忘了，暗影形态可以通过孢子在忧郁菇之间蔓延。

Lines.en: Seems that zombies are holding an underwater pool party.
Lines.zh: 看起来那些僵尸在海里举办了一场舞会。

Lines.en: Shall we join them?
Lines.zh: 要不我们也去参加？

Lines.en: Protect the three Gloom-shrooms at all costs.
Lines.zh: 保护好那三株忧郁菇。

Lines.en: They are necessary for us to step over this rift.
Lines.zh: 在这条裂缝里继续推进，他们是必不可少的。

Lines.en: Ever seen the moon shining in daytime?
Lines.zh: 你见过白天还在天上的月亮吗？

Lines.en: If not……
Lines.zh: 如果没有见过的话.

Lines.en: Today's your lucky day.
Lines.zh: 今天那就可以看见了。

Lines.en: Look! Another mushroom that can be powered by Moonflowers!
Lines.zh: 看呐，又一株可以被月光花增强的蘑菇。

Lines.en: Gloomshrooms poison zombies when powered.
Lines.zh: 暗影形态的忧郁菇会让僵尸中毒。

Lines.en: Furthermore, those poisonous spores carry shadow power.
Lines.zh: 不仅如此，那些有毒孢子还携带了暗影能量。

Lines.en: Sharing is caring!
Lines.zh: 乐于分享是美好的品德。

Lines.en: Alert: A huge wave of zombies underwater detected.
Lines.zh: 警告：检测到大量淹没在水下的僵尸。

Lines.en: Oh no! I was just considering taking a swim down here!
Lines.zh: 哦，不，我刚刚还打算下水游泳呢！

Lines.en: We cannot lose extra plants.
Lines.zh: 你没有多余的植物可以损失。

Lines.en: Always make sure that at least one Ghost Pepper finally remains.
Lines.zh: 记得保留一株幽灵辣椒。

Lines.en: As ghosts, Ghost Peppers always levitate in the air.
Lines.zh: 作为幽灵，幽灵辣椒可以漂浮在空中。

Lines.en: You smelt something?
Lines.zh: 你有闻到吗？

Lines.en: It smells like...
Lines.zh: 闻起来像……

Lines.en: Doom!
Lines.zh: 毁灭！

Lines.en: What are we waiting for? Let's blow these zombies up in one shot!
Lines.zh: 还在等什么呢，赶紧把一发僵尸炸上天吧。

Lines.en: Better choice to wait until a great number of zombies gather.
Lines.zh: 等僵尸聚集到一定程度再一起消灭是最好的选择。

Lines.en: Keep an eye on the safety of other plants on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 注意其他植物的损失。

Lines.en: The beach here lacks viable conditions for planting.
Lines.zh: 这片沙滩似乎不能提供新的植物生长。

Lines.en: We must wait for window periods for mushroom deployment.
Lines.zh: 我们需要等待部署蘑菇的窗口期。

Lines.en: Save those remaining Lily Pads for extreme emergencies.
Lines.zh: 不到万不得已不要炸毁仅存的莲叶。

Lines.en:
Red Alert:
An unquantifiable number of Gargantuars are approaching!
Lines.zh: 坏消息，这里聚集了难以统计的巨尸！

Lines.en:
Green "Alert":
We've just received support from SUPER mushrooms!
Lines.zh: 好消息，我们得到了超级蘑菇的支援！

Lines.en: Let's tear up the entire lawn!
Lines.zh: 让我们把草坪掀翻吧！

Lines.en: Buttercups hurl butter at the zombies who tried eating them.
Lines.zh: 黄油毛茛会向尝试啃咬她的僵尸投掷黄油。

Lines.en: You bet! They're not common cups.
Lines.zh: 那是当然，她们不是一般的杯子。

Lines.en: They're Butter-cups!
Lines.zh: 是黄油杯（butter-cup）！

Lines.en: Blooming Hearts' projectiles gradually reduce zombies' defense.
Lines.zh: 心蕊的子弹会逐渐降低僵尸的防御力。

Lines.en: Maybe that's because they're packed with love?
Lines.zh: 是注入了爱的原因吗？

Lines.en: Actually, just because her shots deliver toxins.
Lines.zh: 不，她注入的是一些毒素。

Lines.en: Torchwoods are super handy.
Lines.zh: 火炬树桩有诸多用途。

Lines.en: First of all… they're literally the “Torch” woods!
Lines.zh: 首先……他是“火炬”树桩。

Lines.en: Watch out for the jesters hiding among the zombies.
Lines.zh: 当心混在尸群里的弄臣。

Lines.en: They'll totally mess things up if they catch your ignited peas!
Lines.zh: 千万不要让他接触到点燃的豌豆。

Lines.en: Ignite the Marigolds and blow those zombies up!
Lines.zh: 引爆金盏花把僵尸炸成灰烬吧!

Lines.en: Those Wall-nuts will be thankful for that.
Lines.zh: 坚果会感激你的。

Lines.en: Orange Marigolds blow up when they die.
Lines.zh: 橙色金盏花在死亡时会发生爆炸。

Lines.en: Also, watch out for the Mega Gatling Pea with unstable temper.
Lines.zh: 另外要小心超级机枪豌豆不稳定脾气。

Lines.en: Torchwoods can light up peas passing by.
Lines.zh: 火炬树桩可以点燃经过他的豌豆。

Lines.en: But sometimes triggering them up among zombies is also a good call.
Lines.zh: 不过有时候在尸群里引爆也是个不错的选择。

Lines.en: Don't you worry'bout them.
Lines.zh: 不用担心。

Lines.en: They're willing to do that.
Lines.zh: 他们很乐意这么做。

Lines.en: Whoa, the plants here seem to have formed into groups.
Lines.zh: 这里的植物似乎组队了。

Lines.en: Sort of like... Jack and Mary.
Lines.zh: 就像……小明和小红。

Lines.en: They used to be the hottest combo.
Lines.zh: 他们曾经是最火热的组合。

Lines.en: But by now they've become significantly weak.
Lines.zh: 不过现在没落了不少。

Lines.en: I wasn't talking about Jack and Mary.
Lines.zh: 我不是指小明和小红。

Lines.en: I think we've finished exploring this rift.
Lines.zh: 我想我们已经把这条裂隙探索完毕了。

Lines.en: Is that all the plants from the Appease Family?
Lines.zh: 这些就是全部的平射家族植物吗？

Lines.en: Actually, plants from one family don't gather merely in one place.
Lines.zh: 否认，一个家族的植物并不一定会全部聚在同一个地方。

Lines.en: Let's roll towards Appease Family - Part II!
Lines.zh: 向平射家族第二部分进发吧！

Lines.en: These tombstones engraved with pictograms really freak me out.
Lines.zh: 这些篆刻着象形文字的石碑真令人不安。

Lines.en: Hey, on witnessing Dandelions' fluffy hair! Who can resist to……
Lines.zh: 看到蒲公英毛茸茸的头发，怎么能忍住不去……

Lines.en: Blow it all away!
Lines.zh: 全部吹起来呢！

Lines.en: Please restrain such impulses.
Lines.zh: 请克制住这样的冲动。

Lines.en: It'll make those Dandelions passive for a while.
Lines.zh: 这会让蒲公英丧失一段时间的战斗力。

Lines.en: Pea Vines boost all peashooters and plants from Appease Family.
Lines.zh: 豌豆藤蔓可以增强所有豌豆以及隶属于平射家族的植物。

Lines.en: Sometimes even affecting those which are not even peas.
Lines.zh: 即使他们有些并不是豌豆。

Lines.en: Seems there's gonna be more than one type of plants here.
Lines.zh: 这条分支似乎有不止一种植物。

Lines.en: Plants with similar characteristics tend to co-occur.
Lines.zh: 有相同特质的植物往往倾向同时出现。

Lines.en: We'll see more such situations in the future.
Lines.zh: 我们今后会见到更多类似的情况。

Lines.en: Pumpkins protect the plants inside them, but they can't protect other plants on the lawn.
Lines.zh: 南瓜头可以保护他容纳的植物，但是他并不能保护到其他的植物。

Lines.en: That's just too unfair for plants without Pumpkins!
Lines.zh: 这样对没有被南瓜头保护的植物而言真是不太公平。

Lines.en: According to my data, User Dave wants to protect more plants in a short time.
Lines.zh: 数据显示戴夫只是想要在极短的时间内保护到更多的植物。

Lines.en: Luckily Bamboozles are perfectly suit for such situation.
Lines.zh: 正好整人竹可以胜任这样的工作。

Lines.en: They can launch bamboo buskets to five locations on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 他可以向场地内的五个指定的位置部署竹筐。

Lines.en: Whoa! That's a young abbot!
Lines.zh: 竟然还有这么年轻的住持。

Lines.en: They must be extraordinarily powerful leading Kongfu Temples at this age.
Lines.zh: 能在这个年纪当上少林寺的住持绝非泛泛之辈。

Lines.en: I've detected special energy flowing through their entire beings.
Lines.zh: 我检测到了特殊的能量在他们的五脏六腑内流动。

Lines.en: It's confirmed that they are masters of Qigong.
Lines.zh: 这说明他们全部都是气功大师。

Lines.en: Solar Sages' meditation has reached their peak.
Lines.zh: 阳光鼠尾草的功法已经到了登峰造极的地步。

Lines.en: They could illuminate the undead in a heartbeat.
Lines.zh: 她们能在瞬间感化身边迷失方向的亡灵。

Lines.en: We've got a serious problem.
Lines.zh: 我们有大麻烦了。

Lines.en: Abbot Zombies from other Kongfu Temples are converging onto our lawn.
Lines.zh: 其他少林寺里的住持正在往这里聚集。

Lines.en: It seems that we're inadvertently challenging all Kongfu Temples in China.
Lines.zh: 我们似乎在无意间挑战了中原所有的武林寺庙。

Lines.en: I'm gonna reach the PEAK of KONGFU!
Lines.zh: 我要登上武林之巅！！

Lines.en: Bad news for you.
Lines.zh: 告诉你一个坏消息。

Lines.en:
Devil of Dynamite wasn't the only alliance I've been cooperating with.
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
在这里与我合作的盟友可不止火药魔头一人。
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: Get prepared. An enemy with unparalleled skill is on his way.
Lines.zh: 做好准备，一位绝世高手正在赶来的路上。

Lines.en: I've been ready to take him down since the day I was born!
Lines.zh: 我的打出生起就做好打倒他的准备了。

Lines.en: I can't believe we actually defeated that legendarily strong enemy!
Lines.zh: 我们竟然真的打败了那样的绝世高手。

Lines.en: We have to celebrate such victory with a feast!
Lines.zh: 一定要举办一场盛大的宴会好好庆祝一下！

Lines.en: We've got little time for this, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们真的没有这个时间，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Kongfu Zombies' attack is still far from over.
Lines.zh: 僵尸的进攻还远远没有结束。

Lines.en: How surprising! Blade Wielding Hero was defeated.
Lines.zh: 持刀大侠竟然被击败了！

Lines.en: Even have I started to appreciate your strengths...
Lines.zh: 连我也欣赏起你们的实力了……

Lines.en: ...in your dreams.
Lines.zh: ……骗你的。

Lines.en: Rumours said that Lychee and Heavenly Peach are in couple!
Lines.zh: 谣传荔枝和能治愈自己伤痕的仙桃是一对情侣。

Lines.en: Though they were just probably standing too close while blocking of the zombies.
Lines.zh: 可能只是在抵御僵尸的时候靠的太近了些。

Lines.en: In fact, they don't even know each others' names.
Lines.zh: 其实他们连对方叫什么都不知道。

Lines.en: Lychees take damages and scatter fragments of their shells in an area.
Lines.zh: 荔枝会将自己被打碎的外壳碎片抛向四周，

Lines.en: Additionally, their shells will burst out on burnt by torches.
Lines.zh: 另外，一旦被火把烧尽，他们的外壳会直接爆开。

Lines.en: I can't believe you're still bumbling between timelines with that inefficient and ridiculous machine!
Lines.zh: 你们竟然还在用那低效而可笑的时光机在各个时空里漫无目的地乱撞。

Lines.en: Have you ever thought about trying new technologies?
Lines.zh: 难道没有想过尝试新的方法吗？

Lines.en: Our new time-traveling technology is nearly complete.
Lines.zh: 我们的新折跃技术可是已经接近完成了。

Lines.en:
See that? We've just done some tests on your lawn.
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
看到了吗？我刚在你的院子里做了一些小实验。
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: More statues!!!
Lines.zh: 更多的石像！！！

Lines.en: Is that the result of your trials?
Lines.zh: 这就是实验的成果吗？

Lines.en: These statues with Bronzes sealed in them seem different.
Lines.zh: 这些封印着铜人的石像似乎有些不同。

Lines.en: Get prepared for new types of Bronzes.
Lines.zh: 做好应对新铜人的准备。

Lines.en: Warning! Massive astronomical object detected!
Lines.zh: 警告，检测到大质量天体！

Lines.en: Better get off the planet before it gets torn apart!
Lines.zh: 我们要离开这个随时都会被撕碎的星球！

Lines.en: False alarm, User Dave. Gravitational fluctuations in this area affected my sensors.
Lines.zh: 误报警，用户戴夫，是附近出现的引力波动影响了我的判断。

Lines.en: Gravitational fluctuations?
Lines.zh: 引力波动？

Lines.en: The Power Lilies contain the similar type of energy to Taichi tiles.
Lines.zh: 能量花的体内蕴含着和太极地砖内相似的能量。

Lines.en: This energy can help us generate more Plant Foods.
Lines.zh: 这股能量可以为我们带来更多的叶绿素。

Lines.en: Did Power Lilies absorb energies from the tiles?
Lines.zh: 是能量花吸收了地砖里的能量？

Lines.en: Or did the energy in the tiles feed Power Lilies?
Lines.zh: 还是地砖里的能量来自能量花？

Lines.en: Heavenly Peaches heal injured plants. They emit spiritual energy and create protective shields.
Lines.zh: 仙桃会治愈受伤的植物，同时会散发出一些灵气。

Lines.en: Which can make plants temporarily invincible.
Lines.zh: 这可以让处在其中的植物在一段时间内免于受到来自僵尸的伤害。

Lines.en: We have attracted the attention of Monk zombies in Kongfu Temple.
Lines.zh: 我们已经引来了武林寺庙的武僧僵尸。

Lines.en: Compared to the Kongfu Zombies, they possess superior physical prowess and more refined combat skills.
Lines.zh: 他们相比于武斗僵尸有更强大的体魄，以及更为精湛的武艺。

Lines.en: I can't wait until witnessing a true Kungfu contest!
Lines.zh: 我已经等不及要来一场真正的功夫对决了！

Lines.en: Good weather today. Right, time travelers?
Lines.zh: 今天是个不错的日子，时间旅行者。

Lines.en: Perhaps now is a good time to hold a feast somewhere with a good scenery.
Lines.zh: 或许我们可以挑选一个景色秀丽的地方，举办一场宴会。

Lines.en: Perfect timing to introduce my new friend! He's a true hero who can drink a thousand cups without getting drunk!
Lines.zh: 正好借此机会认识一下我的新朋友，他可是一位千杯不醉的豪杰。

Lines.en:
Of course, no need to purposely look for a site! Your lawn is a perfect one!
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
哦，并没有刻意挑选场地的必要，你的院子就是一个绝佳的地点！
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: High-energy reaction detected!
Lines.zh: 检测到高能反应。

Lines.en: It appears our actions here have attracted a rather formidable opponent.
Lines.zh: 我们在这里的活动似乎引来了一个实力强劲的对手。

Lines.en: I heard fireworks! Has the feast begun?
Lines.zh: 我听到了鞭炮的声音，宴会开始了吗？

Lines.en: I don't think that was fireworks.
Lines.zh: 我想那并不是鞭炮的声音。

Lines.en: Better get ourselves covered.
Lines.zh: 我们最好找个掩体。

Lines.en: It's gone quiet. Is it all clear to come out of the bunker?
Lines.zh: 安静下来了，我可以从掩体里出来了吗？

Lines.en: We just beat the greatest enemy in Kongfu Temple.
Lines.zh: 我们刚刚打倒了寺庙最危险的敌人。

Lines.en: And what'bout our feast?!
Lines.zh: 那我们要举办宴会了吗！？

Lines.en: We must prepare for a stronger assault immediately.
Lines.zh: 我们需要赶快着手应对更猛烈的攻势。

Lines.en: And no time for a feast.
Lines.zh: 而且没有举办宴会的时间。

Lines.en: What a surprise that you managed to defeat that devil!
Lines.zh: 你们能打败那位豪杰真让我意外。

Lines.en: But this is not the end of our battle.
Lines.zh: 不过这场对决还远远没有结束。

Lines.en: We'll have our day sooner or later.
Lines.zh: 我们迟早让你满地找牙。

Lines.en: The Latest, and the last GIFT for you!
Lines.zh: 最新的也是最后的大礼！

Lines.en: It's composed from the Mega-Minds of two genius.
Lines.zh: 这份大礼融合了两位天才超越常人的智慧。

Lines.en:
I'd prepare another GIFT for you if you guys don't hate it enough this time.
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
如果这次的惊喜还不足以让你厌恶，我会准备另一项更惊人的礼品来补偿你的。
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: I thought he had a good memory! He clearly said it was the last one.
Lines.zh: 我还以为他记性很好呢，明明说了是最后一份。

Lines.en: Well, I suppose that's what one would get for time-traveling...
Lines.zh: 经常鼓捣时空可能就会这样……

Lines.en: And now I couldn't see the other side of the lawn.
Lines.zh: 现在我已经完全看不见对面了。

Lines.en: There're special energies rolling among those statues.
Lines.zh: 那堆石像内有特殊的能量流动。

Lines.en:
There is a 93.7% probability that Bronzes specializing in Qigong, is sealed within.
Margin of error: 1.3%.
Lines.zh:
有 93.7% 的概率封印着以气功见长的铜人
误差：1.3% 。

Lines.en: A GIFT for y'all, time travelers!
Lines.zh: 送你们份大礼，时间旅行者们！

Lines.en: These statues are really striking, aren't they?
Lines.zh: 这些石像很引人注目不是吗？

Lines.en: It took me and my new mate tremendous efforts to bring them here. Hope you'd like'em.
Lines.zh: 我和我的新盟友可是费了很大的力气才把它们运过来，希望你们喜欢。

Lines.en:
No, no, no. Hope you'd hate'em.
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
不不不，希望你们不会喜欢。
——僵尸博士

Lines.en: These are really tall statues. Who do they depict?
Lines.zh: 这些石像可真高啊，雕刻着的是谁呢？

Lines.en: According to my data, powerful Bronze warriors are sealed within these stone statues.
Lines.zh: 数据显示这些石像里封印着强大的铜人。

Lines.en: And what's more, these statues are highly unstable!
Lines.zh: 而且这些封印非常不稳定！

Lines.en: Resistant Radish are deep-rooted plants.
Lines.zh: 白萝卜的根系非常发达。

Lines.en: It makes them utterly un-movable facing any external force.
Lines.zh: 没有任何东西可以撼动他分毫。

Lines.en: Bamboo Shoots are skilled to dig beneath the zombies.
Lines.zh: 竹笋有一招在僵尸脚底穿梭的绝技。

Lines.en: It makes them ignored by most zombies.
Lines.zh: 这可以让他避开绝大部分僵尸的攻击。

Lines.en: No wonder these little guys keep themselves short.
Lines.zh: 怪不得他一直都不愿意长高。

Lines.en: I heard drums and gongs!
Lines.zh: 我听到了敲锣打鼓的声音！

Lines.en: That refers to a Kongfu Competition going on.
Lines.zh: 这意味着这里在举办武林大会。

Lines.en: I think I can get a high rank.
Lines.zh: 我觉得我可以过去获得一个名次。

Lines.en: You wouldn't be willing to participate in the zombies' Kongfu Competition.
Lines.zh: 你不会想参加僵尸的武林大会的。

Lines.en: There's only a three-meter-long chopping board left for us to sit on.
Lines.zh: 给我们留的座位只有一个三米长的砧板。

Lines.en: I could smell dynamite.
Lines.zh: 空气中弥漫着火药味。

Lines.en: Don't let the zombies trigger the barrels of dynamite.
Lines.zh: 不要让僵尸引爆火药桶。

Lines.en: That's not the scenario we want to see.
Lines.zh: 那不是我们想要看到的情况。

Lines.en: Also, is it true that Bloomerangs never miss a catch?
Lines.zh: 话说，听说回旋镖射手永远都能接住自己的回旋镖，这是真的吗？

Lines.en: I just saw A zombie flew-by, somehow...
Lines.zh: 我看见有个僵尸从眼前飞了过去，不知怎么地……

Lines.en: The rockets on Rocket Imps's back push them towards our defenses rapidly.
Lines.zh: 火箭小鬼背上的火箭赋予了他们快速冲向我们防线的能力。

Lines.en: These annoying Imps won't stop until they collide into something.
Lines.zh: 不撞到些什么这群烦人的家伙是不会停下来的。

Lines.en: They're going one way, like a taco to my belly!
Lines.zh: 看来他们并没有回头的打算。

Lines.en: There are heat and fire entrenched in Fire Gourds' stomachs.
Lines.zh: 火葫芦的腹腔内积蓄着一团火焰。

Lines.en: Seems that they're in high spirits right now!
Lines.zh: 这让他看起来情绪高涨。

Lines.en: Tap on Fire Gourds so that they will breathe out the fire.
Lines.zh: 点击火葫芦可以让他把这团火焰喷出来，

Lines.en: The further they charge, the farther they breathe.
Lines.zh: 积攒的时间越长，喷得越远。

Lines.en: Let's burn the zombies and all those wooden racks on the lawn down!
Lines.zh: 把僵尸和这些堆在草坪上的木架子一并烧成灰吧。

Lines.en: We have arrived in 17th-century of China. All the zombies here are equipped with unique skills.
Lines.zh: 我们来到了 17 世纪的中原，这里的僵尸个个都身怀绝技。

Lines.en: Can we find out the secrets of Fortune Cookies here?
Lines.zh: 我们能在这找到幸运饼干的秘密吗？

Lines.en: Fortune Cookies are not from China, User Dave...
Lines.zh: 中国并没有幸运饼干，用户戴夫……

Lines.en: Whoa! There's a weird pattern on the lawn!
Lines.zh: 看，地上有个奇怪的图案。

Lines.en: The data indicates that the Tai-Chi tile contains quantities of energy.
Lines.zh: 数据显示太极地砖内蕴藏着大量的能量。

Lines.en: Maybe our plants could bring that energy out with there roots!
Lines.zh: 或许我们的植物可以用他们的根将这些能量提取出来！

Lines.en: Myn olde foo, long yseyne.
Lines.zh: 吾之劲敌，久未晤矣。

Lines.en: Hast thou encounter'd the stronger strain of walking dead, the foul pestilence that doth wax in might?
Lines.zh: 汝遇之益强变种之尸乎？

Lines.en: Verily, these are useless trifles!
Lines.zh: 其皆不能者也！

Lines.en: But that which thou must face, shall here end thy foolish quest!
Lines.zh: 然汝等须见者，将终结尔之可笑行途于此！

Lines.en: We did it? Right, Penny?
Lines.zh: 潘妮，我们办到了吗？

Lines.en: Ideed. User Dave. Mission accomplished.
Lines.zh: 是的，用户戴夫，我们办到了。

Lines.en: Quest completed. It's time to travel through other timelines.
Lines.zh: 任务完成，我们是时候前往别的时间线了。

Lines.en: Tis time to shape a new counsail, by my troth!
Lines.zh: 是时行新计矣。

Lines.en: There'd be up to five chompers in total on your lawn and in the conveyor every moment.
Lines.zh: 场上和传送带里最多同时出现五株大嘴花。

Lines.en: Seems that terrible quantities of gravestones are rising.
Lines.zh: 我看到了更多的墓碑。

Lines.en: It is likely that we're going to confront stronger zombie variants soon.
Lines.zh: 根据推测，我们很快就会见到更强大的僵尸变种。

Lines.en: Including those buried under the gravestones...
Lines.zh: 也包括埋藏在墓碑之下的僵尸……

Lines.en: It might be a must to travel through other timelines and return when we obtain more plants.
Lines.zh: 我们可能有必要退回到其他时间线，等我们的队伍更加壮大时再回来。

Lines.en: You must have just witnessed my upgraded motor surfer zombies already.
Lines.zh: 你肯定已经见识过我升级后的摩托冲浪板了，

Lines.en: Now you're about to confront my even greater masterpiece: Zombot Sharktronic Sub 2.0!
Lines.zh: 现在你将见识到更加我更加强大的得意之作：巨鲨袭击者2.0

Lines.en: What a suffer.
Lines.zh: 真是一场恶仗。

Lines.en: Seems like this timeline has come to an end.
Lines.zh: 看来这条时间线已经不会有更多的节点了。

Lines.en: This can't have happened!
Lines.zh: 这不可能！

Lines.en: Guacodiles knock back zombies on contact.
Lines.zh: 鳄梨会击退接触到他的僵尸，

Lines.en: Now knock back zombies that are close to your house back into where they came from with Guacodiles!
Lines.zh: 用鳄梨让靠近房子的僵尸回到海里吧！

Lines.en: You heard that? Weird roars came from the far water.
Lines.zh: 听，海那边传来了奇怪的吼叫声。

Lines.en: Waves of zombies diving underwater detected.
Lines.zh: 侦测到成群的僵尸潜伏在水下，

Lines.en: It'd not be a good idea to play in the water here.
Lines.zh: 在这里玩水不会是个好主意，

Lines.en: Better go to other timelines 'til our plant alliance becomes stronger.
Lines.zh: 我们可能需要退回到其他时间线，等我们的队伍更加壮大时再回来。

Lines.en: Those peashooters are confused and are just going to be in the way.
Lines.zh: 这几株豌豆射手似乎没搞清楚自己在哪，他们会碍事的。

Lines.en: Use the shovel to dig them up and make room for useful plants!
Lines.zh: 用铲子把他们铲除，留下更多位置给有用的植物吧！

Lines.en: Hey neighbor!
Lines.zh: 你好，邻居！

Lines.en: Can I borrow that hot sauce?
Lines.zh: 我可以借一下你的那瓶辣椒酱吗？

Lines.en: I've been holding onto this taco for forever!
Lines.zh: 我还以为我要拿着这个玉米卷到宇宙重启呢！

Lines.en: Oh! That was...AMAZING!
Lines.zh: 哦哦哦！真是……太美味了！！

Lines.en: I want to eat THAT taco again! I need my TIME MACHINE!
Lines.zh: 我想再吃一次我的玉米卷！我需要我的时光机！

Lines.en: Her name is Penny and I'm Crazy Dave. But you can call me Crazy Dave.
Lines.zh: 她的名字是潘妮，我是疯狂戴夫。但是你可以叫我疯狂戴夫！

Lines.en: Finally, another User who can process my queries.
Lines.zh: 终于出现另一位能操纵我的程序的用户了。

Lines.en: Let me postulate, Dave wants to go back in time to eat his taco... again...
Lines.zh: 根据我的猜想，戴夫想回到过去再去吃一次他的……玉米卷……

Lines.en: She's so smart! Now let's go after my taco!
Lines.zh: 她真聪明！我们赶紧出发追溯到我的玉米卷吧！

Lines.en: Those plants look hungry.
Lines.zh: 我们的植物看上去很饿了。

Lines.en: If only there was something that you could feed them.
Lines.zh: 要是有什么东西喂给他们就好了。

Lines.en: Plant Food is packed with vitamins and minerals.
Lines.zh: 叶绿素富含维生素和矿物质。

Lines.en: It's an essential part of a complete breakfast.
Lines.zh: 是植物们早餐中最不可或缺的一道。

Lines.en: I wonder if Plant Food works on other types of plants?
Lines.zh: 我好奇叶绿素是否能对其他植物起作用。

Lines.en: Aww...you let your plant get eaten! Try again!
Lines.zh: 嗷……你怎么能让你的植物被吃掉呢？再试试吧！

Lines.en: I love the smell of coconut cannons in the morning!
Lines.zh: 我喜欢一大早就闻到椰子加农炮味道的感觉！

Lines.en: Smells like... well, coconuts.
Lines.zh: 闻起来就像……好吧，就是椰子味道。

Lines.en: It appears the zombies have been gathered in that corral.
Lines.zh: 看上去僵尸被聚集到了栅栏外。

Lines.en: A not O.K. Corral!
Lines.zh: 可是有个栅栏出故障了！

Lines.en: Better plant something before they get loose.
Lines.zh: 最好在他们钻进来之前种些植物。

Lines.en: Oh good. There are no zombies here.
Lines.zh: 太好了，现场一个僵尸都没有。

Lines.en: False. They're using camouflage.
Lines.zh: 不对，他们用骆驼迷彩伪装起来了。

Lines.en: You mean they're usin... camel-flage.
Lines.zh: 你是说这是……彩色骆驼迷阵。

Lines.en: Tap 'Find More' to see where you can find more seed packets for each plant.
Lines.zh: 点击“寻找更多”去预览在哪里可以找到各种植物的种子包。

Lines.en: You've got a new plant!
Lines.zh: 你刚刚得到了一株新植物！

Lines.en: But are you familiar with the usage of your new plant?
Lines.zh: 但是你熟悉这株植物的使用吗？

Lines.en: That's what the almanac is for!
Lines.zh: 这就是图鉴发挥作用的时刻！

Lines.en: Click on that icon and let's find out.
Lines.zh: 点击那个图标，让我们一探究竟。

Lines.en: You know what would be helpful?
Lines.zh: 你知道最有用的是什么吗？

Lines.en: A place where you can read about plants and zombies.
Lines.zh: 一个能让你了解植物和僵尸的地方。

Lines.en: You mean like the interactive Almanac?
Lines.zh: 你是指这种能互动的图鉴吗？

Lines.en: Nah, that would never work.
Lines.zh: 不不不，这东西一般没什么用。

Lines.en: Take those seed packets you won and upgrade your Peashooter!
Lines.zh: 拿着这些种子包去升级你的豌豆射手！

Lines.en: User Dave. Please note the line of Banana Launchers.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，请注意那一列香蕉火箭炮阵线。

Lines.en: They appear to need our protection!
Lines.zh: 看上去他们需要我们的保护！

Lines.en: Let's get to it! After all, bananas are a very a-PEELING fruit!
Lines.zh: 让我们开始吧！依我看，香蕉会把僵尸的皮剥下来！

Lines.en: User Dave, if I had a head, I would be shaking it right now.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，假如我有头的话，我一定会对你摇头的。

Lines.en: My research indicates that the sport of bowling experienced a heyday during this era.
Lines.zh: 根据我的调查，保龄球运动在现在是火热的运动。

Lines.en: Are you thinking what I'm thinking, Penny?
Lines.zh: 你和我想得一样吗，潘妮？

Lines.en: I find your thought process indecipherable, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我发现你的思维过程令人难以解读。

Lines.en: I was thinking that Bowling Bulbs would make excellent allies here.
Lines.zh: 我在想，保龄泡泡会成为我们绝佳的帮手。

Lines.en: Huh. I was thinking how much I love wearing bowling shoes.
Lines.zh: 喝，我想的是我终于能穿上保龄球鞋了。

Lines.en: So many colors ... right there on my feet!
Lines.zh: 五彩斑斓……印在我的脚上！

Lines.en: When fighting zombies from the deep...
Lines.zh: 当我们对抗僵尸时，尤其是那些来自深……

Lines.en: ...we need a plant with the appetite of a shark.
Lines.zh: ……我们会需要一个胃口和鲨鱼一样好的植物。

Lines.en: I catch your drift, Penny. You're talking about Chomper!
Lines.zh: 我懂你意思，潘妮。你指的是大嘴花吧！

Lines.en: Indeed. His sharp teeth could turn the tide of battle.
Lines.zh: 正确。他锋利的牙齿能扭转战局。

Lines.en: Hey, I have an idea too! We could call this Chomper Week!
Lines.zh: 嘿，我也有个好主意！我们可以把这周称为大嘴周！

Lines.en: If we must, User Dave. If we must.
Lines.zh: 如果有必要的话，用户戴夫。有必要的话。

Lines.en: Look at this beeeeautiful beach!
Lines.zh: 看看这美丽的沙滩！

Lines.en: It's got everything a growing plant needs!
Lines.zh: 这里有我们正在长身体的植物们需要的一切！

Lines.en: Sun, sand and lots o' water!
Lines.zh: 阳光，沙子，还有用不完的水！

Lines.en: Caution, User Dave. My sensors indicate there are zombies on your beach...
Lines.zh: 注意，用户戴夫。我的传感器检测到沙滩上有僵尸……

Lines.en: ... and far too much water. It will overwhelm the plants.
Lines.zh: ……还有太多的水。这会把植物淹坏的。

Lines.en: No problem-o! We'll just lay down some Lily Pads.
Lines.zh: 没啥大碍！我们只需要种下一些莲叶。

Lines.en: Then the other plants can ride the waves!
Lines.zh: 其他的植物就能玩冲浪了！

Lines.en: Or as the vernacular of this era goes: They can "hang ten".
Lines.zh: 或者用这个时代的俗语来说：他们可以“挂十”。

Lines.en: Right on, Penny. Right on!
Lines.zh: 说得对，潘妮！完全正确！

Lines.en: Listen up, dudes! I'm here to totally bum you out.
Lines.zh: 听好了，小子们！我来扫你们的兴了。

Lines.en: Way down deep, there's a certain creep...
Lines.zh: 在海洋深处，有个巨怪居住……

Lines.en: When he swims up, your brains he'll keep!
Lines.zh: 当它在沙滩冒出，你的大脑将不在原处！

Lines.en: Later losers! Doc Zomboss
Lines.zh: 待会见了，乡巴佬们！——僵尸博士

Lines.en: That dude is totally gnarly.
Lines.zh: 那家伙真是酷毙了。

Lines.en: He is also quite unpleasant, User Dave. Quite unpleasant.
Lines.zh: 他也会真的把我们毙了的，用户戴夫。是真的毙了。

Lines.en: Dudes, like, you're totally in for it now!
Lines.zh: 兄弟，你真的上道了嘛！

Lines.en: The Deep Sea Gargantuars have their slimy sights on you.
Lines.zh: 你进入了深海巨尸黏滑的视线。

Lines.en: You can run! You can swim!
Lines.zh: 你可以逃！也可以潜！

Lines.en: But you can't escape their scaly grip!
Lines.zh: 但你无法躲开它们的鳞片。

Lines.en: Ugh. That dude is totally gnarly.
Lines.zh: 那家伙真是酷毙了。

Lines.en: He is also quite unpleasant, User Dave. Quite unpleasant.
Lines.zh: 他也会真的把我们毙了的，用户戴夫。是真的毙了。

Lines.en: I tell ya, Penny, these surf-loving zombies are the pits!
Lines.zh: 跟你说啊潘妮，这些冲浪僵尸真是糟透了！

Lines.en: Analyzing the phrase: "The pits" ...
Lines.zh: 正在分析未知词汇：“糟透了”……

Lines.en: Hmmm. Pits. Very interesting. User Dave! You are a genius!
Lines.zh: 嗯。糟透了。非常有趣。用户戴夫！你是个天才！

Lines.en: I am?
Lines.zh: 我是吗？

Lines.en: No. No you are not. However, you have given me an idea.
Lines.zh: 不。你不是。但是你启发了我。

Lines.en: Guacodile! This plant fights zombies with pit-like projectiles.
Lines.zh: 鳄梨！这株植物用口水弹攻击僵尸。

Lines.en: And he employs a powerful bite as well.
Lines.zh: 他还能释放有力的咬合攻击。

Lines.en: Plant him on the front lines. You'll see.
Lines.zh: 把他种在前线，你就会见识到了。

Lines.en: Whew! Fighting zombies that arrive in waves AND tides isn't easy.
Lines.zh: 呼！打败那些乘着浪来的僵尸真是劳累。

Lines.en: You know what we need, Penny? An ally with a lot of 'tude!
Lines.zh: 你知道我们现在最需要什么吗，潘妮？我们需要一株全能的植物！

Lines.en: And by 'tude, I mean attitude. In case you need translation.
Lines.zh: 说到全能，我指的是全场都能打。免得你又需要翻译。

Lines.en: Then I suggest we call upon Homing Thistle.
Lines.zh: 那我推荐导向蓟上场。

Lines.en: I believe he has this 'tude you speak of.
Lines.zh: 我确信这就是你想要的全场都能打。

Lines.en: His eyes! Intense! He can shoot the zombies a real mean look.
Lines.zh: 他的眼神！太犀利了！简直能用眼神狠狠射杀僵尸。

Lines.en: More importantly, he can shoot deadly darts that home in on their target.
Lines.zh: 更重要的是，他能发射致命的子弹，死死朝着最靠近我们的家的僵尸。

Lines.en: Two painful blows for the price of one! Radical!
Lines.zh: 一击双痛，买一送二！太厉害了！

Lines.en: User Dave, data suggests that we should beware the tides.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，数据显示我们需要注意沙滩上的海水。

Lines.en: When the tide comes in, it'll be a WIPE OUT for our plant friends?
Lines.zh: 你是指当海浪涨起的时候，我们的植物会被淹死吗？

Lines.en: Indeed. But the tide line indicates how high the water will rise. Plan accordingly.
Lines.zh: 正确的。但是海岸线会告诉我们海浪最多能涨到哪里。你可以依此做好计划。

Lines.en: The tide comes in, the tide goes out. Who can explain it?
Lines.zh: 海水又能前进又能后退，这怎么解释得通？

Lines.en: That would be science, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 交给科学吧，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Yo beach bums! Don't flip your lid.
Lines.zh: 嘿，沙滩哥们儿！淡定点儿。

Lines.en: But have you noticed that Chomper and Bikini Zombie have been ultra cozy lately?
Lines.zh: 但你发现了吗？大嘴花和比基尼僵尸最近简直亲密过头了。

Lines.en: Could a beachside plant-zombie romance be in bloom?
Lines.zh: 所以……这段海滨植物与僵尸的浪漫史是否已经处于萌芽阶段？

Lines.en: Speaking of which, how sure are you of Chomper's loyalties?
Lines.zh: 说到这个，你对大嘴花的忠诚度有多大把握？

Lines.en: I can't help but notice ... that plant has the appetite of a zombie.
Lines.zh: 我不禁注意到……那株植物的食量和僵尸一样惊人。

Lines.en:
Chew on that land lovers! Later dudes!
Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh:
陆地上的家伙们，好好琢磨一下吧！回头见了，各位！
僵尸博士

Lines.en: A plant-zombie romance? Penny ... my mind is BLOWN!
Lines.zh: 植物和僵尸的浪漫？潘妮……我震惊到世界观崩塌了！

Lines.en: User Dave, do not jump to conclusions. I suggest something more productive.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，请不要妄下结论。我建议做些更有建设性的事。

Lines.en: Let us jump into the action!
Lines.zh: 接下来就让我们实践吧！

Lines.en: Alert! I've detected a strange statue of surfing-era significance.
Lines.zh: 警报！检测到一个具有冲浪时代意义的奇怪雕像！

Lines.en: Well lookie there! It's a tiki statue. With crazy eyes.
Lines.zh: 快看这个！是个提基石像，眼睛长得超疯狂。

Lines.en: Analysis indicates this tiki could inflict a terrifying challenge upon any who follow it.
Lines.zh: 分析表明，这座提基神像可能会给任何追随者带来可怕的挑战。

Lines.en: So you're saying that a tiki torture awaits? Get it? A tiki TORCH-er?
Lines.zh: 所以你是说“提基酷刑”在等着我们？懂了吗？提基“酷”刑？

Lines.en:
User Dave, I must say, your pun is...
TORCH-er-ous.
Lines.zh:
用户戴夫，我必须说，你的双关让我的处理器……
“酷”热难耐。

Lines.en: A plant-zombie romance? That's just craaaazy!
Lines.zh: 植物和僵尸的浪漫？这也太——疯狂了吧！

Lines.en: And I know a thing or two about craaaazy!
Lines.zh: 我还知道一两个——疯狂的事情！

Lines.en: I concur. I suspect Dr. Zomboss was attempting to sow seeds of discontent.
Lines.zh: 我同意。我怀疑僵尸博士只是在煽风点火。

Lines.en: From now on, we are the only ones sowing seeds around here!
Lines.zh: 从今以后，这里只有我们能“播种”！

Lines.en: Totally bogus! Little do you know what I have in store for you!
Lines.zh: 简直胡扯！你们根本不知道我为你们准备了什么“惊喜”！

Lines.en: The seeds of destruction have been planted! Brace yourselves for a wipe out!
Lines.zh: 毁灭的种子已经播下！准备迎接彻底溃败吧！

Lines.en: But for now, I gotta split. Catch you dweebs later!
Lines.zh: 但是现在我得撤了，回头再找你们这些书呆子算账！

Lines.en: Look! It must be time to play Beach Zombie Bungo!
Lines.zh: 看！是时候玩玩沙滩邦果游戏了！

Lines.en: Bingo, User Dave. It's BINGO.
Lines.zh: 宾果，用户戴夫，是宾果游戏。

Lines.en: You already won, Penny? Wow. You're good at this!
Lines.zh: 你已经赢了？潘妮你可真擅长这个！

Lines.en: I am picking up a grid of plants, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我正在接收一个植物方阵的布局数据，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: My scans suggest that they can be swapped to create matches of three.
Lines.zh: 我的扫描结果显示，这些植物可以通过交换位置形成三连匹配。

Lines.en: I saw a game like that once on my telephoney!
Lines.zh: 我好像以前在我的小手机上见过类似的游戏！

Lines.en: You can use sun to upgrade the plants.
Lines.zh: 你可以用阳光能量来升级植物。

Lines.en: Make 100 matches to defeat the zombies!
Lines.zh: 完成 100 次匹配即可击败僵尸！

Lines.en: I found some spare change.
Lines.zh: 我发掘出了一些零钱。

Lines.en: Penny, you're finally makin' sense!
Lines.zh: 潘妮，你终于起到大作用了！

Lines.en: Here neighbor, have some moola! Why? Because I'm CRAAAZY!
Lines.zh: 来吧邻居，送给你了！你问为什么？因为我疯了！！

Lines.en: If you want to use a Power Up, you can buy one with coins!
Lines.zh: 如果想使用道具，可以用金币购买哦！

Lines.en: Just tap on that doohickey down there and you're in business!
Lines.zh: 只要点下面那个小玩意儿，就搞定啦！

Lines.en: Uh-oh, the road is forked. What do we do?!
Lines.zh: 呃哦，道路分叉了，我们该怎么做？

Lines.en: Those are where you flex your brains with new plants and upgrades.
Lines.zh: 这里是你大展脑力的地方，新植物，新升级，统统上阵！

Lines.en: I've named them Brain Busters.
Lines.zh: 我管它们叫烧脑关。

Lines.en: Brain busting? Very dangerous. You go first.
Lines.zh: 烧脑？那太危险了，你先上吧。

Lines.en: It's high noon, and waves of zombies about.
Lines.zh: 正午了，僵尸们如潮水般涌来。

Lines.en: Time to show them who's got the fastest plants in time!
Lines.zh: 该让他们见识一下谁才是植物界里的快枪手了！

Lines.en: I could really go for a tub of fried chicken right now.
Lines.zh: 我现在真想抱着一桶炸鸡吃个痛快。

Lines.en: Well, they've let loose the birds of war, so you're in luck.
Lines.zh: 哈，他们已经放出了战鸡，你有口福了。

Lines.en: Nice job, Sheriff User Time Traveler.
Lines.zh: 干得漂亮，时空旅行者警长。

Lines.en: You've survived a lot of bull.
Lines.zh: 你已经活过了大混乱。

Lines.en: Put on your bloomers and charge your reeds.
Lines.zh: 穿上你的牛仔灯笼裤，给芦苇充好电。

Lines.en: This is a showdown!
Lines.zh: 这是场决斗！

Lines.en: That is a lot of mine carts.
Lines.zh: 这里的矿车真多啊。

Lines.en: They're multiplying!
Lines.zh: 它们还在变多！

Lines.en: I didn't know mine carts could do math!
Lines.zh: 我都不知道矿车还会做数学题！

Lines.en: My great grandpappy was a lawman around these parts.
Lines.zh: 我的曾祖父以前就在这一块当警长。

Lines.en: Is that him over there?
Lines.zh: 那边那个难道是他？

Lines.en: Where?
Lines.zh: 哪儿？

Lines.en: Made you look.
Lines.zh: 骗你看的。

Lines.en: They're coming 'round the mountain for your brains!
Lines.zh: 他们绕山过来了，目标就是你的脑壳！

Lines.en: Oh no, he's singing again.
Lines.zh: 哦，糟了，他又唱起来了。

Lines.en: I can't believe there were so many chickens.
Lines.zh: 我简直不敢相信这里会有这么多鸡。

Lines.en: I cry fowl!
Lines.zh: 我抗议鸡！

Lines.en: This will be remembered as the Great Chickening of 1850.
Lines.zh: 这将被历史铭记为1850年的大鸡荒。

Lines.en: What's that sound in the distance?
Lines.zh: 远处是什么动静？

Lines.en: That is the sound of inevitability.
Lines.zh: 那是必然的声音。

Lines.en: It sounds like a stampede of pianos!
Lines.zh: 这听起来像是一群钢琴在狂奔！

Lines.en: Nice work.
Lines.zh: 干得不错。

Lines.en: You've got the fastest fingers in the West.
Lines.zh: 你真是西部最快的快枪手了。

Lines.en: Now let's make tracks!
Lines.zh: 现在，让我们铺轨出发吧！

Lines.en: Like cow tipping, zombie tipping is best done from the side.
Lines.zh: 就像推倒奶牛一样，推倒僵尸也建议从侧方下手。

Lines.en: Trust me, do not try and tip a cow from behind!
Lines.zh: 相信我，千万别从尝试从后面推倒一头奶牛！

Lines.en: User Dave, it's time to saddle up and leave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，该备鞍上路了。

Lines.en: There's a sunset. Let's ride!
Lines.zh: 前方落日，正是骑行之时！

Lines.en: Where do you think the future will take us?
Lines.zh: 你觉得未来会把我们引向何方？

Lines.en: The Future you say?
Lines.zh: 未来？你是说未来？

Lines.en: We should take another look at my Time-Space Taco Map.
Lines.zh: 我们该再看一眼我的时空玉米卷地图了。

Lines.en: User Dave, it's time to saddle up and leave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，该备鞍上路了。

Lines.en: There's a sunset. Let's ride!
Lines.zh: 前方落日，正是骑行之时！

Lines.en: Where do you think the future will take us?
Lines.zh: 你觉得未来会把我们引向何方？

Lines.en: What has happened to the taco?
Lines.zh: 卷饼出什么事了？

Lines.en: Why are cats hairy?
Lines.zh: 猫为什么有这么多毛？

Lines.en: Just remember. Tomorrow is always a taco...
Lines.zh: 只要记住，明天，永远是一个玉米卷……

Lines.en: And a taco is what we find inside of all of us.
Lines.zh: 而我们都会发现，玉米卷其实就藏在我们每个人的内心。

Lines.en: That looks like it could be all futurey.
Lines.zh: 这看起来也太未来了。

Lines.en: I bet Future Dave has solved our taco paradox.
Lines.zh: 我打赌未来的戴夫一定已经解决了我们的玉米卷悖论。

Lines.en: I'm detecting a rush of tachyon particles.
Lines.zh: 侦测到超光速粒子流！

Lines.en: Maybe Future Penny is trying to make contact.
Lines.zh: 也许是未来的潘妮正试图联系我们。

Lines.en: Greetings temporal commuters.
Lines.zh: 向你们致意，时空旅行者们。

Lines.en: The Future will be requesting your presence.
Lines.zh: 未来将会召见你。

Lines.en: But be aware...
Lines.zh: 但请注意……

Lines.en: Upon entry, legal possession of your brains...
Lines.zh: 一旦进入，你的大脑的合法归属……

Lines.en: Will be transferred to one Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: ……就将被转移到给僵尸博士埃德加的名下。

Lines.en: Sincerely, Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 真诚的，僵尸博士埃德加。

Lines.en: Greetings temporal commuters.
Lines.zh: 向你们致意，时空旅行者们。

Lines.en: That Mr. Boss guy seems like a really nice fellow!
Lines.zh: 那个博士看起来人好像还不错呢！

Lines.en: We should be wary of that one User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们应该对他保持警惕，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: In the meantime...
Lines.zh: 与此同时……

Lines.en: Earning Stars will prepare you for Star Gates we find later!
Lines.zh: 积累星星将为日后发现的星之门做好准备！

Lines.en: Also, Endless Zones will keep you sharp for future trials.
Lines.zh: 当然，无尽模式也将磨砺你，让你为未来的挑战做好准备。

Lines.en: Just remember. Tomorrow is always a taco...
Lines.zh: 只要记住，明天，永远是一个玉米卷……

Lines.en: And a taco is what we find inside of all of us.
Lines.zh: 而我们都会发现，玉米卷其实就藏在我们每个人的内心。

Lines.en: It's a cattle drive...
Lines.zh: 就像是在赶牛一样……

Lines.en: With plants...
Lines.zh: 只不过是用植物……

Lines.en: And zombies!
Lines.zh: 来赶僵尸！

Lines.en: Let's get these plants to the watering hole.
Lines.zh: 动作快！赶紧让这些植物都喝上水！

Lines.en: It appears brains are outlawed around here.
Lines.zh: 看样子，在这儿携带大脑是违法的。

Lines.en: Quick, neighbor. Play dumb.
Lines.zh: 快点，邻居，我们快装傻。

Lines.en: We'll follow your lead, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们将会听从你的指示，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Oh no, zombies ate your brains!
Lines.zh: 噢，不，僵尸吃掉了你的脑子！

Lines.en: Good thing you got two more!
Lines.zh: 幸好你还有两个备用的！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to The Tiki Torch-er!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到提基火炬手！

Lines.en: But beware! Zombies are selling seashells by this seashore!
Lines.zh: 但是小心！僵尸正在海边卖海螺！

Lines.en: And they insist you pay in brains!
Lines.zh: 并且他们只接受用脑子支付！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to the Big Bad Butte!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到罪恶孤岭！

Lines.en: And by big I mean crawling with zombies...
Lines.zh: 不过这个罪恶是指爬满了僵尸的那种罪恶……

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to Arthur's Challenge!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到亚瑟的挑战！

Lines.en: Here you'll find that day is night and knights are zombies!
Lines.zh: 在这里，你会发现白天和黑夜一样黑，而骑士和僵尸一样呆！

Lines.en: Howdy, neighbor! Welcome to La Brainsa Tarpits!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到脑焦油坑！

Lines.en: I hope you're ready for a reptilian rumble!
Lines.zh: 希望你准备好了迎接一场爬行类的乱斗！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to the Pyramid of Doom!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到末日金字塔！

Lines.en: It's just like a regular pyramid, but... you know... doomier.
Lines.zh: 它看着也就是个普通的金字塔，不过……更加末日一点。

Lines.en: Howdy, neighbor! Welcome to the GREATEST HITS!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到劲爆节拍！

Lines.en: I hope you're ready for a righteously up-tempo experience!
Lines.zh: 我希望你已经准备好迎接一场超带感的高速体验！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to the Terror from Tomorrow!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到明日动乱！

Lines.en: Making tomorrow's terror something terrible for today!
Lines.zh: 让明日的动乱今天就到来吧！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to the Icebound Battleground!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到冰封沙场！

Lines.en: This place is cold as, uh, ICE ... not to mention chock full o' zombies.
Lines.zh: 这地方冷得，呃，跟冰一样，更别提还塞满了僵尸。

Lines.en: Best bring some hot zombie-fightin' moves. And maybe a nice warm coat too.
Lines.zh: 你最好带点打僵尸的热辣植物来，最好也带件暖和的外套。

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to the Temple of Bloom!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到花开庙宇！

Lines.en: Here you'll find that gold is good but brings out more zombies!
Lines.zh: 在这儿，金子虽好，可招来的僵尸也更多！

Lines.en: Howdy, neighbor! Welcome to Highway to the Danger Room!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到登峰造极！

Lines.en: Hi neighbor! Welcome to Dead Man's Booty!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！欢迎来到死人的遗产！

Lines.en: I'd plunder that.
Lines.zh: 我得把这玩意抢到手。

Lines.en: Nice pick, let's see how far you can get!
Lines.zh: 选的不错，看看你能走多远！

Lines.en: Great work neighbor!
Lines.zh: 干得好，邻居！

Lines.en: Your Plant Food carries over to the next level!
Lines.zh: 你的叶绿素会保留到下一关！

Lines.en: Now it's time to pick another plant!
Lines.zh: 现在该选另一株植物了！

Lines.en: The Endless Zones are harder than usual!
Lines.zh: 无尽模式比普通关卡更难！

Lines.en: Power Ups and Plant Food can only be purchased once per level.
Lines.zh: 道具和叶绿素每关只能购买一次。

Lines.en: Good luck!
Lines.zh: 祝你好运！

Lines.en: Great work neighbor!
Lines.zh: 干得好，邻居！

Lines.en: In the Endless Zones, your lawn mowers carry over to the next level!
Lines.zh: 在无尽模式里面，你的小推车将会被带到下一关。

Lines.en: Your Plant Food carries over to the next level as well!
Lines.zh: 你的叶绿素也会被带到下一关。

Lines.en: Now it's time to pick another plant!
Lines.zh: 现在该选另一株植物了！

Lines.en: These are your starting plants!
Lines.zh: 这些是你的初始植物。

Lines.en: Now you get to pick one more.
Lines.zh: 现在你可以再选一株。

Lines.en: According to my data, iron and other metals were routinely put to use during the Dark Ages.
Lines.zh: 我的数据表明，铁等金属在中世纪黑暗时期已被投入例行使用。

Lines.en: Thus, Magnet-shroom should make an excellent ally here.
Lines.zh: 因此，磁力菇在这会成为一个好伙伴。

Lines.en: He can pull buckets, helmets and other metal objects off of zombies!
Lines.zh: 他可以吸走僵尸身上的铁桶，头盔和其他金属物品！

Lines.en: Some people think it's magic. But really, it's just physics.
Lines.zh: 有些人认为这是魔法，但其实，这只是物理。

Lines.en: A question for you, my Ignoble Foes!
Lines.zh: 有个问题要问你们，我卑劣的敌人们！

Lines.en: Hast thou noted how violent thine plants become upon consuming Plant Food?
Lines.zh: 阁下可曾注意，你们的植物在享用叶绿素后变得多么暴力？

Lines.en: Perchance, hast thou wondered what Plant Food is truly made of?
Lines.zh: 不知，阁下可曾思索过，那叶绿素究竟是何物制成？

Lines.en: Verily, I shall tell thee. It's zombies! Plant food is made out of zombies!
Lines.zh: 诚然，我当告知阁下。是僵尸！叶绿素是僵尸制成的！

Lines.en: Unpossible! We feed our plants only the highest quality organic uhm...
Lines.zh: 不可能！我们的植物只吃最顶级的有机……呃……

Lines.en: Hey Penny, what is Plant Food made of?
Lines.zh: 嘿！潘妮，叶绿素是什么做的？

Lines.en: I fear the true nature of Plant Food requires further analysis, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我认为叶绿素的本质恐怕还需要进一步分析。

Lines.en: Excuse me while I run some tests.
Lines.zh: 失陪一下，我需要去做一些测试。

Lines.en: I have found no evidence that Plant Food contains zombies or zombie byproducts.
Lines.zh: 我没有找到任何叶绿素包含僵尸或其衍生物的证据。

Lines.en: Phew! Plants shouldn't eat zombies who eat plants.
Lines.zh: 幸好！植物不该吃那些会吃植物的僵尸。

Lines.en: Except Chomper. He has to. Dude needs the fiber.
Lines.zh: 除了大嘴花，它得吃。它得摄入一些纤维。

Lines.en: Why dost thine time-traveling jalopy lie to thee?
Lines.zh: 那台能穿梭时光的破车，为什么欺骗阁下？

Lines.en: Perchance, a question best left for another day?
Lines.zh: 要不，这个问题暂且留待他日？

Lines.en: Now, I pray, imagine maniacal laughter as I depart.
Lines.zh: 此刻，我请您在脑海中想象我离去时发出的猖狂笑声。

Lines.en: User Dave, we have encountered a scroll.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我们发现了一卷卷轴。

Lines.en: I love side-scrollers! They're my second favorite kind of game.
Lines.zh: 我最爱横板卷轴式闯关游戏了！它们是我第二喜欢的游戏。

Lines.en: This is not a game. It's a piece of parchment bearing a message.
Lines.zh: 这不是游戏，这是一张载有信息的羊皮纸。

Lines.en: Will ya look at that! It's Dark Ages email. Neat-o!
Lines.zh: 瞧瞧！是黑暗时代的电子邮件啊，太酷了！

Lines.en: Alert, User Dave. My sensors indicate we have moved 153,954,765 years into the past.
Lines.zh: 警告，用户戴夫。我的传感器显示，我们已回到了153,954,765年之前。

Lines.en: Yabbers! That's before I was even born!
Lines.zh: 天哪！那会儿我还没出生呢！

Lines.en: Correct. We seem to have landed in some form of Jurassic Marsh.
Lines.zh: 正确。看来我们掉进了某个侏罗纪沼泽之中。

Lines.en: I knew I smelled more oxygen!
Lines.zh: 难怪我闻到了更多氧气！

Lines.en: Look, Penny! A fresh star-hunky!
Lines.zh: 快看，潘妮！一个新鲜的大星星！

Lines.en: A meteorite. Curious. My records indicate this should be... bigger.
Lines.zh: 一颗陨石。有点意思。我的记录显示，它本应……更大一些。

Lines.en: Bigger? Like, super burrito-sized?
Lines.zh: 更大？像是超级玉米卷那么大吗？

Lines.en: More like super Seattle-sized. I hope history has not gone awry...
Lines.zh: 得有一座西雅图城那么大吧。我希望历史没有出错……

Lines.en: Surrender your brains forthwith, inane time stumblers!
Lines.zh: 愚钝的时空绊倒者，速速将大脑交出来！

Lines.en: Else you shall share the fate of these terrible thunder lizards: EXTINCTION!
Lines.zh: 否则你们就会和这些可怕的雷龙一样：灭绝！！

Lines.en: But I don't want to get extincted!
Lines.zh: 可我不想灭绝！

Lines.en: ...sigh...
What troubles you, User Dave?
Lines.zh: 是什么在困扰你，用户戴夫？

Lines.en: I just always wanted a primitive sunflower who gave big suns!
Lines.zh: 我只想要一个会生产大阳光的，原始的向日葵！

Lines.en: Prepare for satisfaction, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 请准备获得满足，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: This epoch is known for its unusual lifeforms, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，这个纪元以其不寻常的生命形式而闻名。

Lines.en: I know! Gymnosperms, right?
Lines.zh: 我懂了！裸子植物，对不对？

Lines.en: I was thinking more in terms of saurians, User Dave. Dinosaurs.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我更多是在指蜥形纲动物。恐龙。

Lines.en: They won't attack us directly and we can't affect them.
Lines.zh: 它们不会直接攻击我们，我们也没办法干涉它们。

Lines.en: However, they will definitely react to zombies. Be wary!
Lines.zh: 但是，它们肯定会对僵尸有所反应。多加小心！

Lines.en: Beware the Jurassic Bully zombies, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 小心侏罗纪野人僵尸，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: They are immune to the Primal Peashooter's knockback effect.
Lines.zh: 它们免疫原始豌豆射手的击退效果。

Lines.en: Zuh? But how? Even Gargantuars get knocked back!
Lines.zh: 啥？可是怎么可能？就连巨尸都会被击退！

Lines.en: True, User Dave. The Bully is simply too stupid to observe typical physics.
Lines.zh: 正确，用户戴夫。野人的智力水平不足以支撑其遵循经典物理学原理。

Lines.en: I detect Primal Potato Mines nearby, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我侦测到原始土豆地雷就在附近，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Their prepaleolithic potency will far exceed our more refined modern versions.
Lines.zh: 他们旧石器时代前的威力将远超我们更为精致的现代版本。

Lines.en: BASHED potatoes? I love them already!
Lines.zh: 暴揍土豆？光听名字我就爱上了！

Lines.en: Hey! The past is still just when we left it!
Lines.zh: 嘿！过去的一切都原封未动呢！

Lines.en: True, with differences. More Jurassic zombies have appeared, with amplified abilities.
Lines.zh: 确实如此，但仍存在差异。更多具有强化能力的侏罗纪僵尸出现了。

Lines.en: Our plants may need to practiseing to provide sufficient protection.
Lines.zh: 我们的植物可能需要锻炼来提供足够的保护。

Lines.en: Ow-yowsers! Our lawnmowers have gone extinct!
Lines.zh: 哎呀糟糕！我们的小推车都灭绝了！

Lines.en: Time fluxes interfere with mowing technology, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 时间流干扰了割草技术，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We must plant with additional care lest we be overrun.
Lines.zh: 我们必须更加小心地种植植物，否则我们将被彻底淹没。

Lines.en: Bah! Your infernal interference enrages me! Bah!
Lines.zh: 哼！你这该死的干扰真让我火大！呸！

Lines.en: The Zombot Dinotronic Mechasaur, 2nd Edition, shall end your travels permanently!
Lines.zh: 僵尸恐龙电子机械兽，第二代，将会永久终结你的旅程！

Lines.en: Bah!
Lines.zh: 哼！

Lines.en: We did it! Thanks, occasionally helpful dinosaurs!
Lines.zh: 我们成功了！多谢，偶尔也能派上用场的恐龙们！

Lines.en: Our advanceed plants proved invaluable as well, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，跨时空的植物的价值也在刚才得到了充分体现。

Lines.en: Arrg! How could a robot dinosaur fail? MY PLAN WAS FOOLPROOF.
Lines.zh: 嗷！岂有此理！机器人恐龙怎么也会失手？我的计划本是天衣无缝的！

Lines.en: I can feel the ground a-trembling, Penny! More dinos?
Lines.zh: 我感觉地面都在颤动，潘妮！更多恐龙要来了？

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave. A herd of stegosaurs approaches.
Lines.zh: 确实，用户戴夫。一群剑龙正在接近。

Lines.en: My sensors indicate they will snare zombies with their tail, and then flick them off.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器显示，它们将用尾部缠绕僵尸，随后将其弹射出去。

Lines.en: That's what I would do!
Lines.zh: 我也会这么做！

Lines.en: I have analyzed a new plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我已经分析了一株新植物，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: The Perfume-shroom charms dinosaurs and turns them against the zombies.
Lines.zh: 香水菇能魅惑恐龙，让它们调头去攻击僵尸。

Lines.en: Dino-sour power? On OUR side? This is taco-level great news!
Lines.zh: 恐龙之力？为我们所用？这真是个玉米卷级的好消息！

Lines.en: Penny! I just remembered how much I love silent letters!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！我刚刚想起来我有多喜欢单词里不发音的字母！

Lines.en: Coincidentally, User Dave, a flock of Pterodactyls is approaching.
Lines.zh: 说来也巧，用户戴夫，一群翼龙正在向我们接近。

Lines.en: Pterodactyls? That's ptotally pterrific!
Lines.zh: 翼龙？那真是龙重欢迎！

Lines.en: My infuriation is epochal!
Lines.zh: 我的怒火已经超越次元了！

Lines.en: Is there nowhen I may go to avoid your imbecilic interference?
Lines.zh: 难道就没有一个时间段是我能躲开你们愚蠢的干涉的吗？

Lines.en: Stay right where you are. I have an enormous rock scheduled to make your acquaintance.
Lines.zh: 站在那里别动。我已经为你们预定好了与一块巨石的会面！

Lines.en: I just hate a ticking rock!
Lines.zh: 我就是讨厌那种会滴答响的石头！

Lines.en: I see a toenail! Of unusual size!
Lines.zh: 我看到一块脚趾甲！好大！

Lines.en: This raptor claw bespeaks an ancient arena of dinosaurian dimensions, User Dave!
Lines.zh: 这只巨爪诉说着远古恐龙时代的竞技场，用户戴夫！

Lines.en: I detect an incoming meteor, User Dave
Lines.zh: 我侦测到一颗袭来的流星，用户戴夫！

Lines.en: I advise immediate egress from this timezone.
Lines.zh: 我建议立刻撤离这个时间段。

Lines.en: Bye-bye, dinos! You'll be birdies in no time!
Lines.zh: 再见啦，小恐龙们！你们马上就会变成小鸟啦！

Lines.en: Bah! You leave me no choice but to enact... Project Paradox!
Lines.zh: 哼！你这是在逼我启动……悖论计划！

Lines.en: I will perceive you soon, fools!
Lines.zh: 我们很快就会再相见的，蠢货们！

Lines.en: Awesome! I've always wanted to eat one of those.
Lines.zh: 太棒了！我一直想尝尝这玩意儿呢。

Lines.en: Wait... that's not a starfish. It's an actual star.
Lines.zh: 等等，这不是个海星。这是个真星星啊。

Lines.en: Ugh, you can have it.
Lines.zh: 呃，还是你拿着这个吧。

Lines.en: Is this Last Stand?
Lines.zh: 这莫非是坚不可摧吗？

Lines.en: No, it's First Sit.
Lines.zh: 不，这是初露软肋。

Lines.en: That's sarcasm.
Lines.zh: 这是讽刺。

Lines.en: I love sitting, but now is not the time! Let's get crazy.
Lines.zh: 虽然我爱肋骨，但现在可不是时候！咱们疯起来吧。

Lines.en: I hope that pharaohs had some heirs.
Lines.zh: 我希望法老们还有点继承人。

Lines.en: I guess that was their last stand too.
Lines.zh: 我想这也是他们的软肋了。

Lines.en: There's a brand new symbol to match. It's a bucket.
Lines.zh: 有个全新图案需要相配。是个桶。

Lines.en: Let's kick it.
Lines.zh: 让我们踢桶狂欢吧！

Lines.en: Match the symbols and win a prize!
Lines.zh: 配对图案，赢取奖励！

Lines.en: What's the prize?
Lines.zh: 奖励是什么？

Lines.en: I don't know. I'm Crazy!
Lines.zh: 我不知道，我疯了！

Lines.en: What's the new symbol?
Lines.zh: 新图案是什么？

Lines.en: I don't know. Feelin' lucky?
Lines.zh: 我不知道，感觉挺幸运的？

Lines.en: Can't we build a modern fence to stop these ancient zombies?
Lines.zh: 恐怕现代围栏挡不住这些远古僵尸呢。

Lines.en: Who needs fences when you have offense?
Lines.zh: 当你有植物防御的时候，谁还需要围栏？

Lines.en: The family that pults together&
Lines.zh: 投手家族集合了。

Lines.en: Are friends indeed.
Lines.zh: 其实他们是朋友。

Lines.en: My sensors have detected plants in danger.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器侦测到有处在危险之中的植物。

Lines.en: Who will save the plants? WHO?!??
Lines.zh: 谁会救救这些植物？谁？！？？

Lines.en: There's too many tombs. Let's clear them out.
Lines.zh: 墓碑数量超标了。咱们来场大扫除吧。

Lines.en: I'm hyperventilating I'm so excited right now.
Lines.zh: 我已经兴奋到无与伦比无法呼吸了。

Lines.en: Whoa... this world goes to eleven! That's crazy!
Lines.zh: 哇………这世界简直疯狂到顶了！太疯狂了！

Lines.en: That was the last mummy.
Lines.zh: 这就是最后一只木乃伊了。

Lines.en: That's a WRAP!!!! HAHAHAHAH!
Lines.zh: 完美杀青！！！！哈哈哈哈哈！

Lines.en: According to my gauges...
Lines.zh: 根据我的监测仪显示……

Lines.en: User Dave has been waiting to use that joke since we got here.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫从我们抵达那刻起，就憋着要讲这个笑话了。

Lines.en: Do you know what's better than a wrap? A Taco. Let's go!
Lines.zh: 你知道比杀青更棒的是什么吗？一个玉米卷。我们走！

Lines.en: Look! Now there's a star on the time-space map!
Lines.zh: 快看！时空地图上出现星型标记了！

Lines.en: What could it all mean&
Lines.zh: 这一切究竟蕴藏着怎样的未解之谜……

Lines.en: Stars appear on the map where you earned them.
Lines.zh: 星星会出现在地图上你获得它们的地方。

Lines.en: Stars could help us get back to the year 2009 and your taco.
Lines.zh: 这些星星能把我们带回2009，你的玉米卷之年。

Lines.en: Well let's get going and find some more!
Lines.zh: 好吧，让我们继续去找更多星星吧！

Lines.en: Empty stars show where you can go to earn stars.
Lines.zh: 空的星星告诉你哪里你还可以获得星星。

Lines.en: Now this looks like the map to my taco!
Lines.zh: 这简直就像通往玉米卷的地图！

Lines.en: To be precise this is a world map where we can find plants that can help us and...
Lines.zh: 准确来说，这是一幅标注了能助我们一臂之力的植物的世界地图，而且……

Lines.en: User Dave, there are more important things at hand than...
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，眼下还有比这更重要的事情需要……

Lines.en: Let's go get my taco!
Lines.zh: 我们去找我的玉米卷吧！

Lines.en: Good news! Penny found a map to my taco!
Lines.zh: 好消息！潘妮找到了一张指向我的玉米卷的地图。

Lines.en: No, that is a time-space map to the plants that can help us.
Lines.zh: 不，这是一张指向能帮助我们的植物的时空地图。

Lines.en: Let's go get my taco!
Lines.zh: 我们去找我的玉米卷吧！

Lines.en: My Gügle translator indicates the zombies have a plan.
Lines.zh: 我的咕歌翻译器显示僵尸们有个计划！

Lines.en: Is that a brain grill?
Lines.zh: 那莫非是脑花烧烤架？

Lines.en: Flashback! I remember this décor from when I chased squirbos as a kid!
Lines.zh: 真怀念啊！这布局让我想起小时候追松鼠了！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave. We appear to have arrived in the midst of a Neon Mixtape Tour.
Lines.zh: 确实如此，用户戴夫。我们似乎误入了炫光魔音游的派对中心。

Lines.en: I suspect the musical tempo may affect the zombies' speeds.
Lines.zh: 我怀疑音乐节拍能影响僵尸的速度。

Lines.en: I'm feeding the rhythm, I'M FEEDING THE RHYTHM!
Lines.zh: 我在滋养节奏，我在滋养节奏！！

Lines.en: Somebody passed me a note in homeroom, Penny!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！有人在课前给我递了纸条！

Lines.en: It says to meet behind the bike racks at lunchtime for a funderful surprise!
Lines.zh: 纸条上说午休时自行车架后见面，有一大笔惊喜等着我！

Lines.en: I believe some skepticism about this note is in order, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我认为对此纸条保持些许怀疑态度是必要的。

Lines.en: Do you feel that you have grooved? Did you bang your head? Have you "dug it"?
Lines.zh: 你是否感到自己融入节奏？你有甩头吗？挖到精髓了没？

Lines.en: Now the party is over! Melt before the musical might of my majestic Hair Metal Gargantuar!
Lines.zh: 派对到此结束！在我华丽重金属巨尸的音乐威压下融化吧！

Lines.en: I'm scared, Penny! It's two minutes to midnight!
Lines.zh: 我好害怕，潘妮！离午夜只剩两分钟了！

Lines.en: Be brave, User Dave. We'll jilt this ditty... on rock and roll!
Lines.zh: 勇敢点，用户戴夫。我们要用摇滚的力量甩掉这首小调！

Lines.en: Mmm! Penny, do you smell something scrum-dicious?
Lines.zh: 嗯！潘妮，你有没有闻到什么诱人的香味？

Lines.en: No, User Dave. Only Breakdancer Zombies.
Lines.zh: 没有，用户戴夫。只有霹雳舞僵尸在附近。

Lines.en: Maybe they're garlic-flavored!
Lines.zh: 没准它们喜欢大蒜！

Lines.en: Caution, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 小心，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: I believe special zombies may display unique abilities while their preferred music is playing.
Lines.zh: 我认为特殊僵尸在播放其喜欢的音乐时，可能会展现特殊能力。

Lines.en: You mean they'll jam their jam when their jam is jamming?
Lines.zh: 你是说他们会在即兴狂欢时再来段即兴狂欢？

Lines.en: Yes, correct, yes, and yes, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 正是如此，完全正确，千真万确，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Spore-shrooms have a unique ability, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 孢子菇有一项特殊能力，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: If they defeat a zombie, a new Spore-shroom will spawn where that zombie fell.
Lines.zh: 如果它们击败了一只僵尸，一株新的孢子菇就会在僵尸倒下的位置生成。

Lines.en: Hey-wah-zoo! Spore-shrooms mean more shrooms!
Lines.zh: 嘿哇咻！孢子菇意味着蘑菇大爆发！

Lines.en: Say, Penny, do you think Intensive Carrots can be used to revive defeated plants?
Lines.zh: 潘妮，你复活萝卜能不能复活战败的植物？

Lines.en: That's... that's exactly correct, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 那……那完全正确，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Sorry. It just confuses me when you pay attention.
Lines.zh: 抱歉。只是你这么认真，反而让我不知所措了。

Lines.en: I got a real Cactus feeling about this, Penny!
Lines.zh: 潘妮，我这次有种真切的仙人掌预感！

Lines.en: Indeed, Cactus has changed over time, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 确实，经历这么长时间仙人掌也变了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Now she fires a thorn for ranged damage, but hides for ground damage when zombies approach.
Lines.zh: 现在她能发射远程尖刺，但僵尸靠近时会缩地规避近战伤害。

Lines.en: That's so Cactus... always varying her attack and defensive profiles!
Lines.zh: 不愧仙人掌啊……总是转换她的攻防模式！

Lines.en: Hmmmm... you're in danger above. You're a fool; and so knew I!
Lines.zh: 嗯……你上方有危险。你个傻瓜；我早料到了！

Lines.en: Hear me now: Ever shall you give up; ever shall you be down; always you'll run aground, I'll revert you.
Lines.zh: 此刻听好：你永将放弃；永将败北；永远触礁，而我必将使你回归原初。

Lines.en: I intend to make you cry; I mean for you to say goodbye; I'm not really that nice a guy. I alert you!
Lines.zh: 我意在使你哭泣；我意图让你道别；我不是个好人——特此警示你！

Lines.en: Ouch!
Lines.zh: 好痛！

Lines.en: Yarbs! That was close... with so many exciting timing and rhythm changes!
Lines.zh: 好险！刚才真是千钧一发……那么多节奏与韵律的变化！

Lines.en: I fear we have only hit pause on Dr. Zomboss' heinous deal.
Lines.zh: 恐怕我们只是暂停了僵尸博士的邪恶阴谋。

Lines.en: Indeed, next verse, same and yet worse! I go now to when you cannot imagine!
Lines.zh: 诚然，但是下一次相遇依旧更凶险！我将去往你无法想象的时空！

Lines.en: Penny! Penny! Penny! A microphone!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！潘妮！潘妮！有麦克风！

Lines.en: Karaoke time! At last my tangerine dreams will come true!
Lines.zh: 卡拉OK时间到！我那柑橘味的梦想终于要实现了！

Lines.en: Caution, User Dave. This dropped mic promises a banned battle of heavy petal proportions!
Lines.zh: 警告，用户戴夫。这支掉落的麦克风将引发一场花瓣纷飞的禁忌之战！

Lines.en: Let's go to the dandy-handy Almanac to upgrade a plant!
Lines.zh: 让我们查阅那本精巧方便的图鉴来升级植物吧！

Lines.en: Visit the Almanac to upgrade your plants!
Lines.zh: 访问图鉴以升级你的植物！

Lines.en: Travel Log's got some kinda new thing! Check it out!
Lines.zh: 旅行原木里出现了什么新玩意儿！快看看！

Lines.en: User Dave, I have detected that you have sustained multiple surface level injuries.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，检测到您体表存在多处浅层损伤。

Lines.en: I got into a fight with the Travel Log. He thinks he can tell me what to do!
Lines.zh: 我刚和旅行原木打了一架！它想教我做事！

Lines.en: Medical assistance is required. I recommend that we search for an Aloe.
Lines.zh: 需要医疗援助。建议立即寻找芦荟进行治疗。

Lines.en: Aloe is capable of healing damage an adjacent plant takes.
Lines.zh: 芦荟能够治疗相邻植物所受的损伤。

Lines.en: The Aloe is a steadfast companion to the Kiwi Beast.
Lines.zh: 芦荟是野兽猕猴桃的忠实伙伴。

Lines.en: Aloe's healing with allow Kiwi Beast to persist longer, dealing optimal damage to zombies.
Lines.zh: 芦荟的治疗能使野兽猕猴桃持续作战更长时间，对僵尸造成最大化的伤害。

Lines.en: Aloe soothes the savage Kiwi Beast. Except for the part where it still looks pretty angry.
Lines.zh: 芦荟能安抚狂躁的野兽猕猴桃。尽管它看起来仍然怒气冲冲。

Lines.en: Aloe can heal anything! I don't need this pot for protection anymore!
Lines.zh: 芦荟能治愈一切！我再也不需要这口锅当护具了！

Lines.en: That is inadvisable, User Dave. Stronger defenses benefit even further from an Aloe's presence.
Lines.zh: 此举欠妥，用户戴夫。即便强效防御也能因芦荟的加持而更加稳固。

Lines.en: Penny! A grid of plants for swappin'!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！出现可以交换植物的格子了！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave. Plants can be swapped to create matches of 3 or more.
Lines.zh: 正是，用户戴夫。植物可通过交换形成三株或以上的匹配组合。
