Lines.en: You must make 100 matches to defeat the zombies.
Lines.zh: 你需要完成100次匹配才能击败僵尸。

Lines.en: You can use sun to upgrade your plants.
Lines.zh: 你可以使用阳光升级你的植物。

Lines.en: Penny, I've been thinking...
Lines.zh: 潘妮，我一直在想……

Lines.en: This is a first, User Dave. Please continue.
Lines.zh: 这才是第一句呢，用户戴夫，请继续。

Lines.en: The Lost City lost its lights. What if we could turn them back on?
Lines.zh: 遗落古城的光芒失落了。如果我们重新点亮它会怎么样？

Lines.en: Then I would say that would be a bright idea.
Lines.zh: 那不得不说，这真是个明亮的好主意。

Lines.en: We have arrived at the apex of our Aloe adventure.
Lines.zh: 我们已抵达芦荟探险的巅峰时刻。

Lines.en: I'm going to miss all of the good times we had together.
Lines.zh: 我会怀念我们共度的所有美好时光。

Lines.en: User Dave, victory here will allow us to acquire the Aloe permanently.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，此处的胜利将让我们永久获得芦荟。

Lines.en: In that case, I'm going to miss my beard.
Lines.zh: 既然如此，我会想念我的胡子了。

Lines.en: Mission accomplished. The Aloe has been added to our plant collection.
Lines.zh: 任务完成。芦荟已加入我们的植物收藏。

Lines.en: And I still have my beard! Everything is coming up Crazy Dave!
Lines.zh: 而且我的胡子还在！一切都在为我疯狂戴夫锦上添花！

Lines.en: Penny! A grid of plants for swappin'!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！快看这满格子可交换的植物！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave. Plants can be swapped to create matches of 3 or more.
Lines.zh: 正是如此，用户戴夫。通过交换植物可形成三株或以上的匹配组合。

Lines.en: You must make 125 matches to defeat the zombies.
Lines.zh: 你需要完成125次匹配才能击败僵尸。

Lines.en: You can use sun to upgrade your plants.
Lines.zh: 你可以使用阳光升级你的植物。

Lines.en: I detect three different Power-Ups, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我侦测到三个不同的道具，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: They are Power Shuffle, Power Shovel, and Power Zap.
Lines.zh: 它们是“洗牌”，“铲子”和“闪电”。

Lines.en: Power Shuffle scrambles the board if you are having trouble finding a match.
Lines.zh: “洗牌”会在您难以找到匹配时重新排列版面。

Lines.en: Power Shovel fills in a crater, allowing an eaten plant to be replaced.
Lines.zh: “铲子”可填平弹坑，使被啃食的植物得以替换。

Lines.en: Power Zap power zaps zombies.
Lines.zh: “闪电”能电击僵尸。

Lines.en: I was confused about that last one!
Lines.zh: 最后那个真把我搞糊涂了！

Lines.en: SO MUCH SWAPPING, PENNY!!!
Lines.zh: 交换操作太多了，潘妮！！！

Lines.en: Indeed, it is a gauntlet, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 确实，如同极限挑战一般，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: However, my sensors detect a rich reward if we persevere.
Lines.zh: 但我的传感器检测到，若坚持到底，我们将会得到丰厚回报。

Lines.en: Keep calm and swap on!
Lines.zh: 保持冷静，继续交换！

Lines.en: Whew! That plant grid was rough like old sausage!
Lines.zh: 呼！这植物网格难度简直像陈年香肠一样硬核！

Lines.en: Correct, User Dave. However, we should expect a rich coin reward for our efforts.
Lines.zh: 正确，用户戴夫。但我们的努力理应获得大量金币回报。

Lines.en: Alert, User Dave! My batteries are losing power.
Lines.zh: 警报，用户戴夫！我的电池正在流失电量。

Lines.en: But you need power to roll your windows up and down!
Lines.zh: 可你需要有电才能升降车窗啊！

Lines.en: Correct. Perhaps some electrical plants can restore my charge.
Lines.zh: 正确。或许某些电能植物可以为我恢复电力。

Lines.en: That's so plausible, it just might work!
Lines.zh: 这个方案太合理了，肯定能行！

Lines.en: My batteries are nearly charged, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我的电池即将充满，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Wahoo! So many electrons!
Lines.zh: 哇哦！这么多电子

Lines.en: That Electric Currant is sparky AND sparkly!
Lines.zh: 那片电流醋栗正在迸发火花且闪闪发光！

Lines.en: Indeed, its electrical power is most invigorating.
Lines.zh: 确实它的电最令人精神振奋了。

Lines.en: It will make an excellent addition to our collection.
Lines.zh: 它将成为我们收藏中的绝佳补充。

Lines.en: I have detected an Electric Currant plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 检测到一株电流醋栗，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Two in the same row or column will create an electric field between them.
Lines.zh: 同行或同列的两株将在其间形成电流线。

Lines.en: The field will damage zombies and recharge my batteries.
Lines.zh: 它的电流线能同时损伤僵尸和为我的电池充电。

Lines.en: What a positive development!
Lines.zh: 真是积极的发展！

Lines.en: I detect mine carts, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 检测到矿车，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Use them to zap zombies with Electric Currant fields.
Lines.zh: 利用它们配合电流醋栗电场电击僵尸。

Lines.en: Watt a great idea!
Lines.zh: 这主意真是瓦特级的棒！

Lines.en: All this electricity makes my face-beard hurt! Can we stop for a beach break?
Lines.zh: 这些电光刺得我胡子脸疼！咱们能暂停去海滩度假吗？

Lines.en: Of course, User Dave. Prepare for Beach Party onslaught.
Lines.zh: 当然，用户戴夫。请准备迎接海滩派对的攻势。

Lines.en: Can we have bananas?
Lines.zh: 我们可以用香蕉吗？

Lines.en: Bananas will be provided.
Lines.zh: 香蕉即将供应

Lines.en: How are your batteries, Penny?
Lines.zh: 你的电池怎么样了，潘妮？

Lines.en: They are charging nicely, User Dave, thank you for inquiring.
Lines.zh: 充电进度良好，用户戴夫，感谢您的关心。

Lines.en: The Electric Currants are most helpful.
Lines.zh: 电流醋栗确实提供了极大助力。

Lines.en: They sure make a powerful coulomb-ination!
Lines.zh: 它们确实形成了强大的库仑组合！

Lines.en: Note the rolling boulders.
Lines.zh: 注意那些滚动的巨石。

Lines.en: When triggered they destroy plants and zombies alike.
Lines.zh: 一旦触发，它们会无差别摧毁植物与僵尸。

Lines.en: Attention, User Dave! I have audio-detected a large stash of zombie gems.
Lines.zh: 注意，用户戴夫！声波探测到大量钻石。

Lines.en: Heard the horde's hoard, huh?
Lines.zh: 听到那群僵尸的宝藏了，是吧？

Lines.en: If we move swiftly, we may be able to claim them for our own.
Lines.zh: 若行动迅速，我们或许能将其据为己有。

Lines.en: Hi-ho-Gem-Jam, awaaaaay!
Lines.zh: 嗨哟-宝石争夺战，冲呀——！

Lines.en: Those gems are so close I can smell 'em!
Lines.zh: 那些宝石近得我都能闻到味儿了！

Lines.en: Like gooseberries in springtime!
Lines.zh: 就像春天的醋栗般诱人！

Lines.en: Hsss! Rascals! Gem-poaching scoundrels!
Lines.zh: 嘶！这些流氓！偷宝石的恶棍！

Lines.en: No matter! My plans proceed apace!
Lines.zh: 无妨！我的计划仍在加速推进！

Lines.en: The zombies are aware of our gem quest, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 僵尸已察觉我们的宝石任务，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: They intend to attack us from the sea.
Lines.zh: 他们意图从海上发动袭击。

Lines.en: We'll sea about that! Bowling Bulbs, LET'S ROLL!
Lines.zh: 咱们就等着瞧吧！保龄灯泡——准备出击！

Lines.en: I smell leather! And electricity!
Lines.zh: 我闻到了皮革味！还有电气的味道！

Lines.en: My sensors register a plant lost in time.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到一株迷失在时间中的植物。

Lines.en: I smell a rescue! And oranges!
Lines.zh: 我嗅到了救援的气息！还有橙子香味！

Lines.en: Our missing plant is the Gold Bloom, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们失踪的植物是黄金蓓蕾，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: It produces an immediate bounty of sun when planted!
Lines.zh: 种植时它能立即产生大量阳光！

Lines.en: Instant sun? Not good enough! MUST GO FASTER!
Lines.zh: 瞬间获得阳光？还不够快！必须更快！

Lines.en: The Gold Bloom is unstuck in time, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 黄金蓓蕾正处于时间错位状态，用户戴夫

Lines.en: Luckily I can track it whenever it goes.
Lines.zh: 幸运的是无论它去往何时我都能追踪。

Lines.en: Hang on, little sprout! We're a-comin'!
Lines.zh: 坚持住，小萌芽！我们这就来啦！

Lines.en: We did it! I am a hero to all plants!
Lines.zh: 我们成功了！我是植物界的英雄！

Lines.en: I am concerned about the strange portals we encountered, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我对我们遭遇的奇异传送门感到担忧，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: I believe some unfortunate chicanery may be afoot.
Lines.zh: 我认为某些恶劣的诡计可能正在酝酿中。

Lines.en: HA! HA-HA-HA! HA!
Lines.zh: 哈！哈-哈-哈！哈！

Lines.en: I am amused!
Lines.zh: 我感到很有趣！

Lines.en: Yoink! What happened to our plants?
Lines.zh: 哎哟！我们的植物怎么了？

Lines.en: We've traveled back before the age of Power Plants.
Lines.zh: 我们回到了瓷砖萝卜的年代之前。

Lines.en: Any plants we choose will be at Level 1 while we're here.
Lines.zh: 在此时代我们选择的任何植物都将处于1级状态。

Lines.en: Let's kick it old school!
Lines.zh: 让我们复古开战！

Lines.en: Hey, this looks familiar!
Lines.zh: 嘿，这看起来真眼熟！

Lines.en: My sensors detect that we are stuck in a time loop.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到我们被困在时间循环中了。

Lines.en: The zombies we faced the first time have had their strength boosted!
Lines.zh: 我们首次面对的僵尸力量已被强化！

Lines.en: As these boosts escalate, the zombie threat may soon be insurmountable.
Lines.zh: 随着强化程度升级，僵尸威胁可能很快将无法抵挡。

Lines.en: Ooo, I want to see how far we can get!
Lines.zh: 哇哦，我想看看我们能推进到什么程度！

Lines.en: Woo! We made it all the way to the end!
Lines.zh: 呜呼！我们一路冲到了终点！

Lines.en: I honestly did not expect us to get this far.
Lines.zh: 说实话，我根本没预料我们能走这么远。

Lines.en: I underestimated the strength of some of our plants!
Lines.zh: 我低估了我们某些植物的强度！

Lines.en: Or we're just that good!
Lines.zh: 或者单纯是因为我们太厉害了！

Lines.en: You can switch places between Escape Roots and endangered plants in this level.
Lines.zh: 在这关你可以让逃脱树根和濒危植物交换位置。

Lines.en: The Kiwibeast becomes larger and more powerful the more damage it takes.
Lines.zh: 野兽猕猴桃承受的伤害越多，就会变得越大越强。

Lines.en: Whoa, better try that one again!
Lines.zh: 哇，最好再试一次！

Lines.en: Oops, you should give it another shot!
Lines.zh: 哎呀，你应该再试一次！

Lines.en: It says there's an error.  Can you come here and fix it Penny?
Lines.zh: 系统显示存在错误。你能过来处理一下吗，潘妮？

Lines.en: Did you try unplugging it and plugging it back in?
Lines.zh: 你试过断电重启了吗？

Lines.en: Face forward, true believers!
Lines.zh: 面向前方，真正的信徒们！

Lines.en: The battle between plants and zombies has become SUPER-POWERED!
Lines.zh: 植物与僵尸的大战已升级为超级能量对决！

Lines.en: Thanks to the Hero-Tron 5000!
Lines.zh: 多亏了英雄机器人5000!

Lines.en: Hurrr! ZOMBIEZ R WINNERZ!
Lines.zh: 呼呜！僵尸必胜！

Lines.en: Gasp! Super Brainz!
Lines.zh: 呼！超级脑子！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: I just said that!
Lines.zh: 我刚才说过了！

Lines.en: Well, now you face the GREEN SHADOW!
Lines.zh: 好吧，现在你将面对绿影侠！

Lines.en: It's an epic clash between bloom and doom!
Lines.zh: 真是史诗般的植僵大战！

Lines.en: We'll meet again, Super Brainz!
Lines.zh: 我们会再见面的，超级脑子！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: Be valiant, little peashooters!
Lines.zh: 勇敢点，小豌豆射手！

Lines.en: Wear your Green Shadow costumes with pride!
Lines.zh: 骄傲地穿上你的绿影侠装扮！

Lines.en: Hee-hee-hee! Hee-hee-hee! HEEEE!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻-嘻！嘻-嘻-嘻！嘻嘻！！

Lines.en: IMPFINITY! You multiplying maniac!
Lines.zh: 无限小鬼！你们这帮疯子！

Lines.en: Laughing more doesn't make it funnier!
Lines.zh: 笑得再大声也不会让事情变有趣！

Lines.en: Hi! Good ol' SOLAR FLARE here! Let's get sunny!
Lines.zh: 嗨！好强的太阳耀斑！让阳光普照吧！

Lines.en: We're gonna see some great costumes today!
Lines.zh: 我们今天会见到一些好看的装扮！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: Uh-oh! Time to light up this bozo!
Lines.zh: 糟了！是时候教训这个蠢货了！

Lines.en: BOOGALOOOOO!
Lines.zh: 霹雳舞起来！

Lines.en: Electric Boogaloo! You villainous villain!
Lines.zh: 电力十足的霹雳舞！你这恶棍！

Lines.en: Though I gotta say... I love those flashy duds!
Lines.zh: 不过不得不说……我可喜欢那身炫酷行头了！

Lines.en: BOOGALOOOO!
Lines.zh: 霹雳舞！

Lines.en: BOOOOG!
Lines.zh: 霹雳！

Lines.en: I'm thinking about crayons!
Lines.zh: 我在想蜡笔的事情！

Lines.en: Doop-de-doo, thinkin' about crayons...
Lines.zh: 嘟嘀嘟，想着蜡笔的事……

Lines.en: HEE-HEE-HEE-HEEEEEE!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻-嘻！嘻嘻！！

Lines.en: Yikes!
Lines.zh: 咿呀！

Lines.en: That can't be healthy!
Lines.zh: 那肯定不健康！

Lines.en: Hee!
Lines.zh: 嘻！

Lines.en: Hee-hee!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻！

Lines.en: HEE-HEE-HEE-HEEEEE!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻-嘻-嘻嘻！

Lines.en: You worry me, Impfinity...
Lines.zh: 你很让我担心啊，无限小鬼……

Lines.en: When the Hero-Tron 500 exploded, it turned plants and zombies into Heroes... and made a big mess!
Lines.zh: 当英雄机器人5000爆炸时，它把植物和僵尸都变成了英雄……还搞得一团糟！

Lines.en: Stay back, Electric Boogaloo!
Lines.zh: 退后，电力十足的霹雳舞！

Lines.en: I won't be charmed by your suave charms!
Lines.zh: 我不会被你的魅力所迷惑！

Lines.en: Boo... galooo?
Lines.zh: 霹雳……舞？

Lines.en: I won't! I can't!
Lines.zh: 我不会的！我不能！

Lines.en: BRAINZ! That R SUPER!
Lines.zh: 脑子！还是超级的！

Lines.en: SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 超级脑子！

Lines.en: Knight! That is Wall!
Lines.zh: 骑士，那是一道墙！

Lines.en: WALL-KNIGHT!
Lines.zh: 坚果骑士！

Lines.en: I like this game!
Lines.zh: 我喜欢这个游戏！

Lines.en: I knew we'd meet again, Super Brainz!
Lines.zh: 我就知道我们会再次见面，超级脑子！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: Yes, I already... You know what? Forget it.
Lines.zh: 是的，我早就……你知道吗？还是忘了吧。

Lines.en: Where are the missing Hero-Tron 5000 parts, Impfinity?
Lines.zh: 缺少的英雄机器人5000零部件呢，无限小鬼？

Lines.en: EEE-HEE-HEEEEE!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻-嘻嘻！

Lines.en: That's not an answer!
Lines.zh: 那不是个答案！

Lines.en: Electric! BOOGALOO!
Lines.zh: 电力！霹雳舞！

Lines.en: Hi! Do you like crayons?
Lines.zh: 你好！你喜欢蜡笔吗？

Lines.en: I LIKE LOTZA STUFFZ!
Lines.zh: 我超喜欢各种好东西！

Lines.en: But do you like... BLUE crayons?
Lines.zh: 但你喜欢……蓝色蜡笔吗？

Lines.en: Pssst!
Lines.zh: 嘿！

Lines.en: We stole the Hero-Tron bits! Yep! Stuck em in my hat!
Lines.zh: 我们投了英雄机器人的零件！是的！把它们装进我的帽子里！

Lines.en: Hi, hi, hi!
Lines.zh: 你好，你好，你好！

Lines.en: Did I miss anything?
Lines.zh: 我错过了什么吗？

Lines.en: Whew! These zombies are tough customers!
Lines.zh: 咻！这些僵尸可真难对付！

Lines.en: They just keep coming! They never stop!
Lines.zh: 它们不停过来！永不停止！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: And let's face it... their conversation is not illuminating!
Lines.zh: 而且说真的，它们的对话完全没有营养！

Lines.en: Solar Flare! Did you find the Hero-Tron components?
Lines.zh: 耀斑花！你找到英雄机器人的零件了吗？

Lines.en: Nope! Just lots of junk! How about you, Wall-Knight?
Lines.zh: 没有！就只有一堆垃圾！你呢，坚果骑士？

Lines.en: Hi! I'm Wall-Knight!
Lines.zh: 你好！我是坚果骑士！

Lines.en: MY NAME IS SUPER BRAINZ!
Lines.zh: 我的名字是超级脑子！

Lines.en: WE KNOW!!!
Lines.zh: 我们早知道了！！！

Lines.en: Whooze ready 2...
Lines.zh: 谁准备好……

Lines.en: GET DOWN WITH ELECTRIC BOOGALOO!
Lines.zh: 接受电力十足的霹雳舞了！

Lines.en: Me!
Lines.zh: 我！

Lines.en: I mean... never!
Lines.zh: 我是说……我才不！

Lines.en: Hee-hee-hee-heeeee!
Lines.zh: 嘻-嘻-嘻-嘻嘻！

Lines.en: Tune in for more excitement...
Lines.zh: 敬请期待更多精彩……

Lines.en: ...and check out Plants vs. Zombies HEROES!
Lines.zh: 快来体验《植物大战僵尸：英雄》！

Lines.en: These Cave Zombies sure are hard headed.
Lines.zh: 这些洞穴僵尸真是顽固至极。

Lines.en: They just won't take "no brains" for an answer.
Lines.zh: 它们根本不接受“不吃脑子”的拒绝。

Lines.en: According to my data, Neanderthal zombie skulls are 33.2 percent harder than other zombie skulls.
Lines.zh: 根据我的数据，尼安德特僵尸的头骨硬度比其他僵尸高出33.2%。

Lines.en: I propose we deploy Chard Guard. He has a secret up his leaves.
Lines.zh: 我建议部署甜菜护卫。他的叶片下藏着秘密武器。

Lines.en: You mean his ol' Knock 'Em Dead maneuver?
Lines.zh: 你是指他那招致命击退的老把戏？

Lines.en: It'll knock those zombies back where they came from!
Lines.zh: 这招能把那些僵尸全轰回老巢！

Lines.en: I guess it's not a secret any more, now is it User Dave?
Lines.zh: 看来这已经不是秘密了，对吧用户戴夫？

Lines.en: W-w-warning, User Dave! I am r-r-running l-l-low on antifreeze!
Lines.zh: 警-警告，用户戴夫！防-防冻液即-即将耗尽！

Lines.en: If my systems f-f-f-freeeze up, we could be stuck here forever!
Lines.zh: 如-如果我的系统冻-冻结，我们可-可能会永远困在这里！

Lines.en: It'll be a cold day in heck before I let that happen, Penny!
Lines.zh: 我绝不会让这种事发生的，潘妮！

Lines.en: Time to unleash Fire Peashooter!
Lines.zh: 是时候释放火焰豌豆了！

Lines.en: She can apply heat to those zombies, and warm up nearby pals too!
Lines.zh: 她能对僵尸施加灼热攻击，同时为附近队友提供温暖！

Lines.en: Brrrrr. It's colder than a polar bear eating an ice pop!
Lines.zh: 嘶——这比吃着冰棒的北极熊还冷！

Lines.en: Indeed. It appears we have arrived in the Frostbite Caves.
Lines.zh: 确实。看来我们已抵达极寒冰窟。

Lines.en: We've traveled so far back in history ... we've arrived in PREhistory!
Lines.zh: 我们穿越历史如此之久……竟来到了史前时代！

Lines.en: A historic moment indeed, User Dave. But more importantly...
Lines.zh: 这确实是历史性时刻，用户戴夫。但更重要的是……

Lines.en: My sensors indicate there is an ice floe on the lawn.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到草坪上出现了浮冰。

Lines.en: Data suggests it will block both plants and zombies.
Lines.zh: 数据表明它将同时阻挡植物和僵尸。

Lines.en: Though I predict hungry zombies will find a way around it.
Lines.zh: 但我预测饥饿的僵尸会找到方法绕过它。

Lines.en: Don't worry. We'll plant wisely and stop those zombies COLD!
Lines.zh: 别担心。我们会巧妙种植，让那些僵尸彻底冻僵！

Lines.en: Global cooling is the pits. What we need is a heat wave!
Lines.zh: 全球变冷真糟糕。我们现在需要的是热浪！

Lines.en: Agreed. Please note, I have now replaced the snowballs with fireballs.
Lines.zh: 同意。请注意，我已将雪球替换为火球。

Lines.en: The Flamethrower power-up melts frost and damages zombies too.
Lines.zh: 火焰指既能融化冰霜又能伤害僵尸。

Lines.en: Neat-o! You know, they say revenge is a dish best served cold.
Lines.zh: 妙极了！要知道，人们都说，复仇是道凉菜更好吃。

Lines.en: But I say it's best served hot. Fiery hot! With extra hot sauce.
Lines.zh: 但我觉得最好热辣享用。烈火烹油般的热辣！还要加额外辣酱。

Lines.en: And a side of tacos!
Lines.zh: 再加一份玉米卷！

Lines.en: Me Zomboss. Me write you another threatening note.
Lines.zh: 我，僵尸博士。我，给你写张新的威胁纸条。

Lines.en: You in trouble. Biiiiig trouble. Gargantuan trouble, in fact!
Lines.zh: 你摊上事了。摊上大——大事了。其实是巨人般的大事！

Lines.en: Sloth Gargantuar smash! Smash your tiny, shivering plants!
Lines.zh: 懒散巨尸要砸扁！砸扁你那些瑟瑟发抖的小植物！

Lines.en: Sloth Gargantuar deliver prehistoric plague of Imps!
Lines.zh: 懒散巨尸正在投放史前小鬼瘟疫！

Lines.en: Have bad day. Sincerely, Dr. Zomboss
Lines.zh: 祝你有糟糕的一天。诚挚的，僵尸博士

Lines.en: I postulate evolution will never come to that zombie.
Lines.zh: 我断定那个僵尸永远不会进化了。

Lines.en: Not in a million, billion, gazillion years.
Lines.zh: 就算过一百万年、十亿年、兆年也不可能。

Lines.en: My data suggests Hurrikale would be of great use here.
Lines.zh: 我的数据表明飓风甘蓝在此地会非常有用。

Lines.en: A blast of air from him, and the zombies will chill out and slow down!
Lines.zh: 他释放的寒风能让僵尸冷静下来并减速！

Lines.en: The guy's a real blow hard. And I mean that in the nicest way possible.
Lines.zh: 这家伙可是个真正的吹风高手——我用最友善的意思说这话。

Lines.en: Don't look now, Penny, but those plants have a bad case of freezer burn!
Lines.zh: 别看现在，潘妮，那些植物可是严重冻伤了！

Lines.en: It's the freezing winds from this time period. They've immobilized the plants.
Lines.zh: 是这个时代的寒风所致。它们让植物无法行动了。

Lines.en: I suggest we call on Hot Potato. She can melt those ice blocks.
Lines.zh: 我建议召唤烤马铃薯。她能融化那些冰块。

Lines.en: I'm warming up to the idea already!
Lines.zh: 听了这个主意我就暖和起来了！

Lines.en: It's too quiet. Where is everyone? I have a bad feeling about this.
Lines.zh: 太安静了。大家都在哪里？我有种不祥的预感。

Lines.en: My sensors indicate there are zombies hiding under the ice.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到有僵尸藏在冰层下方。

Lines.en: I know this game! They call it Hide & Eat Brains.
Lines.zh: 我知道这个游戏！他们叫它躲猫猫吃脑子。

Lines.en: Time for a game of our own: I call it Whack-A-Zombie.
Lines.zh: 现在轮到我们的游戏了：我称之为锤僵尸。

Lines.en: Whack them good and they will surely drop better hammers.
Lines.zh: 狠狠揍它们，肯定会掉落更好的锤子。

Lines.en: I'm sorry. Can't help it. Have to say it. It's ... hammer time.
Lines.zh: 抱歉。我忍不住，必须说出来。是……锤子时间到。

Lines.en: I'm starting to get cold feet about this place.
Lines.zh: 我开始对这地方感到心里发寒了。

Lines.en: Also, my feet are getting really cold.
Lines.zh: 另外，我的脚确实越来越冷了。

Lines.en: Time to turn up the heat. I recommend Pepper-pult for the job.
Lines.zh: 是时候升温了。我推荐甜椒投手来执行任务。

Lines.en: He lobs hot peppers at zombies and also keeps nearby plants warm.
Lines.zh: 他向僵尸投掷辣椒，同时为附近植物提供温暖。

Lines.en: Let's pick a peck of Pepper-pults! It's the perfect plant for our predicament!
Lines.zh: 让我们选一组甜椒投手！这真是我们在困境中的完美帮手！

Lines.en: Must you rhyme, User Dave? Must you?
Lines.zh: 非得押韵吗，用户戴夫？非这样不可吗？

Lines.en: I wish these prehistoric zombies would just go back to their caves.
Lines.zh: 但愿这些史前僵尸能安分地回到他们的洞穴

Lines.en: User Dave, perhaps it's time to try a new tactic.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，或许是时候尝试新战术了。

Lines.en: Data suggests Stunion would make for a ... potent ... ally here.
Lines.zh: 数据表明眩晕洋葱在此地会成为……强效……盟友。

Lines.en: Great idea, Penny! That guy's breath is stunning!
Lines.zh: 好主意，潘妮！那家伙的口气简直令人震撼！

Lines.en: Not even exaggerating. He stuns zombies ... with his bad breath.
Lines.zh: 毫不夸张。他能用口臭……震慑僵尸。

Lines.en: Gross. But also, pretty nifty!
Lines.zh: 恶心……不过也挺厉害！

Lines.en: Penny, what we need right now is a nice hot cup o' cocoa!
Lines.zh: 潘妮，我们现在需要的是一杯热可可！

Lines.en: User Dave, that is an unproven zombie-fighting weapon.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，这可是未经证实的打僵尸武器。

Lines.en: I recommend we call on Rotobaga instead.
Lines.zh: 我建议改为召唤旋转芜菁。

Lines.en: She can hover above ground AND shoot at zombies in four directions!
Lines.zh: 她能悬停在地面之上，还能向四个方向射击僵尸！

Lines.en: Kid's got talent! Maybe she knows how to make hot cocoa too?
Lines.zh: 这孩子真有天赋！说不定她还会泡热可可呢？

Lines.en: Gurrreetings! Dr. Zomboss have prehistoric question for pitiful plant friends.
Lines.zh: 咕呜呜问候！僵尸博士有个史前问题要问可怜的植物朋友们。

Lines.en: Why you hunt for taco? Is taco all it cracked up to be?
Lines.zh: 你们为何追寻塔可？塔可真有传说中那么完美吗？

Lines.en: Could it be ... trap? Could it be ... trick?
Lines.zh: 会不会是个……陷阱？会不会是个……诡计？

Lines.en: Chew on that! Mwwwahahaha unga unga!
Lines.zh: 好好琢磨吧！呜哇哈哈哈嗯嘎嗯嘎！

Lines.en: Penny ... my taco!?!
Lines.zh: 潘妮……我的玉米卷！？！

Lines.en: User Dave, ignore the taco. Ignore the taunts.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，忽略玉米卷。忽略嘲讽。

Lines.en: It's time to FIGHT DR. ZOMBOSS!
Lines.zh: 是时候对战僵尸博士了！

Lines.en: User Dave, I've detected an incoming ice cube.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，检测到巨型冰块正在接近。

Lines.en: Looks like a zombie-sicle to me.
Lines.zh: 我看这像根僵尸冰棒。

Lines.en: Analysis suggests this creepy cube unlocks a chilly challenge.
Lines.zh: 分析表明这个诡异的冰块将开启一场寒冷的挑战。

Lines.en: You know what I say? Brrrrr-ing it on!
Lines.zh: 知道我的态度吗？放—马—过—来—吧！

Lines.en: Well done. We have defeated Dr. Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 干得漂亮。我们已击败僵尸博士。

Lines.en: And his attempt to make me question my taco!
Lines.zh: 还有他试图让我怀疑玉米卷的阴谋！

Lines.en: User Dave, our journey through time ...
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我们的时空之旅……

Lines.en: You know that it is about more than just a taco.
Lines.zh: 你明白这不仅仅关乎一个塔可。

Lines.en: I suppose you're right, Penny. It's also about-
Lines.zh: 我想你是对的，潘妮。这还关乎——

Lines.en: Ha! Dr. Zomboss not defeated!
Lines.zh: 哈！僵尸博士还没被击败！

Lines.en: Dr. Zomboss crawl back from brink of destruction!
Lines.zh: 僵尸博士从毁灭边缘爬回来了！

Lines.en: Dr. Zomboss return when you no expect him. Bring BIG SURPRISE!
Lines.zh: 僵尸博士在你们意想不到时归来。带来超大惊喜！

Lines.en: Dr. Zomboss stop speaking about self in third-person now! Guuudbye!
Lines.zh: 僵尸博士现在停止用第三人称来称呼自己了！古德拜！

Lines.en: Penny, hath you ever tried licking an ice-thickle and got your tongue thtuck to it?
Lines.zh: 潘妮，你可曾试过舔冰棱子，结果舌头被粘住了？

Lines.en: No, User Dave. I have not.
Lines.zh: 没有，用户戴夫。从未有过

Lines.en: Uh ... me neither. Thath would be craaaazthy.
Lines.zh: 呃……我也没有。那会太疯癫了。

Lines.en: Sigh. While your tongue heals, please note the strange stone tablet.
Lines.zh: 唉。当你舌头愈合了，请注意那块奇异石板。

Lines.en: It appears to be a warning sign, written in Cave Zombie.
Lines.zh: 这似乎是用洞穴僵尸写的警告标志。

Lines.en: Doesth it warn people not to lick ice-thickles?
Lines.zh: 它是不是警告人们不要舔冰棱子？

Lines.en: Tap Jack O' Lantern for a burst of flame.
Lines.zh: 点击杰克南瓜灯即可触发火焰喷发。

Lines.en: Tap and HOLD for an extended burst that does increasing damage!
Lines.zh: 点击并长按可延长爆发时间，造成递增伤害！

Lines.en: Whoa, mowers can chase down zombies and just keep going!
Lines.zh: 哇，小推车居然能追着僵尸不停前进！

Lines.en: Keep an eye out for mowers dropped by zombies, but in the meantime...
Lines.zh: 留意僵尸掉落的小推车，不过现在……

Lines.en: Let me get your mowers back to fightin' form.
Lines.zh: 让我把你的小推车修复到战斗状态。

Lines.en: Don't worry, this one's on the house, or next to the house.
Lines.zh: 别担心，这次免费维修——就在房子旁边进行。

Lines.en: You are truly amazing! Most deserving of the name... Señor Piñata!
Lines.zh: 你真是太厉害了！最配得上……彩陶先生之名！

Lines.en: Have you seen my taco Señor Piñata? It was about this big...
Lines.zh: 彩陶先生见过我的玉米卷吗？大概这么大……

Lines.en: That's it. Please disrupt this anomaly before User Dave gets too attached.
Lines.zh: 就是它。请在用户戴夫过度沉迷前消除这个异常现象。

Lines.en: User Dave, this does not look like a party.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，这看起来可不像派对。

Lines.en: It could still be a surprise party, with gifts and everything!
Lines.zh: 说不定还是个惊喜派对呢，有礼物和各种好东西！

Lines.en: You'll see Penny, I think these zombies are different.
Lines.zh: 等着瞧吧潘妮，我觉得这些僵尸不太一样。

Lines.en: There is an impending attack on your house in modern times!
Lines.zh: 现代时空您的房屋即将遭受攻击！

Lines.en: I bet it's not an attack... I bet it's a party! Oh, I hope it's a Piñata Party!
Lines.zh: 我打赌这不是攻击……我打赌是派对！哦，我希望是彩陶盛宴

Lines.en: It's not a party, there are zombies from all different time periods ready to strike!
Lines.zh: 这不是派对，来自各个时代的僵尸都已准备袭击！

Lines.en: Who knows what else they could have brought with them?
Lines.zh: 天知道他们还带了什么别的东西来？

Lines.en: Sounds like a party to me! Better hurry up, we don't want to miss out!
Lines.zh: 对我来说这听起来就像是派对！得快点儿了，我们可不能错过！

Lines.en: The party is over for now, but those zombies will be back some day.
Lines.zh: 派对暂时结束了，但那些僵尸改日还会卷土重来。

Lines.en: And with them... more piñatas!
Lines.zh: 而且随之而来的……是更多彩陶！

Lines.en: Defending against multiple parties in a row could lead to a massive "piñata" anomaly.
Lines.zh: 连续抵御多次派对可能导致巨大的彩陶异常现象。

Lines.en: I can't wait for the next Piñata Party, and the one after that!
Lines.zh: 我等不及要参加下一场彩陶盛宴了，还有下下场！

Lines.en: But those piñatas just remind me of my sad lost taco. Let's go!
Lines.zh: 可那些彩陶只让我想起伤心丢失的玉米卷。出发吧！

Lines.en: Missing a "Piñata" Party will reset the build up to the massive "piñata" anomaly.
Lines.zh: 错过一场彩陶盛宴将会使巨型彩陶异常现象的积累重置。

Lines.en: I won't pretend to understand why, but the data does not lie.
Lines.zh: 我不会假装理解原因，但数据不会说谎。

Lines.en: Just let us know of any more Piñata Parties you detect!
Lines.zh: 检测到更多彩陶盛宴时请务必通知我们！

Lines.en: For a party they can be pretty sneaky.
Lines.zh: 就派对而言，它们可真够隐蔽的。

Lines.en: What did I tell you Penny? A surprise Piñata Party!
Lines.zh: 我怎么跟你说的来着潘妮？一场惊喜彩陶盛宴！

Lines.en: Does not compute. It appears a level 3 diagnostic check is in order.
Lines.zh: 无法理解。建议执行三级诊断检查。

Lines.en: Piñatas! Let's bust some open and see what we get!
Lines.zh: 彩陶！让我们砸开几个看看有什么好东西！

Lines.en: Woah! Welcome to the jungle!
Lines.zh: 哇！欢迎来到丛林！

Lines.en: User Dave, this is no ordinary jungle. A scan of my records indicates that this is the fabled Lost City.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，这并非普通丛林。我的记录扫描显示这是传说中的遗落古城。

Lines.en: Historical texts state that the Sun was worshipped here. Resources should be plentiful.
Lines.zh: 历史文献记载此地曾崇拜太阳。资源应当极为丰富。

Lines.en: I suggest that we try planting on the Gold Tiles that we find here.
Lines.zh: 我建议尝试在发现的黄金地砖上种植。

Lines.en: They should continuously generate sun as long as they have plants on them.
Lines.zh: 只要上面有植物，它们就能持续产生阳光。

Lines.en: Lost City? This is it Penny! We've found it!
Lines.zh: 遗落古城？就是这里了潘妮！我们找到了！

Lines.en: Where else would I find my lost taco, except in a Lost City?
Lines.zh: 除了遗落古城，我还能在哪找到丢失的塔可呢？

Lines.en: Your continued fixation defies all logic or reason, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 您持续的执念违背所有逻辑与理性，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Come here seeking adventure, have you?
Lines.zh: 你是来寻求冒险的吗？

Lines.en: Unfortunately for you, the Porter Gargantuars are about to ruin your day!
Lines.zh: 可惜的是，搬运工巨尸即将毁掉你的一天！

Lines.en: They carry imps. Imps! Prepare to become ancient history!
Lines.zh: 他们带着小鬼。是小鬼！准备变成古代历史吧！

Lines.en: I wish someone would carry me around in a tiny house!
Lines.zh: 真希望有人能把我装在迷你小屋里随身携带！

Lines.en: I wish for a lot of things, User Dave. That is not one of them.
Lines.zh: 我也有很多愿望，用户戴夫。但这个不在其中。

Lines.en: Alert, User Dave! My sensors sense incoming Imp Porters.
Lines.zh: 警报，用户戴夫！我的传感器检测到搬运工小鬼正在接近。

Lines.en: Importers? Of fine goods and glassware?
Lines.zh: 进口商？是经营精品和玻璃器皿的那种吗？

Lines.en: Negative. They pitch tents on Gold Tiles, and the tents spawn zombies.
Lines.zh: 否定。他们在黄金地砖上搭帐篷，而这些帐篷会生成僵尸。

Lines.en: Imps with bad inTENTs!
Lines.zh: 打坏主意的小鬼！

Lines.en: My sensors indicate movement incoming from above.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到上方有物体正在接近。

Lines.en: Maybe it's presents. Presents from the sky!
Lines.zh: 也许是礼物。从天而降的礼物！

Lines.en: The chances of that statement being true are statistically irrelevant.
Lines.zh: 该陈述为真的概率在统计学上可忽略不计。

Lines.en: I believe it to be a new form of zombie threat. We should be cautious of unexpected guests.
Lines.zh: 我认为这是一种新型僵尸威胁。我们应当警惕不速之客。

Lines.en: Beware, User Dave! I detect trap tiles.
Lines.zh: 小心，用户戴夫！检测到陷阱地砖。

Lines.en: They are triggered by zombies, or when you plant on them.
Lines.zh: 它们会被僵尸触发，或当你在地砖上种植时激活。

Lines.en: And then they give you tacos?
Lines.zh: 然后它们会给你塔可吗？

Lines.en: If you equate tacos with jets of flame and huge boulders, then yes.
Lines.zh: 若你觉得玉米卷和火焰喷射与巨型滚石一样，那么是的。

Lines.en: We are facing considerable threats, User Dave. I suggest that we retaliate with tremendous force.
Lines.zh: 我们正面临重大威胁，用户戴夫。我建议以绝对力量进行反击。

Lines.en: More forceful! That's it! We'll give them all a stern talking to.
Lines.zh: 更强势些！就这样！我们要给他们来个严肃训话。

Lines.en: I was referring to the Lava Guava. Its explosive blasts leave behind dangerous magma.
Lines.zh: 我指的是岩浆番石榴。它的爆炸性冲击会留下危险的岩浆。

Lines.en: That sounds even better! First a stern talking, then some lava!
Lines.zh: 这听起来更棒！先严肃训话，再来点岩浆！

Lines.en: Caution, User Dave. I detect a zombie with a shovel.
Lines.zh: 警告，用户戴夫。检测到持铲僵尸。

Lines.en: Can he dig it?
Lines.zh: 他能挖动吗？

Lines.en: It appears to block incoming shots. We need a way to get projectiles over the shovel.
Lines.zh: 它似乎能阻挡直射子弹。我们需要让抛射物越过铲子。

Lines.en: I know! TELEKINESIS!
Lines.zh: 有了！心灵感应！

Lines.en: Try again, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 再试一次，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Do not think to usurp our discovery of the fabled Lost City!
Lines.zh: 休想篡夺我们发现传说中失落之城的功绩！

Lines.en: I and my zombies have already submitted our find to the Eminent Journal of the Missing and the Mislaid!
Lines.zh: 我和我的僵尸们早已将发现提交至《遗失物品权威期刊》！

Lines.en: We will publish and you will PERISH!
Lines.zh: 我们将把它发表，而你们将湮灭无闻！

Lines.en: Look, Penny! A shiny doo-jickey-ma-thing!
Lines.zh: 快看，潘妮！有个闪亮的玩意儿！

Lines.en: My sensors indicate this amulet points the way to a long-lost challenge.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器显示这个护符指向某个失传已久的挑战。

Lines.en: Let's do some deft discovering!
Lines.zh: 让我们来场精准的探索吧！

Lines.en: All that discovering and still no taco!
Lines.zh: 探索了这么多，还是没找到玉米卷！

Lines.en: The search will no doubt continue, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 搜寻无疑还将继续，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: My discovery remains intact. The taco is still unfound. And your brains will certainly one day be mine!
Lines.zh: 我的发现完好无损。玉米卷依旧下落不明。而你们的脑子终将属于我！

Lines.en: Well lookie-here, Penny! It's a treasure map!
Lines.zh: 快看这儿，潘妮！是张藏宝图！

Lines.en: My analysis suggests that the origins of that map are highly suspect.
Lines.zh: 我的分析表明这张地图的来源高度可疑。

Lines.en: It has a big red X on it, Penny. When have big red Xs ever been bad?
Lines.zh: 上面有个大红叉呢潘妮。大红叉什么时候代表过坏事？

Lines.en: Now here's a break with tradition.
Lines.zh: 这倒是个打破传统的发现。

Lines.en: Facebreaker is a blast from the past, right to your face!
Lines.zh: 破面者是直扑面门的复古冲击！

Lines.en: It's called Vasebreaker, User Dave. Vasebreaker.
Lines.zh: 这叫破罐者，用户戴夫。破罐者。

Lines.en: In that case, it must be right to your vase!
Lines.zh: 既然如此，那肯定是直扑你的罐子！

Lines.en: Tap Missile Toe to arm her, then tap the target to fire.
Lines.zh: 点击槲寄生冰仙子激活它，然后点击目标进行发射。

Lines.en: Aha! Project Paradox begins... NOW!
Lines.zh: 啊哈！悖论计划现在……启动！

Lines.en: Timeline alert, User Dave!
Lines.zh: 时间线警报，用户戴夫！

Lines.en: We have arrived moments before our departure!
Lines.zh: 我们到达了我们出发前的时间点。

Lines.en: If my guess is correct, Dr. Zomboss will attempt to prevent your initial taco-consumption!
Lines.zh: 若我猜测正确，僵尸博士将试图阻止你吃下最开始那个玉米卷！

Lines.en: Our journeys will cease to exist!
Lines.zh: 我们的旅程将不复存在！

Lines.en: NOOOOOOOOOO!
...OOOOOOOO! Sorry, I was busy screaming "No." Did you say "taco"?
Lines.zh: 不…………不好意思，我刚刚忙着大喊”不“呢，你刚刚是说”玉米卷“吗？

Lines.en: We must beware, User Dave. Dr. Zomboss will surely deploy all his time-varied zombies against us!
Lines.zh: 我们必须警惕，用户戴夫。僵尸博士一定会派遣来自所有时空的不同僵尸攻击我们！

Lines.en: TACOOOOOOO!!!
Lines.zh: 玉米卷！！！

Lines.en: We have picked up a Shadow-shroom seed packet, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们捡起了一包毒影菇的种子，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Shadow-shrooms are shadow plants, so be sure to plant them next to Moonflowers for bonus effects.
Lines.zh: 毒影菇是暗影植物，所以请确保它们种在月光花边上以获取增益效果。

Lines.en: Adjacency wins again!
Lines.zh: 相邻效应再次获胜！

Lines.en: Look, Penny! MY TACO!
Lines.zh: 瞧啊，潘妮！我的玉米卷！

Lines.en: No, User Dave! You must not! I detect high levels of trappiness!
Lines.zh: 不，用户戴夫！千万不行！检测到高度陷阱风险！！

Lines.en: But... HUNGY... CHOW... TACO!
Lines.zh: 但是……饿……饭……玉米卷！

Lines.en: Fools! You have fallen into my excruciatingly obvious trap!
Lines.zh: 一群蠢货！你们已落入我显而易见的陷阱里了！

Lines.en: My vast and varied array of Gargantuars will pummel you into total oblivion!
Lines.zh: 我庞大又多样化的巨尸军团将把你们捶至彻底湮灭！

Lines.en: And then I get my taco?
Lines.zh: 然后我能吃到我的玉米卷？

Lines.en: The Dusk Lobber is yet another shadow plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 幽暮投手是另一种暗影植物，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: On its own, it lobs exploding projectiles.
Lines.zh: 单独作战时，它会投掷爆炸性抛射物。

Lines.en: In its powered state, however, it lobs down three lanes!
Lines.zh: 但在暗影状态下，它能同时攻击三行草坪的敌人！

Lines.en: That's a lane for each of my thumbs and noses!
Lines.zh: 正好我有两根拇指和一个鼻子！

Lines.en: Escape Root is a tricky plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 逃脱树根是株诡诈的植物，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: When threatened, it swaps in an explosive plant!
Lines.zh: 受到威胁时，它会变身为一株爆炸植物！

Lines.en: And if you tap it, and then another plant, they will switch places!
Lines.zh: 若你点击它，再点另一株植物，它们就会互换位置！

Lines.en: You can use Escape Roots to rescue endangered plants!
Lines.zh: 你可以用逃脱树根来拯救濒临危险的植物！

Lines.en: Whaaaaa-? Plants can be in-dangered? CALL THE POLICE!
Lines.zh: 什什什么——？植物也会濒危？快报警！

Lines.en: The Moonflower emits sun, User Dave. But that is not all.
Lines.zh: 月光花会生产阳光，用户戴夫。但是还不止于此。

Lines.en: My scans show that it creates a special glow that augments plants of its type.
Lines.zh: 我的扫描显示它会产生特殊光芒，增强同类型的植物。

Lines.en: Planting Moonflowers next to each other should increase their power.
Lines.zh: 把月光花种在一起会增强它们的力量。

Lines.en: I suspect they will have the same effect on any other shadow plants we may find.
Lines.zh: 我推测它们对我们可能找到的其他暗影植物会产生同样效果。

Lines.en: TACOOOOOOOO!!!
Lines.zh: 玉米卷！！！

Lines.en: All-Star Zombies are encroaching, User Dave!
Lines.zh: 全明星僵尸正在逼近，用户戴夫！

Lines.en: They tackle and destroy the first plant they encounter!
Lines.zh: 它们会踹倒并摧毁遇到的第一株植物！

Lines.en: I blame the ref!
Lines.zh: 都怪裁判！

Lines.en: Oy howdy! I think it's one of those Beghouled-y grids again, Penny!
Lines.zh: 哎哟喂！潘妮，我觉得又是那种宝石迷阵式的格子了！

Lines.en: The Grimrose is a shadow plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 暗樱草属于暗影植物，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: It drags down a zombie that enters its lane.
Lines.zh: 它会拖拽进入其所在行的僵尸。

Lines.en: When powered, it can dispose of three zombies before it expires.
Lines.zh: 在暗影状态下，它能在消失前处理掉三只僵尸。

Lines.en: That just seems like it's trying too hard!
Lines.zh: 这似乎有点用力过猛了！

Lines.en: I hear tiny feet! They're pitter-pattering!
Lines.zh: 我听到小脚丫的声音！正啪嗒啪嗒响呢！

Lines.en: Engage caution, User Dave. I detect Super-fan Imps ahead!
Lines.zh: 谨慎行动，用户戴夫。检测到前方有狂热粉丝小鬼！

Lines.en: Their team spirit is explosive!
Lines.zh: 它们的团队精神简直爆表！

Lines.en: The Shrinking Violet is well named, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 畏缩紫罗兰名副其实，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: It shrinks zombies and makes them weaker.
Lines.zh: 它能使僵尸缩小并削弱其力量。

Lines.en: Tiny zombies! Stay away from my shins!
Lines.zh: 迷你僵尸！离我的小腿远点！

Lines.en: It is presently a moment of your apocalypse!
Lines.zh: 此刻正是你的末日时刻！

Lines.en: Your reckless pursuit of an already-eaten taco has shattered all of time!
Lines.zh: 你那对玉米卷不计代价的追求已经粉碎了所有时间线！

Lines.en: It falls to me to restore future, now, and past!
Lines.zh: 重整未来、现在与过去的责任，落到我肩上了！

Lines.en: Can it be true, User Dave?
Lines.zh: 这难道是真的吗，用户戴夫？

Lines.en: Has our quest ruptured the timestream itself?
Lines.zh: 难道我们的追寻本身撕裂了时间流？

Lines.en: Allow me to address your concern thusly:
Lines.zh: 让我来回应你的担忧吧：

Lines.en: *ahem*
Lines.zh: *咳咳*

Lines.en: TACOOOOOOO!!!!!
Fools! Do you not value the validity of time?
Lines.zh: 蠢材！难道你们不重视时间的合理性吗？

Lines.en: Care you not if one moment follows another?
Lines.zh: 难道你们不在意时间的相继有序？

Lines.en: Moron! Ignoramus! Pot-wearer!
Lines.zh: 蠢货！无知之徒！臭戴锅的！

Lines.en: It's not a pot, it's a handled basin!
Lines.zh: 这不是锅，是个带把手的盆！

Lines.en: I am concerned, User Dave. What if he speaks true?
Lines.zh: 我很担心，用户戴夫。要是他说的是真的呢？

Lines.en: I'm too taco-addled to care, Penny! FORWARD!
Lines.zh: 我被玉米卷搞昏头了，顾不上这些！潘妮！前进！

Lines.en: I beseech you, time-zippers, you must listen to reason!
Lines.zh: 我恳求你们，时空穿梭者们，做事有点理性判断！

Lines.en: Coherence crumbles! Our eras become nonsensical!
Lines.zh: 时间的连贯性正在崩塌！我们的时代正变得荒诞不经！

Lines.en: Stuff is all jiggy and super wacked-out, like!
Lines.zh: 现在情况完全乱套而且超离谱，真的！

Lines.en: RELEASE THE SQUIRBOS!
Lines.zh: 释放松鼠！

Lines.en: I am telling the truth, Insane Dave Person!
Lines.zh: 我说的是大实话，疯子戴夫老兄！

Lines.en: My words are utterly not an attempt to trick you!
Lines.zh: 我的话真不是想骗你的鬼话！

Lines.en: You cannot re-eat a taco! It is impossible!
Lines.zh: 你不能重复吃同一个玉米卷！这是不可能的！

Lines.en: Imp-possible? I HATE IMPS! WITH A PASSION!
Lines.zh: 小-鬼话？我讨厌小鬼！恨之入骨！

Lines.en: If you will not listen, then you will be destroyed!
Lines.zh: 如果你不听我的话，迎接你的就只有毁灭了！

Lines.en: You have no credibility! TACOOOO!!!
Lines.zh: 你一点可信度也没有！玉米卷————！！！

Lines.en: David, I implore you! You must give up your hopeless dream of a long-ago taco!
Lines.zh: 戴卫，我恳求你！必须放弃你对早已逝去的玉米卷的无望执念！

Lines.en: It is gone, gone forever! But please, in its place, take this!
Lines.zh: 它消失了，永远消失了！但请收下这个作为替代！

Lines.en: Is that...
Lines.zh: 那是不是……

Lines.en: It can't be...
Lines.zh: 那……那不会是……

Lines.en: A TACO WITH A WAFFLE IN IT!!!!!
Lines.zh: 一个带着华夫饼的玉米卷！！！！！

Lines.en: I detect high levels of deliciousness, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 检测到高度美味指数，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: THIS IS THE GREATEST DAY IN MY OR ANYBODY ELSE'S LIFE!!!!
Lines.zh: 这是我乃至所有人生命中最美妙的一天！！！！

Lines.en: Indeed, perhaps we have misjudged Dr. Zomboss all this time...
Lines.zh: 确实，或许我们一直以来都错怪了僵尸博士……

Lines.en: Ha ha ha! Perhaps you HAVE misjudged me. Or... perhaps not!
Lines.zh: 哈！哈！哈！没准你们错怪了我……或许没准根本没有！

Lines.en: I surely have no devious plans for the future! Or... do I?
Lines.zh: 我当然对未来没有阴谋计划！或者……真的有呢？

Lines.en: Bwah-ha-ha-ha-haaaah! We shall meet again!
Lines.zh: 叭-哈-哈-哈-哈——！我们后会还有期！

Lines.en: My Taco-With-a-Waffle-In-It is yum-licious!
Lines.zh: 我的华夫饼夹玉米卷真是美味绝伦！

Lines.en: But do I smell more zombies ahead?
Lines.zh: 但我是不是闻到前方还有更多僵尸？

Lines.en: Tacos-With-Waffles-In-Them or not, zombies still want brains.
Lines.zh: 无论里面有没有华夫饼，僵尸依然渴望脑子。

Lines.en: Stay on the lookout for stronger versions of zombies we've seen.
Lines.zh: 注意提防我们见过的那些僵尸变得更强。

Lines.en: Our lawnmowers are non-mowers!
Lines.zh: 我们的割草机都成了“不割草机”！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave. Perhaps this is a consequence of Dr. Zomboss' Project Paradox.
Lines.zh: 确实如此，用户戴夫。或许这是僵尸博士悖论计划带来的后果。

Lines.en: We likely will not be able to rely on them going forward.
Lines.zh: 我们以后可能无法再依赖它们了。

Lines.en: But I need them for squirbo hunting!
Lines.zh: 但我还需要它们来狩猎松鼠呢！

Lines.en: Did you enjoy your augmented taco, David?
Lines.zh: 你喜欢这份豪华版玉米卷吗，戴卫？

Lines.en: Its crispy shell?
Lines.zh: 你是指它酥脆的外壳？

Lines.en: Its syrupy center?
Lines.zh: 还是它糖浆般的馅？

Lines.en: Its SECRET INGREDIENT?
Lines.zh: 它的秘密成分？

Lines.en: Surely then you shall appreciate my augmented zombies in equal measure!
Lines.zh: 那么你一定也会喜欢我的豪华版僵尸！

Lines.en: Ha! Ha-ha! HAHAHAHA HAAAAAH!
Lines.zh: 哈-哈-哈！哈哈哈 哈哈哈！！！

Lines.en: Heh.
Lines.zh: 呵。

Lines.en: I think we survived, Penny! Can you check?
Lines.zh: 我想我们活下来了，潘妮！能确认下吗？

Lines.en: Scanning... I calculate 98% chance of survival with 3% margin of error.
Lines.zh: 扫描中……计算显示生存概率98%，误差范围3%。

Lines.en: Thank Taco for powered-up plants!
Lines.zh: 感谢玉米卷带来强力植物！

Lines.en: Curses! It appears that further zombie game-upping shall be required!
Lines.zh: 可恶！看来需要进一步升级僵尸游戏性了！

Lines.en: The Nightshade is another shadow plant, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 暗影龙葵是另一种暗影植物，用户戴夫

Lines.en: By itself it deals slapping damage to zombies.
Lines.zh: 单独作战时，它能对僵尸造成近战伤害。

Lines.en: But if it is planted next a Moonflower, both will become more powerful.
Lines.zh: 但若将其种植在月光花旁，两者都会变得更强大。

Lines.en: Botanical buddies? That's CRAAA-ZY!
Lines.zh: 植物好伙伴？这太疯——狂了！

Lines.en: I am picking up a grid of plants, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我正检测到植物网格，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: My scans suggest that they can be swapped to create matches of three.
Lines.zh: 我的扫描表明它们可通过交换形成三连匹配。

Lines.en: I saw a game like that once on my telephoney!
Lines.zh: 我在我的手机上见过类似的游戏！

Lines.en: My sensors are picking up increased helium levels, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我的传感器检测到氦气浓度正在上升，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: I suspect we may be facing one or more Balloon Zombies.
Lines.zh: 我推测我们可能面临一个或多个气球僵尸的威胁。

Lines.en: I hate one or more Balloon Zombies!
Lines.zh: 我讨厌一个或多个气球僵尸！

Lines.en: Penny! A random length of sewer pipe!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！一截不知哪儿来的下水管道！

Lines.en: Be careful, User Dave. That pipe is part of a municipal mulch of endless engagement!
Lines.zh: 小心，用户戴夫。那管道是市政无尽挑战体系的一部分！

Lines.en: There's still more levels in open worlds.
Lines.zh: 已开放的世界中还有更多关卡。

Lines.en: And there are still plants and rewards to earn too.
Lines.zh: 而且还有可解锁的植物和奖励。

Lines.en: Also, remember the taco!
Lines.zh: 当然，记住玉米卷！

Lines.en: We haven't forgotten about you my dear lost taco.
Lines.zh: 我们未曾忘记你，我亲爱的失落玉米卷。

Lines.en: Where do you think the future will take us?
Lines.zh: 你认为未来将带我们去往何方？

Lines.en: Practicing advanced planting techniques in the Endless Zones...
Lines.zh: 在无尽模式里练习高级种植技术……

Lines.en: Will keep you sharp for future trials.
Lines.zh: 这将使你在未来挑战中保持敏锐。

Lines.en: Just remember. Tomorrow is always a taco...
Lines.zh: 只要记住，明天，永远是一个玉米卷……

Lines.en: And a taco is what we find inside of all of us.
Lines.zh: 而我们都会发现，玉米卷其实就藏在我们每个人的内心。

Lines.en: It may look like the end of the road...
Lines.zh: 看来我们走到道路尽头了呢……

Lines.en: But the road goes on when searching for a taco on the space-time continuum.
Lines.zh: 但在时空连续体中寻找玉米卷时，道路仍将延续。

Lines.en: In the meantime, be sure to practice advanced planting techniques in the Endless Zones.
Lines.zh: 与此同时，务必在无尽模式练习高级种植技术。

Lines.en: Penny is right. It's important to stay sharp.
Lines.zh: 潘妮说得对。保持敏锐很重要。

Lines.en: You never know when you might find zombies on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 你永远不知道何时会在草坪上发现僵尸。

Lines.en: Or me on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 或者在草坪上发现我。

Lines.en: Or my taco on your lawn.
Lines.zh: 或者发现我的玉米卷。

Lines.en: Really, you just don't know.
Lines.zh: 真的，你永远不会知道。

Lines.en: But if you do find my taco on your lawn...
Lines.zh: 但要是你真的在草坪上发现了我的玉米卷……

Lines.en: We lived! Take that, planks and zombies and seaweed!
Lines.zh: 我们活下来了！接招吧，甲板，僵尸和海藻！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave, piracy is not a victimless crime.
Lines.zh: 确实如此，用户戴夫，海盗行为的受害者非常多。

Lines.en: These waves keep getting worse.
Lines.zh: 潮水将更加汹涌。

Lines.en: I'm still not wet.
Lines.zh: 我还没被打湿。

Lines.en: I meant zombie waves.
Lines.zh: 我是说尸潮。

Lines.en: You've got a boat load of sun. Don't go overboard.
Lines.zh: 你已获得了一整船阳光。但别做得太过火。

Lines.en: I see what you did there.
Lines.zh: 我明白你这里的双关了。

Lines.en: Wha -?
Why do birds suddenly appear?
Lines.zh: 为什么突然出现鸟了？

Lines.en: Who cares? We have cannons and a score to beat.
Lines.zh: 谁在乎？我们有椰子加农炮和要达到的分数。

Lines.en: Congratulations on beating my scores. I'm not bitter.
Lines.zh: 恭喜你超越我的分数，我一点都不嫉妒。

Lines.en: I'm not saying you cheated, cheater.
Lines.zh: 我不是说你作弊了……作弊者。

Lines.en: Yeah! Everyone's happy!
Lines.zh: 耶！皆大欢喜！

Lines.en: Butter and spikes and everything nice.
Lines.zh: 黄油、地刺和各种好东西。

Lines.en: That's what butter and spikes are made of.
Lines.zh: 这就是黄油和地刺诞生的意义。

Lines.en: That's hard to argue or agree with.
Lines.zh: 这真让人难以反驳，也难以赞同。

Lines.en: CANNON FIGHT!!!
Lines.zh: 加农炮发射！！！

Lines.en: I feel like something is missing.
Lines.zh: 我感觉似乎缺了点什么。

Lines.en: Sunflowers?
Lines.zh: 向日葵？

Lines.en: Nope. My taco.
Lines.zh: 不是，是我的玉米卷。

Lines.en: Those Spring Beans are living on the edge.
Lines.zh: 那些弹簧豆生活在甲板边上。

Lines.en: Danger is their middle name.
Lines.zh: 危险是它们的中间名。

Lines.en: Someone should update the Almanac.
Lines.zh: 某人真该更新一下植物图鉴了。

Lines.en: It is now clear that these beans are being stalked.
Lines.zh: 很明显这些豆子现在正被跟踪。

Lines.en: Leave no bean behind!
Lines.zh: 一颗豆子都不能落下！

Lines.en: This will be most useful!
Lines.zh: 这会非常有用！

Lines.en: With it we can access another World.
Lines.zh: 我们将能凭借它进入另一个世界。

Lines.en: Nuts. I was hoping it would make our boat bigger.
Lines.zh: 唉，我原本指望它能让我们的船变大呢。

Lines.en: I'm ready to go. Pirates are great, but I think I'm getting homesick.
Lines.zh: 我准备走了。海盗虽好，但我开始想家了。

Lines.en: No wait, I mean seasick.
Lines.zh: 不，等等，我是说……想海。

Lines.en: Roll down the window, please.
Lines.zh: 请降下窗户。

Lines.en: No time for that. There's a taco to find!
Lines.zh: 没时间伤感了。还有玉米卷要找呢！

Lines.en: Shiver me timbers. I've always wanted to do some swashbuckling!
Lines.zh: 哎呀！我一直想来点惊险冒险！

Lines.en: And I've always wanted a poop deck of my own.
Lines.zh: 而且我一直想要个属于自己的船尾甲板。

Lines.en: Yes, let's go. I'd hate for him to improvise a poop deck here.
Lines.zh: 没错，出发吧。我可不想看他现场即兴搭个船尾甲板。

Lines.en: Look out. It's a map.
Lines.zh: 注意。是张地图。

Lines.en: To treasure! It says no zombies. Maps don't lie!
Lines.zh: 指向宝藏！这上面说没有僵尸。地图从不说谎！

Lines.en: Well, we do have a shovel.
Lines.zh: 好吧，我们倒确实有把铲子。

Lines.en: Let's go! No time for precautions!
Lines.zh: 出发！没时间采取预防措施了！

Lines.en: Penny, look! Above my head!
Lines.zh: 潘妮，看！我头顶上！

Lines.en: It's the TRAVEL LOG!
Lines.zh: 是旅行原木！

Lines.en: What's that, Travel Log? You provide guidance, progress and rewards?
Lines.zh: 这是啥，旅行原木？你能提供指引、进度记录和奖励？

Lines.en: The Log is not actually speaking, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 原木其实并没有说话，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Thanks, Travel Log! Whatever you say!
Lines.zh: 谢了，旅行原木！你说啥就是啥！

Lines.en: Visit the Travel Log to claim your quest reward.
Lines.zh: 访问旅行原木以领取你的任务奖励。

Lines.en: Defeat zombies to increase your multiplier.
Lines.zh: 击败僵尸可提升你的倍数奖励。

Lines.en: The multiplier drops if you go too long without defeating a zombie.
Lines.zh: 若长时间未击败僵尸，倍数奖励会下降。

Lines.en: The multiplier also drops when zombies destroy plants.
Lines.zh: 当僵尸摧毁植物时，倍数奖励也会下降。

Lines.en: It appears to be some sort of gate... of stars.
Lines.zh: 这似乎是某种星之门……

Lines.en: I'll call it GATESTAR!
Lines.zh: 我就称它为门星吧！

Lines.en: Actually that is a Star Gate.
Lines.zh: 实际上那是个星之门。

Lines.en: The map shows you where new Stars can be earned!
Lines.zh: 地图会显示可获得新星星的位置！

Lines.en: By earning enough Stars we can unlock the gate&
Lines.zh: 通过获取足够星星，我们就能解锁门——

Lines.en: And travel to another time!
Lines.zh: 并且去到其他时间线！

Lines.en: That's just crazy enough to work!
Lines.zh: 这点子疯狂到肯定能行！

Lines.en: I've found 20 gems!
Lines.zh: 我找到了 20 颗钻石！

Lines.en: What a good news!
Lines.zh: 真是个好消息！

Lines.en: Here you go, my neighbor! Why? Because I'm CRAAAZY!
Lines.zh: 送给你了，我的邻居！你问为什么？因为我疯了！！

Lines.en: Powerful plants!
Lines.zh: 强大的植物！

Lines.en: You need to collect more coins and gems...
Lines.zh: 你需要大量收集硬币和钻石……

Lines.en: ...so that you can afford these strong plants!
Lines.zh: ……然后你就能买下这些强大的植物了！

Lines.en: Besides, the store brings out 8 plant costumes at most every day!
Lines.zh: 此外，商店每天都会提供至多 8 款植物装扮！

Lines.en: Hey Penny, what does this button do?
Lines.zh: 嘿潘妮，这个按钮是干嘛的？

Lines.en: It's the entrance to the store.
Lines.zh: 这是我们前往商店的入口。

Lines.en: We can buy strong plants with gems there.
Lines.zh: 我们能在那用钻石买些强大的植物。

Lines.en: Most interesting, there're other special items in it!
Lines.zh: 最有意思的是，里面还有其他特殊物品！

Lines.en: Let's go and have a visit!
Lines.zh: 让我们去逛一逛吧！

Lines.en: What a big garden!
Lines.zh: 看看这巨大的花园！

Lines.en: We can collect sprouts and raise them.
Lines.zh: 我们可以收集幼苗并培育它们。

Lines.en: They'll repay us when they grow up!
Lines.zh: 它们长大后会回报我们的！

Lines.en: Remember check them out and feed them from time to time.
Lines.zh: 记得时不时来看看它们，并喂饱它们。

Lines.en: We just obtained a sprout.
Lines.zh: 我们刚刚拿到了一棵幼苗。

Lines.en: We can go to the Zen Garden to raise them up.
Lines.zh: 我们可以去禅境花园培养它们。

Lines.en: Most interesting, there're other special items in it!
Lines.zh: 最有意思的是，里面还有其他特殊物品！

Lines.en: Let's go and have a visit!
Lines.zh: 让我们去逛一逛吧！

Lines.en: We've finished this level.
Lines.zh: 我们完成了这一关。

Lines.en: Now we can buy the plant in the store now!
Lines.zh: 现在我们可以去商店买下这株植物了！

Lines.en: I've detected a new premium plant that hadn't shown up in the store before.
Lines.zh: 检测到未曾出现在商店的新植物。

Lines.en: The new plant looks cool!
Lines.zh: 这株新植物看起来太酷了！

Lines.en: We must finish this level to bring it to the store.
Lines.zh: 我们必须完成这个关卡才能把他带到商店。

Lines.en: Want more piñatas? Complete Travel Log's quests before time is up. New quests show up every day!
Lines.zh: 想要更多彩陶？请在时限内完成旅行原木的任务。每天都有新任务出现！

Lines.en: Want to open more Piñatas? Check out the Store!
Lines.zh: 想开彩陶吗？去看看商店吧！

Lines.en: Tap the Strawburst to fire.
Lines.zh: 点击爆浆草莓以开火。

Lines.en: Strawburst's berry grows over time.
Lines.zh: 爆浆草莓会随时间生长。

Lines.en: Looky! A Peashooter and a Repeater!
Lines.zh: 瞧啊！一株豌豆射手和一株双重射手！

Lines.en: I sure hope no Buckethead Zombie attacks that poor lil' Peashooter!
Lines.zh: 我真希望没有铁桶僵尸去攻击那可怜的小豌豆射手！

Lines.en: Your fears are misplaced, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 您的担忧错对象了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: That Peashooter is at MAX LEVEL.
Lines.zh: 那株豌豆射手满级了。

Lines.en: It packs a considerable punch!
Lines.zh: 它的威力相当惊人！

Lines.en: At its current level, it is even stronger than a regular Repeater.
Lines.zh: 以它现在的等级，恐怕比一株普通的双重射手还强。

Lines.en: Observe!
Lines.zh: 注意看！

Lines.en: Good news! Penny found a map to my taco!
Lines.zh: 好消息！潘妮找到了一张玉米卷寻宝图！

Lines.en: No, that is a time-space map to the worlds we could explore.
Lines.zh: 不，那只是一个时空地图，只提供了我们能探索的世界。

Lines.en: Mummies and pirates and cowboys, oh my!
Lines.zh: 木乃伊、海盗还有牛仔，我的天！

Lines.en: We should be able to find some way to access the other worlds.
Lines.zh: 我们会找到前往其他世界的办法的。

Lines.en: For now we're ready to press on in Ancient Egypt!
Lines.zh: 而现在我们已经迫不及待前往神秘埃及地图了！

Lines.en: A lawn of vases is like a box of chocolates.
Lines.zh: 一草坪的花瓶就像一盒巧克力。

Lines.en: Some are awesome! Others taste downright ugly!
Lines.zh: 有些超棒！另一些味道就糟糕了！

Lines.en: But all vases are much harder on your teeth!
Lines.zh: 但所有花瓶都比巧克力更伤牙齿！

Lines.en: Be careful with how fast you break vases.
Lines.zh: 控制好你破罐的速度。

Lines.en: You might end up with more ugly than you can handle.
Lines.zh: 你可能会遇到超出你处理能力的糟糕情况。

Lines.en: My Penny sense has detected a rare and curious lunch box.
Lines.zh: 我的潘妮感应器检测到一个稀有又特别的午餐盒。

Lines.en: I smell a Yeti! Let's go after him!
Lines.zh: 我闻到一只雪人的味道！我们去追他吧！

Lines.en: Your Sunflower will grow up too, but it takes awhile.
Lines.zh: 你的向日葵也会成长，只是需要时间。

Lines.en: Try some more Gems to speed her up!
Lines.zh: 试着用点钻石来加速她的成长吧！

Lines.en: Zen Garden isn't just for growing Marigolds.
Lines.zh: 禅境花园不止是种金盏花的地方。

Lines.en: You can also grow mega powerful boosted plants!
Lines.zh: 你还能种植威力巨大的金卡植物！

Lines.en: But boosted plants only last for a single level!
Lines.zh: 但植物的金卡只会持续一个关卡！

Lines.en: If you wait a while, your Marigold will grow.
Lines.zh: 如果你等一会的话，你的金盏花就会长大。

Lines.en: But you can speed up the process with Gems!
Lines.zh: 但是你可以用钻石加速这个过程！

Lines.en: I see you've found a sprout.
Lines.zh: 我看到你找到了一颗苗。

Lines.en: Maybe if you water it, you'll get coins?
Lines.zh: 没准你给它浇点水就能得到金币呢？

Lines.en: At least, I think that's how it works.
Lines.zh: 至少我觉得它就是这样的。

Lines.en: Boy, Pea-shooter and Wall-nut sure are good at what they do.
Lines.zh: 嘿，豌豆射手和坚果墙还真是各显神通啊。

Lines.en: Talk about two great plants that fight great together!
Lines.zh: 这才叫黄金搭档！两株植物要是能合成一下一起对抗僵尸该多好！

Lines.en: User Dave! Perhaps you are not as cerebrally unsound as you periodically insist!
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫！或许您并非如您时常宣称的那般……呃……脑回路清奇！

Lines.en: What if there was one plant that behaved like both a Pea-shooter AND a Wall-nut?
Lines.zh: 要是有一株植物，既能像豌豆射手那样发射豌豆，又能像坚果墙一样挡住僵尸会怎样？

Lines.en: We would call it a ... Pea-nut!
Lines.zh: 我们能称之为……“花生（Pea-nut）”！

Lines.en: Two plant powers in one legume's body?
Lines.zh: 一株植物驾驭两种植物的力量？

Lines.en: Keep talkin' like that and people are going to call you Crazy Penny!
Lines.zh: 一定要继续这样想象，这样大家都会叫你“疯狂潘妮”！

Lines.en: Which would be weird for both of us.
Lines.zh: 虽然对我们俩来说太奇怪了。

Lines.en: Why would anyone go and stick a nice sword into a dirty ol' rock?
Lines.zh: 怎么会有人把一把好端端的剑插进一块脏兮兮的破石头里？

Lines.en: I understand it to be a test, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 据我所知，这是一种试炼，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Only someone with great physical strength and strength of character may remove it.
Lines.zh: 唯有兼具非凡膂力与崇高品格之人，方能将其拔出。

Lines.en: I bet someone with a jackhammer could remove it.
Lines.zh: 我看拿个电钻来准能把它弄出来。

Lines.en: A CRAAAZY someone!
Lines.zh: 当然要以最最最疯狂的方式！

Lines.en: An inelegant but no doubt effective solution to the test, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 虽不优雅，但无疑是破解试炼的有效方案，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Warning! I've detected carafes containing chemical compounds of a malevolent makeup!
Lines.zh: 警告！我已检测到以邪恶为配方的药瓶！

Lines.en: Can you translate that into Crazy Dave Talk for me?
Lines.zh: 你就不能以我能听懂的口吻告诉我吗？

Lines.en: There are evil potions on the lawn!
Lines.zh: 你的前院冒出了邪恶药水！

Lines.en: Evil medieval potions! They're the most dangerous kind...
Lines.zh: 邪恶的中世纪药剂！而且是最危险的那一类……

Lines.en: On account of having twice the evil!
Lines.zh: 因为它们能让邪恶翻倍！

Lines.en: Data suggests the Dark Ages were a time of intellectual decline and moral  confusion.
Lines.zh: 资料显示，黑暗时代是一个智力衰退、道德混乱的时代。

Lines.en: Perhaps now is a good time to call upon the persuasive powers of the Hypno-shroom?
Lines.zh: 或许这正好是魅惑菇大展身手的好时机？

Lines.en: Good idea, Penny! We'll convert the wicked – Dark Ages style!
Lines.zh: 好主意，潘妮！我们将化解邪恶——用黑暗时代的特色！

Lines.en: Deploy this shroom and the zombies won't know what bit them...
Lines.zh: 种下这只蘑菇，僵尸绝对不会猜到自己将会被谁啃咬……

Lines.en: Fume-tastic! Let's give the zombies a case of the vapours instead!
Lines.zh: 雾哦！让我们给僵尸们来一发喷雾吧！

Lines.en: Methinks the siphoning of thine brains is the only way to correct this ailment!
Lines.zh: 幸会，非贵族大人！

Lines.en: It is my fervent medical opinion that your humours are out of balance!
Lines.zh: 我十分地确信，你的内环境失去了平衡！

Lines.en: Methinks the siphoning of thine brains is the only way to correct this ailment!
Lines.zh: 我认为，对你的大脑进行虹吸疗程是解决这种疾病的唯一办法！

Lines.en: Fare thee ill, Dr. Edgar Zomboss
Lines.zh: 一路走好。埃德加·僵尸博士

Lines.en: Hey! I prefer my humors and my brains unbalanced!
Lines.zh: 嘿！我确实觉得我体液过热，讲不出冷笑话了！

Lines.en: Because I'm CRAAAAZY!
Lines.zh: 因为我已经疯了！

Lines.en: I'm afraid the Dark Ages are giving me a bad case of the vapours.
Lines.zh: 黑暗时代的雾气病毒会让我有些神志不清。

Lines.en: User Dave, the vapours are no longer considered a real ailment.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，雾气不是病毒。

Lines.en: But I believe Fume-shroom will be of use here.
Lines.zh: 但我相信大喷菇的雾气确实有毒性。

Lines.en: His vapors are quite real and provide a distinct advantage against the right zombie opponents.
Lines.zh: 他的雾气非常真实，在面对个别僵尸时非常有优势。

Lines.en: Fume-tastic! Let's give the zombies a case of the vapours instead!
Lines.zh: 雾哦！让我们给僵尸们来一发喷雾吧！

Lines.en: Whoa there! Who dimmed the lights?
Lines.zh: 喂喂！谁把灯熄了？

Lines.en: No one, User Dave. We have simply arrived in the Dark Ages.
Lines.zh: 没人关了灯，用户戴夫。我们只是到了黑暗时代。

Lines.en: Sounds gloomy to me.
Lines.zh: 听起来很黑暗。

Lines.en: Indeed. According to my research, a plague has swept this era.
Lines.zh: 当然。根据我的调查，瘟疫席卷了这个时代。

Lines.en: Also, sun no longer falls from the sky.
Lines.zh: 还有，太阳不会再从天上掉下来了。

Lines.en: What we need is someone to brighten this place up!
Lines.zh: 我们需要的是有人来照亮这个地方！

Lines.en: I got it! We need Sun-shrooms!
Lines.zh: 我知道了！我们需要阳光菇！

Lines.en: These guys not only know how to turn a frown upside down...
Lines.zh: 这些小家伙们不仅知道如何让人眉开眼笑……

Lines.en: They make more sun as they grow! Great guys, very talented.
Lines.zh: 随着他们的成长，他们会产出更多的太阳！真是了不起的家伙，太有才华了。

Lines.en: Is it over? Has it started? I can never tell with these time-gummy-nummers!
Lines.zh: 结束了吗？开始了吗？我永远也辨不清楚这些时间节点！

Lines.en: We have survived this futuristic gauntlet, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我们在这场先进未来的大战中幸存下来了。

Lines.en: Though I suspect our challenges are not complete.
Lines.zh: 尽管我感觉我们将要面临的挑战还没结束。

Lines.en: Curse your missile-dodging ways!
Lines.zh: 你们逃避后果的模样真难看！

Lines.en: The future is as we have made it!
Lines.zh: 未来由我们亲手打造！

Lines.en: The rise of the fallen, the life of death!
Lines.zh: 堕落者崛起，死尸重获新生！

Lines.en: These, plus other enigmatic remarks!
Lines.zh: 以上，再附加其他令人费解的名人名言！

Lines.en: The Zombot Tomorrow-Tron 2.0 shall avenge all!
Lines.zh: 明日缔造者 2.0 将为完成复仇！

Lines.en: Hey! Our futuristic lawnmowers are in the past!
Lines.zh: 嘿！属于小推车的时代已经落幕了！

Lines.en: I detect Dr. Zomboss' hand in this, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我检测到僵尸博士的时空痕迹了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Or not.
Lines.zh: 也可能不是他。

Lines.en: Either way, things just got 108% craaaaaazier around here!
Lines.zh: 不管怎样，我们的处境让人 108 度地疯狂！

Lines.en: The future's not what it used to be! There's more of it!
Lines.zh: 这已经不再是之前那个遥远的未来了！这是更遥远的未来！

Lines.en: I believe zombies may be drawing strength from the time fissure, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我确信僵尸从时间裂缝中的汲取了力量，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We will likely encounter more powerful versions of select zombies.
Lines.zh: 我们恐怕要面对更多更强大的僵尸。

Lines.en: We may need to retreat to another timeline and return with stronger plants.
Lines.zh: 或许我们有必要撤退至其他的时间线获取更有力的植物。

Lines.en: Oh! That was...hypno-MAZING!
Lines.zh: 哦，刚刚那是催眠……刚刚真刺激！

Lines.en: I want to eat THAT hypno-taco again! I need my TIME MACHINE!
Lines.zh: 我现在又想吃我的催眠玉米卷了！我的时光机在哪里！

Lines.en: What? Wait a minute... what was I saying again?
Lines.zh: 等一下？什么？……我刚刚又说啥了？

Lines.en: Hypno-Zombnosis... Hypno-ZOMBNOSIS!
Lines.zh: 催眠术！————催眠术！

Lines.en: Drats, or was it Zombno-Hypsosis?
Lines.zh: 哦天啊，刚刚不小心用的是催食术吗？

Lines.en: Isn't it convenient that your neighbor is so helpful in your fight against us zombies?
Lines.zh: 是不是感觉在你邻居的协助下打败我们僵尸太顺利了？

Lines.en: Crazy David's apparent incompetence is only eclipsed by his usefulness.
Lines.zh: 疯狂戴卫表面上很无能，实际上却有点水平。

Lines.en: However, with one secret word my sleeper agent will turn against you.
Lines.zh: 不过，只要我下达一声命令，我那潜伏特工就会背叛你。

Lines.en: Listen to me David, "Hypno-Zombnosis".
Lines.zh: 听我号令戴卫，“催眠术！”

Lines.en: Hey neighbor!
Lines.zh: 你好啊邻居！

Lines.en: Can I borrow your brains? Um, I mean hot sauce!
Lines.zh: 我可以借一下你的脑子，哦不，你的辣椒酱吗？

Lines.en: You can decide to launch one mower early now.
Lines.zh: 你现在可以选择提前释放一辆小推车了。

Lines.en: Just press and hold a mower when the time is right.
Lines.zh: 只需要在合适的时机按住一辆小推车即可。

Lines.en: Sometimes that's the most strate-logical thing to do!
Lines.zh: 有时候这个做法是最合理最有策略的方案！

Lines.en: Looks like we don't have much firepower here Penny.
Lines.zh: 看样子我们剩余的火力不足了潘妮。

Lines.en: With a good supply of sun...
Lines.zh: 但如果我们有最佳的阳光供应……

Lines.en: Magnifying Grass can pack quite the punch.
Lines.zh: 棱镜草就能大展拳脚。

Lines.en: Protect those Citrons!
Lines.zh: 保护好那些柚子！

Lines.en: It takes a lot of pulp to stand your ground like that.
Lines.zh: 他们像这样坚守前线需要很大的勇气。

Lines.en: I like to save some sun for a rainy day.
Lines.zh: 我喜欢把阳光留到下雨天来用。

Lines.en: It can get you out of a pickle or into an E.M.Peach.
Lines.zh: 阳光可以让你摆脱接下来的困境，也可以让你获得脉冲黄桃。

Lines.en: Welcome back Gardener,
Lines.zh: 我们又见面了，园丁，

Lines.en: In this year your brains were collected ages ago.
Lines.zh: 在这个时间点你的脑子在好几百年前就被我们取走了。

Lines.en: Collect them again soon, Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 马上我会再取走它一次的。埃德加·僵尸博士

Lines.en: Watch out neighbor, I'm pretty sure he wasn't talking about my BRAINS!
Lines.zh: 小心点邻居，我很肯定他刚刚不是在说我的脑子。

Lines.en: I would say there's evidence to the contrary.
Lines.zh: 我想说的是，有证据表明情况恰恰相反。

Lines.en: You can pick your friends, but you can't pick these plants.
Lines.zh: 你可以选择你的朋友，但你选不了自己的植物。

Lines.en: But some of my best friends are plants!
Lines.zh: 但我一些最好的朋友是植物！

Lines.en: I spy with my crazy eye a U.F.B.! An unidentified flying brain!
Lines.zh: 我用我疯狂的眼睛探测到了一个 U.F.B.！不明飞行脑！

Lines.en: Something more formidable than a brain lies within.
Lines.zh: 比这颗大脑更强大的东西就在其中。

Lines.en: You know how sometimes suns are bombs?
Lines.zh: 你知道在某些情况下太阳就是炸弹吗？

Lines.en: This is one of these times!
Lines.zh: 现在就满足那样的情况了喔！

Lines.en: The Future! Weird, I thought I would be hungrier.
Lines.zh: 欢迎来到未来！奇怪，我以为我会变得更饿的。

Lines.en: After all I haven't eaten in 4000 years!
Lines.zh: 毕竟我都 4000 年没吃东西了！

Lines.en: Hey, what happened to the lawn? It’s so glowy!
Lines.zh: 嘿，我们的草坪怎么回事？到处在发光！

Lines.en: I'm detecting an array of Power Tiles on the space-lawn.
Lines.zh: 我检测到这太空草坪上排列好了“超能瓷砖”。

Lines.en: It was a stagecoach, it was a robot... it was Complete Cowboy CRAAAAY-ziness!
Lines.zh: 那是一辆马车，又是一个机器人……还是完全的牛仔式疯狂！

Lines.en: Our premium plants proved up to the task, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们强大的植物不负众望，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: All my efforts... useless! I begin to seriously question my capacity to succeed!
Lines.zh: 我所有的努力……毫无用处！我开始严重怀疑自己获得成功的能力！

Lines.en: Even as the West was wild, so is my fury even wilder!
Lines.zh: 西部是狂野的，但我的愤怒更甚！

Lines.en: Face me! Face me and the rebuilt and improved Zombot War Wagon!
Lines.zh: 面对我吧！面对我和我重造的重型战马车！

Lines.en: Penny! Our lawnmowers have gone west!
Lines.zh: 潘妮！我们的小推车已经……上西天了！

Lines.en: The rough terrain forbids the mowing of lawns.
Lines.zh: 地形太过坎坷，小推车已经被淘汰了。

Lines.en: Our battles shall be more fraught from here on.
Lines.zh: 从现在起，我们的战斗会变得更加激烈。

Lines.en: I say, Penny, old thing, tally ho! Pip-pip and such!
Lines.zh: 听我说，潘妮。老东西，啦哩嚯！哔哔哔！

Lines.en: We are in the Wild West, User Dave. Not Victorian England.
Lines.zh: 我们是在狂野西部，用户戴夫，不是在维多利亚时代的英国。

Lines.en: There's a difference?
Lines.zh: 能有什么区别呢？

Lines.en: We are likely to encounter far more ferocious former frontiersmen, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们可能会遇到更凶残的旧时代拓荒者，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We will need stronger plants to stake any claim.
Lines.zh: 我们需要更强大的植物来维护我们的主权。

Lines.en: That's right! These plants versus you and your zombies.
Lines.zh: 这就对了！这些植物碾压你和你的僵尸。

Lines.en: And we didn't even use any spoons...
Lines.zh: 而且我们甚至都没用上勺子……

Lines.en: And we didn't even use any spoons...
Lines.zh: 而且我们甚至都没用上勺子……

Lines.en: Even though those things totally exist!
Lines.zh: 尽管那些东西确实存在！

Lines.en: I admit you are correct in this regard.
Lines.zh: 我承认你担心这些是合理的。

Lines.en: We have no existential conflict over the nature of spoons.
Lines.zh: 我们对勺子的本质达成过共识。

Lines.en: Have you considered that you are sharing in Crazy David's madness?
Lines.zh: 你有没有想过，你也和疯狂戴夫一样疯狂？

Lines.en: There is no zombie outbreak threatening you.
Lines.zh: 僵尸本来就没在发动爆乱威胁你的安全。

Lines.en: You are not using plants to defend your home.
Lines.zh: 你也并非是在用植物保卫你的家园。

Lines.en: The zombies and I are normal people, simply trying to help you.
Lines.zh: 我和僵尸们都只是普通的正常人，只是在想办法营救你。

Lines.en: I bet you'll tell us there are no spoons, too!
Lines.zh: 我猜你还会告诉我们你们身上没带勺子！

Lines.en: These levels can be tough nuts to crack.
Lines.zh: 这些关卡就像硬核桃一样难以破解。

Lines.en: And I want to see the delicious creamy center.
Lines.zh: 而且我喜欢那种甜美的软糯的核桃果肉。

Lines.en: The point is not to crack them.
Lines.zh: 前提是眼前的核桃不被砸坏。

Lines.en: These plants are mine!
Lines.zh: 这些植物简直是宝矿！

Lines.en: Well not mine... yours.
Lines.zh: 不是说它们吸取矿物质……是指它们是……宝矿。

Lines.en: They're for the mine...
Lines.zh: 总之把它们放在矿……

Lines.en: ...carts.
Lines.zh: ……车上吧。

Lines.en: Maybe we can use that to unlock our minds.
Lines.zh: 或许我们可以用这玩意解放我们的思维。

Lines.en: I still have some cleaning to do.
Lines.zh: 但我还有清洗工作要做。

Lines.en: It would be better used gaining access to a World.
Lines.zh: 把它用在前往其他时空是个更好的主意。

Lines.en: You know, for the greater good of...
Lines.zh: 你懂的，这都是为了……

Lines.en: The Taco! I almost forgot.
Lines.zh: 是为了玉米卷！我差点忘了。

Lines.en: Greetings Plant Rustler,
Lines.zh: 你好啊，老园丁！

Lines.en: Agents are arriving to mark your brains as my property.
Lines.zh: 我派来了特务，专门给你的脑子的所有权标记给我。

Lines.en: Salutations, Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 敬礼！埃德加·僵尸博士

Lines.en: I don't want my brains all marked up.
Lines.zh: 我可不想让我的脑子有个烫痕。

Lines.en: It took forever to get 'em clean.
Lines.zh: 那样的话我会一辈子洗不掉这个印记的。

Lines.en: My Uncle Milo used to have one these, he called it a boom box.
Lines.zh: 我的叔叔以前用过这样的东西，他说这是轰隆盒。

Lines.en: Actually, that's close enough. I'll allow it.
Lines.zh: 事实上，这很接近了，无需纠正。

Lines.en:
Six shooters:
locked and loaded
Lines.zh:
六个弹膛：
填充完毕

Lines.en:
Old timey piano music:
downloaded
Lines.zh:
老钢琴曲：
下载完毕

Lines.en:
Chance of taco:
0.015%
Lines.zh:
遇到玉米卷的概率：
0.015%

Lines.en:
Margin of error:
0.016%
We lived! Take that, planks and zombies and seaweed!
Lines.zh: 我们熬下来了！刚刚那招怎么样啊，僵尸们！

Lines.en: Indeed, User Dave, piracy is not a victimless crime.
Lines.zh: 说得没错，用户戴夫，海盗总是带来更多伤害。

Lines.en: These advanced plants are egregious and unfair!
Lines.zh: 使用这些跨时代的植物真是恶劣又不公！

Lines.en: The timbers be shivered! The seas are ablaze!
Lines.zh: 桅杆将要撕裂！海面将会燃烧！

Lines.en: Your doom is assured! Your mind is a haze!
Lines.zh: 你必死无疑！你的颅内将只剩混沌！

Lines.en: The Zombot Plank Walker 2.0 shall soon rule the waves!
Lines.zh: 我的甲板漫步者 2.0 即将统治浪潮！

Lines.en: Ai-yowza! Our lawnmowers have walked some planks!
Lines.zh: 哎哟喂！我们的小推车可能自己跳下甲板了！

Lines.en: The temporal energies are too powerful for them, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 时空能量对它们来说过于强大了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We cannot allow even a single zombie past our defenses.
Lines.zh: 我们不能再让任何一只僵尸越过我们的防线了。

Lines.en: I see more seas! Arrrr there more zombies?
Lines.zh: 我看到了更远的海平面！额惹惹惹，还有更多僵尸？

Lines.en: More pirate zombies have appeared, and with greater strength.
Lines.zh: 更多的海盗僵尸出现了，他们更加精壮。

Lines.en: We may need to retreat to another timeline and return when our plants are stronger.
Lines.zh: 或许我们该暂时撤退到其他时间线，带着更强大的植物回来应战。

Lines.en: Please, tell me about your creation process.
Lines.zh: 请告诉我您当初的创造流程。

Lines.en: It was pretty easy! I found some timey wabby wabbo stuff.
Lines.zh: 很简单的！我当时找到了一堆哇啦哇啦的时空玩意。

Lines.en: Then I put it between two slices of bread...
Lines.zh: 然后把它们夹在两片面包中间……

Lines.en: BOOM! Awesome sandwich!
Lines.zh: 轰！超级美味的三明治！

Lines.en: Such proliferous bunk. I should have expected as much.
Lines.zh: 只是问出来一堆废话，我早该料到的。

Lines.en: I'll have the answers someday, when David's brains are on my plate.
Lines.zh: 等我夺到了戴夫的脑子，我会得到答案的。

Lines.en: I've discovered a mysterious trait in your rattletrap time machine.
Lines.zh: 我在你的那嘎吱响的时光机里发现了一个秘密。

Lines.en: Its temporal signature is nearly identical to my own creations.
Lines.zh: 它的时间相性与我自己的创作几乎完全相同。

Lines.en: Explain to me, how was this "Penny" created in the first place?
Lines.zh: 请向我解释一下，这个“潘妮”是从哪里来的？

Lines.en: Could I really be some form of Zombot?
Lines.zh: 难不成我是博士机甲的另一种变体？

Lines.en: User Dave, am I the daughter of Dr. Zomboss?
Lines.zh: 用户戴夫，我是僵尸博士的发明之一吗？

Lines.en: That was one fine sandwich! So, what did I miss?
Lines.zh: 我刚吃了一份美味的三明治！额，你们刚刚在聊啥呢？

Lines.en: Remember, protect those plants.
Lines.zh: 记住，要保护好那些植物。

Lines.en: And don't let those beans walk the plank.
Lines.zh: 而且别让那些豆子被抓去走甲板。

Lines.en: It's low tide and the waves are coming in.
Lines.zh: 现在处于低潮时段，而且马上潮水就要汹涌而来。

Lines.en: Grab your water wings! We're going to get wet.
Lines.zh: 戴好水翼！我们要被淹没了。

Lines.en: Target score activated. Let's see if you can beat my high score.
Lines.zh: 检测到需要达到目标分数，看看你能不能破我的纪录。

Lines.en: And put in KRZYDV as your initials.
Lines.zh: 而且得输入 KRZYDV 作为你的姓名首字母缩写。

Lines.en: Hail fellow Captain,
Lines.zh: 向您敬礼，船长，

Lines.en: Be advised that your sailing vessel is of insufficient size.
Lines.zh: 在此提醒您，您的船帆尺寸不匹配。

Lines.en: Sincerely, Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 此致，埃德加·僵尸博士。

Lines.en: Huh? What's that now?
Lines.zh: 呃，这次又是什么情况？

Lines.en: We're gonna need a bigger boat.
Lines.zh: 我们可能需要一条更大的船了。

Lines.en: Finally, one of these pirates dropped some booty!
Lines.zh: 终于有带着金银财宝的水手被我们收拾了！

Lines.en: I'm detecting something more challenging than treasure inside.
Lines.zh: 我检测到这堆财宝中有更危险的东西要来。

Lines.en: I thought we were trying to get back home and get your taco.
Lines.zh: 我已经尽力想办法回到旧家然后再找玉米卷了。

Lines.en: But Pirates! Hang on to your parrots and peg legs!
Lines.zh: 但是这里全是海盗！赶紧准备好你的鹦鹉和假腿！

Lines.en: I'm sweaty! And we did it!
Lines.zh: 真是捏了把冷汗！我们做到了！

Lines.en: We may travel to other timelines freely, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 我们接下来可以在其他时间线自由穿梭了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: But I detect further timeline expansions in the future.
Lines.zh: 但我检测到其他时间线也有拓展部分等待我们的修复。

Lines.en: I'll defeat you then, pyramid-iots!
Lines.zh: 然后你们就会被我击垮，住金字塔的白痴们！

Lines.en: Once more we meet in the sands of time!
Lines.zh: 我们又在这满是沙尘的时间线见面了！

Lines.en: Have you enjoyed my new and improved zombies?
Lines.zh: 你已经受过我那全新又先进的僵尸大军的洗礼了吧？

Lines.en: Or should I say ancient and improved?
Lines.zh: 或许我该称之为古老又先进？

Lines.en: Bah! They are nothing to my Zombot Sphinxinator 2.0!
Lines.zh: 管他呢！跟我的狮身人面降临者 2.0 相比不值一提！

Lines.en: Hey! Our lawnmowers are a-missing!
Lines.zh: 嘿！我们的小推车丢失了！

Lines.en: The timeline is exhibiting instabilities, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 这条时间线已经变得极不稳定了，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: Fixed-loop paradoxes are forbidding the presence of lawnmowers.
Lines.zh: 莫比乌斯环时空悖论让小推车不再存在了。

Lines.en: But I named the middle one "Mowie"!
Lines.zh: 可我已经给正对家门口的那辆取名“小推”了！

Lines.en: Murmering mummies! More mummies!
Lines.zh: 僵尸们的低吼更加沉重！更多的木乃伊正在来临！

Lines.en: The time fissure is strengthening zombies from all epochs, User Dave.
Lines.zh: 时空裂隙正在使来自各个时代的僵尸更加强大，用户戴夫。

Lines.en: We should expect more powerful versions of some zombies.
Lines.zh: 我们应该为此做好准备，以应对更强大的僵尸。

Lines.en: Wait a minute!
Lines.zh: 稍等一下！

Lines.en: There was never any meat in that taco.
Lines.zh: 我想起那个玉米卷里没有一块肉。

Lines.en: I still have Tofunky in my beard to prove it!
Lines.zh: 我的胡子里还有玉米卷屑呢，可以拿来证明我的清白！

Lines.en: Well, that just leaves more brains for us... later.
Lines.zh: 看样子我们能吃到更多脑子了……以后。

Lines.en: I'll find you again, in another where and another when!
Lines.zh: 我会再找上你们的，无论何时，无论何地！

Lines.en: Have you ever wondered why your neighbor David hungers so?
Lines.zh: 你有没有思考过为什么你的邻居戴夫总是如此饥饿？

Lines.en: What secret ingredient in the taco would drive his desire?
Lines.zh: 那个玉米卷里究竟加了什么秘密配方让他如此着迷?

Lines.en: Could it be that he needs your brains as much as we do?
Lines.zh: 和我们对你的大脑的渴求有点太像了不是吗？

Lines.en: Wha-?! No way. I would never eat a brain taco!
Lines.zh: 什么？！不不不可能。我不可能会想吃大脑玉米卷！

Lines.en: But, I don't remember what was in it...
Lines.zh: 但是，我也不是很清楚里面有什么……

Lines.en: This will be the first last stand. There will be more lasts to come.
Lines.zh: 这是我们遭遇的第一场坚不可摧。以后我们可要遭遇到更多的。

Lines.en: There's a plant call on the banana phone. It's an S.O.S.!
Lines.zh: 有株植物用香蕉打了个电话过来。是求救信号！

Lines.en: They'll be sitting plants if we don't help. Let's take that root and save them!
Lines.zh: 如果不保护好他们，时空历史会被改写。快接下任务保护好他们！

Lines.en: Though tetrahedrons are pyramids, this one is not a Platonic solid.
Lines.zh: 虽然四面体像金字塔，但它们不是柏拉图立体。

Lines.en: I'm so hungry, I would love a Platonic solid.
Lines.zh: 我好饿，给我来一份柏拉图立体吧。

Lines.en: User Dave, this is also not a taco salad.
Lines.zh: 戴夫先生，这次的柏拉图立体也不是玉米卷酱料。

Lines.en: This level is a locked coordinate in time.
Lines.zh: 本关是时间线上的一个确切节点。

Lines.en: You must take these plants to win.
Lines.zh: 你必须用选定好的植物取得胜利。

Lines.en: Otherwise, you risk distorting reality.
Lines.zh: 否则你就是在冒险尝试改写历史事实。

Lines.en: Never distort reality! You'll pull something.
Lines.zh: 千万不要扭曲历史！会牵引出不好的事物的。

Lines.en: It looks like a courier had his own delivery to make!
Lines.zh: 看样子那位快递员要先把自己的脑袋送回去先了！

Lines.en: This will be useful for traveling to other times.
Lines.zh: 这把钥匙将会协助你前往更多地方进行时空旅行。

Lines.en: Yeah! Time to try the Taco Map!
Lines.zh: 是啊！是该前往玉米卷时空了！

Lines.en: Greetings Temporal Commuters,
Lines.zh: 你好啊时空旅行者，

Lines.en: Special couriers have been dispatched to retrieve your brains.
Lines.zh: 我们已经派出了专门的外交员来取回你的大脑。

Lines.en: Please have your release forms signed before their arrival.
Lines.zh: 请在他们抵达前签署好免责声明。

Lines.en: Regards, Dr. Edgar Zomboss.
Lines.zh: 致辞，埃德加·僵尸博士。

Lines.en: Cool, that Mr. Boss guy wants your autograph!
Lines.zh: 酷毙了，那位博士先生想要你的签名！

Lines.en: This can't be good.
Lines.zh: 这可不是什么好事啊。

Lines.en: You can try cheating here!
Lines.zh: 在这你可以用作弊过关！

Lines.en: You can cheat in the levels now! You could try them out!
Lines.zh: 你获得了作弊功能！赶紧试试怎么使用吧！

Lines.en: Yeah, and we can break the seal. Let's get crazy!
Lines.zh: 是啊，我们能毫无顾忌地使用它们。让我们狂欢起来吧！

Lines.en: Welcome to Ancient Egypt!
Lines.zh: 欢迎来到神秘埃及！

Lines.en: Please wait 4500 years for your taco to be ready... more or less.
Lines.zh: 请在此等待 4500 年，届时您的玉米卷将会降临……或许吧。

Lines.en: That doesn't smell right.
Lines.zh: 不过闻起来不像。

Lines.en: I'm sure my taco is around here somewhere, but in the meantime...
Lines.zh: 我确信我的玉米卷就在附近，但是同时……

Lines.en: These plants were made for plantin'.
Lines.zh: 总之先试试这些从家里带来的植物吧。

Lines.en: No need for sun.  Plants are coming via special delivery.
Lines.zh: 无需阳光，我们设计了一套植物生产线。
